subject: Congratulations, Glenn Youngkin

body:
Congratulations, Glenn Youngkin |

Peter,

**The GOP did it! C _ONGRATULATIONS_ to Virginia’s NEWEST Republican Governor, Glenn Youngkin.**

This critical election proved that Virginians, like Americans across the country, are rejecting the failed Biden agenda. The **RED WAVE** is building, and after this **HISTORIC win** , _I am more confident now than ever before that Republicans will**TAKE BACK our GOP Majority in 2022.**_

We have just over 1 year to go, Peter, and I need to know that you’re with us 100%. **America will not survive another 2 years under Democrat control.**

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: The Red Wave is coming!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
The silent majority is NOT staying silent! [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cdtxjl-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Peter,Virginia just DESTROYED the Democrats' hopes of winning in 2022.**Now it's up to us to finish the job - starting NOW!**A **red wave** is coming. You know it and I know it. _Virginia just proved it. _Will you step up right away to make sure that the **red wave** sweeps away the Democrats in 2022? [_Click here to BUILD on what just happened in Virginia!_](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cdtxjl-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cdtxjl-ahkdjtlkr-j/) [NOW is the time to step up >> ACTION REQUESTED](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cdtxjl-ahkdjtlkr-t/) The Democrats were terrified that this would happen. **But they're even more _terrified_ of what's going to happen to them a year from now. **The voters are holding them accountable.
* Parents are fighting back against the **radical indoctrination of our kids.**
* Families and business owners are fighting back against **runaway crime in our communities.**
* And common-sense Americans are fighting back against the border crisis, Biden inflation, runaway gas prices, and the overwhelming sense that **America is moving in the wrong direction**!

Will you step up TODAY and make sure we keep moving toward VICTORY a year from now? The Democrats aren't going to be licking their wounds for long, and they're going to be motivated by this loss and stepping up to prevent an even bigger one.We need to take back the majority. We just had a big victory, but the real fight is still ahead of us.Thanks,Scott Fitzgerald [CLICK HERE - Keep Up The Momentum >>](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cdtxjl-ahkdjtlkr-h/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cdtxjl-ahkdjtlkr-k/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress

name: Dr Neil Shah
subject: Big Win Last Night
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Dr
body:
| [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_win_last_night&n=1) Peter, As you have undoubtedly heard by now, the left was dealt defeat-after-defeat last night across our great nation. Most notably, Glenn Youngkin decisively defeated his democrat opponent for the Virginia gubernatorial race. Fast forward to next year. In Minnesota we could be celebrating victory over Tim Walz, but only if we do one thing right:
## **Pick the right candidate.**
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_win_last_night&n=2) The left cannot pivot away from their failures to keep our streets safe, educate our children and keep the economy running. **We need a gubernatorial candidate in Minnesota who will unapologetically stand for conservative principles, fight back against the woke mob and run a winning game plan to turn out our base, win the suburbs and make inroads into the Cities.** So who’s capable of beating Tim Walz? You have a choice between career politicians, current and former state senators, who have shown a pattern of failing to defend and advance conservative principles, and a conservative political outsider. **Here’s how I differ from the politicians in this race:** \- **I signed the Never Again Pledge** on day one of my campaign, with my mom as my witness, because we can never again allow one person to infringe on our rights and freedoms. All the politicians in the race (Jensen, Benson & Gazelka) have refused to sign the Never Again Pledge. \- **I don’t talk about the Second Amendment, I live it.** As a citizen who exercises his right to be prepared to defend his family, his coworkers and his patients everyday, I will push to restore gun rights in Minnesota by advocating for Stand Your Ground and Constitutional Carry. Senators Jensen, Benson and Gazelka never got us a vote for important legislation like Stand Your Ground or Constitutional Carry in the 4 years they were in the Majority. Meanwhile, Democrats have passed their anti-gun bills in the House. Scott Jensen even co-authored Universal Background Checks, delivering a huge win for the Anti-gun Left. **Who do you trust to protect your Second Amendment rights - a guy who carries a Glock 43 everyday or the career politicians?** **\- I will cut taxes and spending.** We need bold policy proposals like eliminating the income tax and death tax. We can get it done by growing the state economy and drastically reducing the size and scope of spending. This is where I differ the most with the career politicians in the race. All of the politicians in this race have voted to increase government spending by passing billion dollar omnibus bills. Jensen, Benson & Gazelka have also spent budget surpluses instead of giving them back. And, in 2019, they all voted to increase taxes in this state. **We can win in 2022 - but only with the right candidate.** I am a principled conservative who will fight to Save Minnesota from the radical left and the career political class. With your help my campaign can earn the GOP endorsement, win the primary and **defeat Walz next November**.
We need your help to #SaveSota. Sign up to [**become a volunteer**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rHIMENRQT5AKoWG-e4wjsE6PmOi69xTq33Skw-UbFh4z&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_win_last_night&n=3) so we can expand our reach in the grassroots movement. If you don’t have the time to volunteer, [**please consider donating to this campaign**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_win_last_night&n=4). We aren’t funded by lobbyists and Special Interests like the career politician candidates, so [**$25, $50 or $100 goes a long way to helping us win!**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_win_last_night&n=5) **Thank you!** Dr. Neil Shah Conservative Candidate for Governor [http://www.electneil.com/](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=big_win_last_night&n=6) Prepared and paid for by the Dr. Neil Shah for Governor Committee, 855 Village Center Dr #245, North Oaks, MN 55127

body:
I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. |
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ff4f16b4ab9a4ed1891cac1f33395b04&_e=4hHnmpJ5BKkz4OMI8Khp6AJr7YLN-oCl58ues-WeBuRHreMIyB7TbQmMnAIcd7-ABHPmRbz48cwasvVuhbyT5Kv_d5MT3oqubaiK3EJiJkHFoKWpZVOsnXQ2aOKkq1g8WDo9tVs5nUvqn--e3ybAeVi9XlxkAPNX4ZK_lYoKP90_-4xuAhbGdiCG4zVN-CinPOuwQH-SG8Qgfu9YJhRki9wLcFWPQ2sHOV50sD7aK6HzscYdvof2f7u8rsv8H0SwQtPS7bsJumZPULnJ2_sLbFylp1ljg0erT-bYEqJukT3L-_dbiLMyTG7622JgXLW9zU5sFlyljrp-ZVpKudo4lpCd0JmCQ8XTO76BMHWuasqo2BDGlDdp5O6bd0S6oWU9YfeA6a6ddnUeJO-SowJHxnEoov2U9Js33clKOGuzT9iDq8MY3QdYL3DiFzx7RJROobzFzxa83Q_rqXDum-IU3l_Hkfa6QA-SVPmGDUqGP7M%3D)

Peter,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ff4f16b4ab9a4ed1891cac1f33395b04&_e=4hHnmpJ5BKkz4OMI8Khp6AJr7YLN-oCl58ues-WeBuRHreMIyB7TbQmMnAIcd7-ABHPmRbz48cwasvVuhbyT5Kv_d5MT3oqubaiK3EJiJkHFoKWpZVOsnXQ2aOKkq1g8WDo9tVs5nUvqn--e3ybAeVi9XlxkAPNX4ZK_lYoKP90_-4xuAhbGdiCG4zVN-CinPOuwQH-SG8Qgfu9YJhRki9wLcFWPQ2sHOV50sD7aK6HzscYdvof2f7u8rsv8H0Swuiyn9EShcsFwIgpk6lxV_ahLYWHhrIOGwOZa43P0AfsEEJpToV3qneueb8ARoqTF8UUaE6PprHWctH02-RrLhuZohtHn9ebw4D2GASY_8fVtKsuuwIrZNvtSbFcYdClJ-u-gC3EoDo5H0dvbA79XA2liyjgFq5qgxczBvbvHeXEzR3Ja0pzaY_-LSznz5872n6NwXdInWniJkHBzwI93MUCpEJnA5ZAU5z2b7bYzQHY%3D)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ff4f16b4ab9a4ed1891cac1f33395b04&_e=4hHnmpJ5BKkz4OMI8Khp6AJr7YLN-oCl58ues-WeBuRHreMIyB7TbQmMnAIcd7-ABHPmRbz48cwasvVuhbyT5Kv_d5MT3oqubaiK3EJiJkHFoKWpZVOsnXQ2aOKkq1g8WDo9tVs5nUvqn--e3ybAeVi9XlxkAPNX4ZK_lYoKP90_-4xuAhbGdiCG4zVN-CinPOuwQH-SG8Qgfu9YJhRki9wLcFWPQ2sHOV50sD7aK6HzscYdvof2f7u8rsv8H0SwNCyBPpIBwScP_zaF1ZQmb5V4UI-E79I1uu3vy8__wXHXsnXaWG6C-CL1lPMzVNcxTngnAWAapybuFaGJJBP2Z9L3U0fpvS8XSIDTGhnXkrkjmRzksoT5MMYh71U0aE57TbGfo0MB5Xrci6KgPxjPKYijdU3AlDLG4584gdKA618eREKaX1jFpkQnmm5tUHG_bgbM1KFCv2Yvsrp0woQ6lCx-HnqvjJkzgIMCjUWY3BQ%3D)**

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ff4f16b4ab9a4ed1891cac1f33395b04&_e=4hHnmpJ5BKkz4OMI8Khp6AJr7YLN-oCl58ues-WeBuRHreMIyB7TbQmMnAIcd7-ABHPmRbz48cwasvVuhbyT5Kv_d5MT3oqubaiK3EJiJkHFoKWpZVOsnXQ2aOKkq1g8WDo9tVs5nUvqn--e3ybAeVi9XlxkAPNX4ZK_lYoKP90_-4xuAhbGdiCG4zVN-CinPOuwQH-SG8Qgfu9YJhRki9wLcFWPQ2sHOV50sD7aK6HzscYdvof2f7u8rsv8H0SwcChczTnXW7Awa3a4W3-KGyW2Neww_Mjhc7YV-B3EcbjbVBoNrdbiVIbFrXcqhYRBq4_WFbv4m-X5ASqA94nCNhgO1719j4n_K-GMAY_LC3P_gSkhQa5Z2FT-QaI8Na7LV2aaMW80HdRFanVn7dvfBqMmcrCV3C1Dq8MZd-crHTfcWy0KWAmFQcHYpsovl59N5kl3stcZsM9csfGHay2-33HY-P-oridIQiywqOLEV5A%3D)
At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as Democrats take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ff4f16b4ab9a4ed1891cac1f33395b04&_e=4hHnmpJ5BKkz4OMI8Khp6AJr7YLN-oCl58ues-WeBuRHreMIyB7TbQmMnAIcd7-ABHPmRbz48cwasvVuhbyT5Kv_d5MT3oqubaiK3EJiJkHFoKWpZVOsnXQ2aOKkq1g8WDo9tVs5nUvqn--e3ybAeVi9XlxkAPNX4ZK_lYoKP90_-4xuAhbGdiCG4zVN-CinPOuwQH-SG8Qgfu9YJhRki9wLcFWPQ2sHOV50sD7aK6HzscYdvof2f7u8rsv8H0SwL6tSaUKhd45wRT02O_a-RMyM0gbRUiLyupX6JDDHLkOXugPQiD6lyO1hb46afW48jszEntpxDEqmYJBSish00agPvwtVMH5G-9n7g_Yz9R3tWg7HYHWSDyneZnr35onDxAPuXbSLoymib-1U9cs3uG7LJr0wrG-MQxpIldPceAP3RG0DwyNqgOXCgMcSCMTdwK4YYP5SFn2e3uwwSPwXFxryKmbCNXMhIvF9eHpP3hc%3D)
I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream.

I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too.

Very Respectfully,

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ff4f16b4ab9a4ed1891cac1f33395b04&_e=4hHnmpJ5BKkz4OMI8Khp6AJr7YLN-oCl58ues-WeBuRHreMIyB7TbQmMnAIcd7-ABHPmRbz48cwasvVuhbyT5Kv_d5MT3oqubaiK3EJiJkHFoKWpZVOsnXQ2aOKkq1g8WDo9tVs5nUvqn--e3ybAeVi9XlxkAPNX4ZK_lYoKP90_-4xuAhbGdiCG4zVN-CinPOuwQH-SG8Qgfu9YJhRki9wLcFWPQ2sHOV50sD7aK6HzscYdvof2f7u8rsv8H0Sw-7CMKVlv4HfXMhM5s4L6xZE6-DxYvzi2EWRJkqIh4ebfxsPHar3M0cG8Y8RgmfakbI7Jzh0kETPrDlp9vnZeJ_e_9_Iy0OFc3t6AuypqPbERjtyGQx7dNYNIjTDlPdXMgpbn4TRkJf0_qDMPBX3kxgrQC0qq1iLyXMW9z4D6hcgeGbfsU3Oh7VBZKiIEkmTX90icrY2kR1WlbIPyaaGcvUYcr8Sk3C3lsYejnhjYwtQ%3D)

clean_body: I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. | Peter, Today in America, politicians pit American against American. Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural. I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie. I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast. I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got real fast. I'm from a working-class family. I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape. Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... if you work hard enough. Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it. You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982. I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL. My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, my heart was always in Georgia. And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country. Unfortunately, a Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term. The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as Democrats take our country down the wrong path. That's why I'm running for the United States Senate. I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream. I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too. Very Respectfully, Herschel Walker P.S. The Democrats in Washington are going to unleash everything they've got to defeat me, so I need you on my team. Thank you. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

Voters in Virginia - who overwhelmingly voted for President Biden in 2020 - have had enough.

Yesterday's sweep of Republican victories in Virginia is great news for the upcoming 2022 elections. _**We have the momentum to win in just over a year!**_

Take a look at my reaction to the election results from Virginia:

But Fellow Conservative, we can't take this 'red wave' win in Virginia for granted. We must continue to recruit supporters to Team Herschel in the upcoming months.

If anything, Democrats are going to see their losses in Virginia as a reason to invest more in next year's key Senate races. Our Democrat opponent says he is "the most vulnerable Democrat Senator," so you know Democrat Super PACs and donors are going to spend tens of millions to keep their Senate majority.

clean_body: Take a look at my reaction to the election results from Virginia: | Fellow Conservative - These headlines say it all. Voters in Virginia - who overwhelmingly voted for President Biden in 2020 - have had enough. They've had enough of the failed policies of Washington that's leading to soaring inflation, open borders, and a struggling economy. Yesterday's sweep of Republican victories in Virginia is great news for the upcoming 2022 elections. We have the momentum to win in just over a year! Take a look at my reaction to the election results from Virginia: But Fellow Conservative, we can't take this 'red wave' win in Virginia for granted. We must continue to recruit supporters to Team Herschel in the upcoming months. If anything, Democrats are going to see their losses in Virginia as a reason to invest more in next year's key Senate races. Our Democrat opponent says he is "the most vulnerable Democrat Senator," so you know Democrat Super PACs and donors are going to spend tens of millions to keep their Senate majority. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: American Update
subject: Let's change course before it’s too late
body:
You are an informed citizen—I believe that wholeheartedly. You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren’t afraid to stand up for America’s founding and the principles of liberty that define our nation. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8059%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=rjZgj8FO0K2aXrtvS%2bhrXA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17795%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hkxAfDpVUv2h15JavLMi2w&sysid=1)
---
| | Good day, fellow American. You are an informed citizen--I believe that wholeheartedly. You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren’t afraid to stand up for America’s founding and the principles of liberty that define our nation. _**[Your leadership and knowledge are needed today ...](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17796%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6VON8IEzAlbbQcip%2fIPpIA&sysid=1)**_ We need more citizens like you--_informed citizens_ --because America is at a turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism. The country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We can’t let that happen! That’s why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of Hillsdale College and our new, nationwide initiative--the **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS**. We are the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal of this new campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand
* WHAT the Constitution says;
* HOW it relates to current issues and events; and
* WHY the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to liberty.

If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people, that our education system failed. These are young people that “educators” deliberately deceived or who just haven’t learned about a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable. ** That’s because we’re seeking _1,000 people_ in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to _10,000,000 Americans_ in the coming year, and this initiative starts with you--YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what’s best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **National Survey on the State of American Education **today at the link below. Thank you for reading my email! [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/survey-informed-citizen/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17797%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JMny4PmXFuLSeGYN4t4Nfg&sysid=1) For our children, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: National Republican Polling
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
I’d like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very similar. Both were born in the late 1990s. Both had a
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zr2nj5vhlp4li298fjha0o8bjurjgtnjf0sn8d48_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c1h60oj4cth2bs)
---
| | Good day, fellow American. I’d like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very similar. Both were born in the late 1990s. Both had a very similar upbringing, raised in a two-parent home in a suburban neighborhood. Both went to public elementary and high schools, and both went to college and now have a four-year degree. In most respects, these young women are nearly identical—same background, grew up at the same time, and even had the same tastes in music and books. BUT, there was one significant difference. And that difference is vital to preserving liberty in America. The first young lady learned false narratives about American history in her K-12 education but especially at college. Her teachers and professors cherry-picked “facts” to fit an ideological (and frankly anti-American) agenda. She was taught political correctness and viewed our history through a lens of race, gender, and class. Her teachers gave this young woman a false and dishonest narrative about our nation’s history—a narrative that portrays America as essentially and irredeemably unjust. Absent any opposing viewpoints, she believed it and now repeats these misrepresentations daily to anyone who will listen—echoing what she learned in school. And when she’s challenged, she dismisses this criticism (and those who hold these viewpoints) as **invalid** , **hateful** , and even **racist**. Maybe you know someone like her. If so, I’m not surprised—I do too. What about the other young lady? Well, she received a complete and unbiased view of our nation’s history. At her schools, especially her college, she received an education that covered the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively. She understands the principles and meaning of the Constitution because she has read and understands the writings of Jefferson, Hamilton, and Lincoln, along with many other primary sources. Her studies allowed her to recognize that America is not a place of “oppression” and “injustice” but an **exceptional nation worth defending**. This young lady is an ** _informed citizen_**. She will never be one to go along with the crowd on any issue, and she urges others to consider policies and political debates from a constitutional perspective. **I ask you, which of these young women would YOU prefer in a position of leadership?** You can tell us your preference by completing Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the State of American Education** using this secure link: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/informed-citizen-survey/**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zlop744idh6arjh9johuskfb94t87bnuccled8po_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c1h60oj4cth2bs) This survey lets you share your views about the state of our country and how to change course before it’s too late. By participating, you will give us a glimpse into the “state of knowledge” in your community that can only come from the local level. The survey is part of our **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS.** The goal of this new campaign we’re leading is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand WHAT the Constitution says; HOW it relates to current issues and events; and WHY we must preserve constitutional principles if liberty is to endure. If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people whom our education system failed. These are young people that “educators” either deliberately deceived or who just didn’t receive about a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable about the principles of liberty and limited government.** That’s because we’re seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to 10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative starts with you—YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what’s best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **National Survey on the State of American Education** today. Thank you for reading my email, and I hope you have a wonderful day. For our children, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---

name: ICYMI News
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zekg2vq7gtmh62u57mjjkbg5qtkug86dklptclqg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c1h6cor6cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmmea0aa8ep6c0ue971opg47jafsl2i211vrtm4g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c1h6cor6cth2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo99ju6i377ehq90nf6fvubnpor7icialkave5so_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c1h6cor6cth2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
[**Visit ICYMI News**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zssuhlh9tj5lq396lmccpsjtlia4v0pejso7fso0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c1h6cor6cth2bs)

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to change your subscription preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmse23nvfrlffgfcn1q8to0js72qgtcodet0tpc8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c1h6cor6cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kpqn4djm69qb0sbkmuprcst4moqfbd5jmkrncst66uqrf9v0mnhiadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4lqu1cbhe1pef9t56eibcd7lmipradrmeej3fddnkcrr4tdnklprctbi6pr34t5ge5qbfctnkjhf4onlcdhn4dhhcdp76c32clhb8olgs5gbdcr6m4qj6p3gc5p77dbm61g76tbkcgp61oh5u)

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zao52kp610l8ha81vtfe3i29bvug1gdsh2sk9fs0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cdg64pj3cpjm49fg)

| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpm2bi0qqqb6148lidi295f0qoi92i1v29jftkoo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c1h6aob2cph2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqs5c2na3p73nlkkhvhcthpn8kvgf241bhfnv9hg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c1h6aob2cph2bs) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Lombardo for Nevada
subject: Who Is Joe?
body:
We want to take the time today to tell you about Sheriff Joe Lombardo, the candidate that is prepared to put his 30+ years of law enforcement experience to work saving the state of Nevada from Governor Sisolak’s failed policies.
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YFJhnGtQc96rucET8R3UBeoK22tf73ESZ9OyQMICcN_oh-ZsDaQ27-BzLQsS6dXcAjf0rJNb5lDYrGgA1Zd9IapGjnmhlxDNQbW9WDjp2SM64F5FvaedHjpJkeL_UL5dByOM-WWQNvN-31nWy-iT07Bp2O6AUbQL&c=7lnlchZUknAN_7fEiNfOHDotWPyU40-knqqj-zB3sNywJbb4giHhWg==&ch=BTo8lIlINLfL1Cgn6PBshk60Y1f_q7_fe6MWxtT6_lG1QfXmH3GfRA==)
---
|
---
| | Peter,

I want to take the time today to tell you about Sheriff Joe Lombardo, the candidate that is prepared to put his 30+ years of law enforcement experience to work saving the state of Nevada from Governor Sisolak's failed policies.
Joe's life of service began in the military, where he served bravely in the Army, the National Guard, and the Army Reserve in the name of protecting Americans both domestically and abroad.
From there, he began a career of protecting his community, something that he's done now for the past three decades - first rising through the ranks as a trusted member of the Las Vegas Metropolitan Police Department, and then as Sheriff of Clark County.
During his time as Sheriff, Joe was tasked with responding to horrific crimes including the deadliest mass shooting in modern U.S. history at the Las Vegas Route 91 Harvest music festival. Through it all, his leadership never faltered - Sheriff Joe Lombardo knows how to keep calm under pressure, respond to emergencies, and protect the communities he serves.
That's why we need to elect Joe as the next Governor of Nevada!
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YFJhnGtQc96rucET8R3UBeoK22tf73ESZ9OyQMICcN_oh-ZsDaQ27-BzLQsS6dXcAjf0rJNb5lDYrGgA1Zd9IapGjnmhlxDNQbW9WDjp2SM64F5FvaedHjpJkeL_UL5dByOM-WWQNvN-31nWy-iT07Bp2O6AUbQL&c=7lnlchZUknAN_7fEiNfOHDotWPyU40-knqqj-zB3sNywJbb4giHhWg==&ch=BTo8lIlINLfL1Cgn6PBshk60Y1f_q7_fe6MWxtT6_lG1QfXmH3GfRA==)
---
| As a lifelong Republican elected twice in Nevada's most Democrat county, and proven conservative leader, Joe has a plan to protect the integrity of our elections with reforms like voter ID. He will also stand strong for our Second Amendment rights, and veto ANY new tax increase.
And as someone with a background in law enforcement, Joe will put a STOP to the upside-down policies from Steve Sisolak that have put the rights of CRIMINALS ahead of everyday Americans!
Single party Democrat rule has gone unchecked in Nevada, and our state government has gone far-left like our neighbors in California. It's time we elect Sheriff Joe Lombardo to take back Nevada!
I wanted to take the time to close with I hope you'll join us in the mission.
For Nevada, Faith Jones @ Team Lombardo
---
|
---
| Lombardo for Governor | [Visit our website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YFJhnGtQc96rucET8R3UBeoK22tf73ESZ9OyQMICcN_oh-ZsDaQ2722oKRBJEdLF01XeKTbcTUcjlKkAJFPYwEKmKN9DktrPno7Z423WISJerwh_u1W6mN8Ts8HX7J_HgI_EB-hGTY21Ws1vazhdzA==&c=7lnlchZUknAN_7fEiNfOHDotWPyU40-knqqj-zB3sNywJbb4giHhWg==&ch=BTo8lIlINLfL1Cgn6PBshk60Y1f_q7_fe6MWxtT6_lG1QfXmH3GfRA==)

name: KathyJo Boss
subject: Extending Mask Mandates Is Unnecessary
body:
Let's Refocus on Children's Education
| | | |
---
---
| | |
---|---
|
Last week, the Mass. Department of Elementary and Secondary Education (DESE), extended mask requirements for our children in public schools until to January 15, 2022. The statement was issued by press release and no questions were taken.

It's clear, now, that state government is using the mask mandate as a way to push parents into making the decision to vaccinate their children, despite reasonable reservations parents may have with the efficacy of the shot and the fact that kids are the least vulnerable population - there are ZERO fatalities under the age of 18 in Massachusetts.

As a mother of two children, I worry about the long-term effects of these vaccines on our kids. There is no long-term testing and we know so little about possible side effects. Heart inflammation in young boys and fertility issues with young women are some of the problems we're hearing about.

The fact that our public schools have are using coercion to get to the removal of mask mandates is also a huge concern for me and many parents I have spoken to. Kids are at low risk of contracting or spreading COVID and wearing masks to school only suppresses their emotional and social development. Worse than that, masks actually increase the risk of respiratory infections and are proven to impede breathing. Mask wearing and vaccines should be optional - parents should make that decision for what is best for their children.
The U.K., Ireland, Scandinavia, France, the Netherlands, Switzerland and Italy exempted children from masks in classrooms and have not experiences more school-related outbreaks than the U.S.

Why aren't we following the science when it comes to documented proof that masks are not needed?

Please join our campaign in pushing back against these continued mandates on our children. Our Commonwealth needs to re-focus on the tremendous education gaps that have occurred due to the pandemic and stop wasting resources on forcing parents to vaccinate their children against their wishes.
|

---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---

The U.K., Ireland, Scandinavia, France, the Netherlands, Switzerland and Italy exempted children from masks in classrooms and have not experiences more school-related outbreaks than the U.S. Why aren't we following the science when it comes to documented proof that masks are not needed? Please join our campaign in pushing back against these continued mandates on our children. Our Commonwealth needs to re-focus on the tremendous education gaps that have occurred due to the pandemic and stop wasting resources on forcing parents to vaccinate their children against their wishes. | | | | | | == | | | | | | | | Diehl for Massachusetts | 7 Cataumet Street, Worcester, MA 01606 | | Sent by mailto:info@geoffdiehl.com in collaboration with |

---
Peter - These headlines say it all.

Voters in Virginia - who overwhelmingly voted for President Biden in 2020 - have had enough.

They've had enough of the failed policies of Washington that's leading to soaring inflation, open borders, and a struggling economy.

Yesterday's sweep of Republican victories in Virginia is great news for the upcoming 2022 elections. _**We have the momentum to win in just over a year!**_

Take a look at my reaction to the election results from Virginia:

[ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58688527:6EhOgz2KN:m:1:3298722022:CA5C0D768465A3CE335C914E1E7F3057:r)
But Peter, we can't take this 'red wave' win in Virginia for granted. We must continue to recruit supporters to Team Herschel in the upcoming months.

If anything, Democrats are going to see their losses in Virginia as a reason to invest more in next year's key Senate races. Our Democrat opponent says he is "the most vulnerable Democrat Senator," so you know Democrat Super PACs and donors are going to spend tens of millions to keep their Senate majority.

name: Marco Rubio
subject: I hope you read this...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
This is difficult for me to write.
|
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58688838:6nvGQn2NO:m:1:3253819041:D42B3205E26574AB6CB4B4C3BD9B37C9:r "Gif")
---
| | | [SEND IMMEDIATE HELP >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58688838:6nvGQn2NO:m:1:3253819041:D42B3205E26574AB6CB4B4C3BD9B37C9:r "SEND IMMEDIATE HELP >>")
---

Peter,

**This is difficult for me to write.**

It's Marco Rubio, and I just can't believe that there is more support for a Trump Impeachment Manager than for a strong Conservative leader.

Despite all of our best efforts, we fell off track to reach our goal for October. Now, I have extended my end of month deadline since we got outraised, and to be honest, we are about 4,500 donations behind our target.
**[My entire team is calling, texting, emailing and writing to as many patriots as possible in an effort to activate 4,500 donors before the deadline, but I'm afraid it won't be enough.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58688838:6nvGQn2NO:m:1:3253819041:D42B3205E26574AB6CB4B4C3BD9B37C9:r "My entire team is calling, texting, emailing and writing to as many patriots as possible in an effort to activate 4,500 donors before the
deadline, but I'm afraid it won't be enough.")**
These goals aren't arbitrary. These are **REAL goals** and **REAL numbers** that we **REALLY need to hit** in order to have a shot at competing with Democrats who want to hold the Senate and reshape America.

I'm pleading with you, even if it is $8...will you donate today? Maybe people think they need to write huge checks in order to make a difference but that's just not true. I need people who can donate $8, $10, $12.55 or even $17 today in order to reach my goal.
---
| | | [MAKE A DIFFERENCE >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58688838:6nvGQn2NO:m:1:3253819041:D42B3205E26574AB6CB4B4C3BD9B37C9:r "MAKE A DIFFERENCE >>")
---
I know you hear from my team and me a lot, but this is critical. We are on the brink of losing Trump's home state to someone who votes with the Socialist Squad 94% of the time. I hope you understand how deeply concerning that is.

Here is a special link my team put together for you. I hope to see your name on the donor list, and I appreciate you taking the time to read this.
**[https://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/extended-deadline-message-from-marco/?link-for-Peter](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58688838:6nvGQn2NO:m:1:3253819041:D42B3205E26574AB6CB4B4C3BD9B37C9:r "https://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/extended-deadline-message-from-marco/?link-for-data-amp-placeholder-2-amp-end")**
Thank you for your continued support,
Marco Rubio

---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58688839:6nvGQn2NO:m:1:3253819041:D42B3205E26574AB6CB4B4C3BD9B37C9:r "MarcoRubioFooter")
---
| _Personal note from Marco Rubio:_

Peter, thank you for standing with me and having my back every step of the way. But I need you to stand with me once again.

Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever, CNN said my race was even MORE likely to flip blue, and now my opponent has outraised me. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

If you stand with me, **[please click here to donate now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58688839:6nvGQn2NO:m:1:3253819041:D42B3205E26574AB6CB4B4C3BD9B37C9:r "please click
here to donate now")**.

Thank you for everything you do,

Marco Rubio

name: Lee Zeldin, Candidate for New York Governor
subject: Update from Virginia...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZELDIN FOR NEW YORK
body:
Glenn Youngkin won! States that just a short time ago were completely written off as solid blue are now very much up for grabs.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zca2b9egqte8ad3kc4n43f298m03efg8onl7n180_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c1j60o74c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t5kespb9pr6e9rrecbkshj69cbnc9ibadhge8pn8t1jmpjr0sj5eljjeojn6tg6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pbcphkcapm0ptnc5j3co5ic8r749fg)

---
| Friend,

Glenn Youngkin won!

**States that just a short time ago were completely written off as solid blue are now very much _up for grabs._**

That’s a reality that the entire country is now starting to realize, and it means our mission to Save New York can be a once in a lifetime opportunity. **Democrat rule has resulted in crime spikes in our streets, indoctrination and brainwashing in our schools, and “my way or the highway” mandates that threaten our livelihoods. The American people have grown so fed up that even states like New York and Virginia have come into play!**

[**So let’s carry this wave of enthusiasm right now to the Empire State, and show more than ever before that we’re ALL IN to restore New York to glory!**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zh5kte3hma37mlhqke21029s9d5stlnp722uvspo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c1j60o74c3h2bs)
---
| [BRING THIS SUCCESS TO NY!](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpclu9sdhvieu1l6jkdvcs5lb7re5v5slvu91rqo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c1j60o74c3h2bs "BRING THIS SUCCESS TO NY!")
---
| We may never get a moment like this ever again...

Democrat Terry McAuliffe called in all the reinforcements: Joe Biden, Barack Obama, Kamala Harris, Stacey Abrams and others to try and rally Democrats to the polls.

But the momentum was behind Glenn Youngkin, because of folks like you who believe in parents’ rights in the classroom, safe streets, and freedom over heavy-handed government control.

[**_Will you help build on this momentum?_**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr3krn5bvle0p916ea78im86q0pvgr8t1fc0knng_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c1j60o74c3h2bs)

A contribution today will help our historic campaign here in New York reach out to more voters, boost our advertising, and take every other necessary step to have a strong showing just like the one we witnessed tonight in Virginia. Thank you in advance for your support!

subject: Thanks for signing up!

body:
I’m so glad you’re on the team.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38283629/314774189/298336521?refcode=EM_C_210708WelcomeTriggerSeries_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTRjZTg4MS03NTNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TxUTOWCoaLfDJQV6SM5vxoyPhc-d-VY67lmJ6U9jx3k=)

Welcome to the team! I’m so glad you’re on board.

I’m a businessperson, economic policy expert, and 6th generation Missourian.

I was motivated to run by the attack on the Capitol on **January 6th**. I was shocked by the failure of Congressional Republicans, _like Ann Wagner_ , to stand up to this assault on our democracy.

Instead of waiting for things to get better, I decided to take action and run for office.

I am fighting to:
* Help people get back to work in Missouri.
* End Washington dysfunction.
* Support small businesses.

We need brave, decisive leaders who will work with both parties to get things done for Missouri. I’m ready to listen to the people of Missouri and go to work for the second district.

Thanks for joining the team. I’m glad you’re in this fight along with me.
Best,
Ben Samuels
[**www.samuelsforcongress.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38283631/314774191/342101651?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTRjZTg4MS03NTNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TxUTOWCoaLfDJQV6SM5vxoyPhc-d-VY67lmJ6U9jx3k=&emci=10690b61-43f1-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=6e4ce881-753d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14943358)

| | | There are only 50 "_Let 's Go, Brandon_" shirts left!

Conservatives across the nation are ordering their shirts to stand up against Joe Biden and Big Tech censorship by the boatload, _AND WE 'RE STRUGGLING TO KEEP UP WITH THE DEMAND. _

**Stand against the Radical Left today by claiming your shirt before they run out!**

---
_Just Chip in $10 for Shipping!_
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Stop Big Tech (via House GOP)
Date: Wed, Oct 20, 2021 at 3:30 PM
Subject: CENSORED: Let's Go Brandon!

---
**ALERT: You have (1) "Let's Go Brandon" shirt on hold until 11:59 PM**
Attention Patriot, Big Tech is now censoring social posts related to anti-Joe Biden "Let's Go Brandon!" chant. This is an absolute outrage!

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58691216:66I5kn2NU:m:1:3299561967:8BF8BAF5AFE2FE91B4D1CCDB16B46924:r "LET'S GO BRANDON!")
---

**First** ... they censored Trump.
**Then** ... they censored Conservative allies.
**NOW** ... they're censoring our right to say "Let's Go Brandon!" ** To FIGHT BACK against the Radical Left and Big Tech, we are offering you a chance to claim our brand-new "Let's Go Brandon!" shirt. It's FREE you just need to chip in for shipping!**
---

---

The Radical Left has censored and canceled too much for us to even keep up with. We need to fight back, and by claiming your "Let's Go Brandon!" shirt - you will be sending Nancy Pelosi, Sleepy Joe Biden and controlling Big Tech companies a clear message.
**We reserved (1) of these BRAND NEW shirts just for you** - _but we're running out FAST! It will only be on hold until 11:59 PM TONIGHT!_
**[It's FREE, just chip in $10 for shipping to get yours!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58691216:66I5kn2NU:m:1:3299561967:8BF8BAF5AFE2FE91B4D1CCDB16B46924:r "It’s FREE, just chip in $10 for shipping to get yours!") But hurry, there are only 1,000 of this specialty shirt available!**

_Just Chip in $10 for Shipping!_

**ATTN TRUMP PATRIOTS: TRUMP 'S 2024 RUN HINGES ON FLIPPING 5 SEATS RED!**

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She's determined to ERASE Trump's legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump will run for PRESIDENT!_

We're facing an uphill battle. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. **[Can we count on you to step up?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58691217:66I5kn2NU:m:1:3299561967:8BF8BAF5AFE2FE91B4D1CCDB16B46924:r "Patriot, can we count on you to step up?")**

body:

| Friend,
Almost a year into Biden's presidency and he still hasn't visited our southern border. His continued neglect of the border has created a crisis.
When asked why Biden hasn't visited the border, Press Secretary Jen Psaki breathlessly claimed Biden had "visited in the border during a campaign stop in 2008!
However, much like with every other crisis he creates, he chooses to ignore it and dodges accountability. This is typical of the radical Left. They will continue to create more crises for America and then tell us that everything is fine.
We need to let Biden know that he can't keep running away from America's problems. Would you sign our petition demanding he visit our southern border?

* Major automakers - from GM to Toyota are shutting their factories.
* Analysts are warning that Christmas, as we know it, may not happen this year.
* And massive food distributor, Sysco, says it's going to have trouble stocking grocery store shelves.

body:
Hey there --
My name is Sarah. I'm reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.
According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump's brand new social media site? Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... _But I just checked our re cords -- why haven't you responded? Would you join Trump's site?_
**Please choose one of the following options in the next 25 minutes:**
__
**[Yes. I Stand With Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58691573:6G1bpn28N:m:1:3298722022:502B0D0205A1751A2E69BBE9F5BA7287:r)**
**[No. I Don 't Support Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58691573:6G1bpn28N:m:1:3298722022:502B0D0205A1751A2E69BBE9F5BA7287:r)**
President Trump promised some incredible things for his new site:
\-- NO blacklists
\-- NO shadow-banning
\-- NO Conservative censorship
**This site is built BY freedom-loving Patriots FOR freedom-loving Patriots.**
But taking on the Silicon Valley Liberals is a MONUMENTAL task. President Trump needs to know who really has his back, and who no longer supports him...
[**So would you join? I would really appreciate it if you answered right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58691573:6G1bpn28N:m:1:3298722022:502B0D0205A1751A2E69BBE9F5BA7287:r)
Thanks in advance for your response.
\-- Sarah

name: Tom
subject: This is important, team.
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38286894/314787699/643573850?refcode=bpi_em_20211104_postva_ND&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjU0MDk2Yi03YjNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KZftURZiTr4k_shIgUHgyYtyM2GpKTJ5qkuC9xq2B34=)
Tuesday’s results should send a clear signal, Peter -- **we can’t take anything for granted**.

Governor Phil Murphy won re-election in New Jersey in a surprisingly close race. Meanwhile, culture warrior Glenn Youngkin will be the next Governor of Virginia — a state that President Biden won by 10 points. Terry McAuliffe received 600,000 more votes in this week’s election than he received in his successful race for Virginia Governor in 2013, but Republicans used dog whistle, racial politics to stoke fear and turn out voters. It is also clear that Democrats in Washington must finish the work on the historic infrastructure bills that will improve the lives of working families and demonstrate clearly that we are fighting for them.

Former Supreme Court Justice Louis Brandeis famously said in 1931 that states are “laboratories of democracy.” **All too many states with Republican governors have become laboratories of destruction.** As we turn to 2022, it’s imperative that we **_[invest in governors races](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38286895/314787700/643573850?refcode=bpi_em_20211104_postva_ND&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjU0MDk2Yi03YjNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KZftURZiTr4k_shIgUHgyYtyM2GpKTJ5qkuC9xq2B34=)_** to protect and expand progress in states across the country -- including right here in Maryland.

**This will not be an easy fight, Peter**. Republicans won three of Maryland’s last five gubernatorial elections, and the Washington Post called this race one of the most expensive in state’s history. But here’s the bottom line: Marylanders can no longer afford to have leadership in Annapolis that doesn’t represent our progressive values.

**We need leaders who know how to govern and take on tough fights.** I’ve spent my entire life in these fights -- from prosecuting police brutality and white supremacists, to holding corporations accountable for racist lending practices and wage theft, to defeating Donald Trump. **I’m ready to serve Marylanders as your governor, but I need _your_ grassroots support to get there:**

**[Will you chip in $7 or any amount before midnight to help power our winning campaign and ensure Maryland’s progressive values are represented in Annapolis?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38286896/314787701/643573850?refcode=bpi_em_20211104_postva_ND&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjU0MDk2Yi03YjNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KZftURZiTr4k_shIgUHgyYtyM2GpKTJ5qkuC9xq2B34=)**

As governor, I promise to use my experience to build a future where every kid has a shot at a world-class education, immigrants and workers have a voice and a seat at the table, affordable health insurance is within reach, and justice is equal for all.

Thank you for having my back,

Tom
** **
********[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38286897/314787702/643573850?refcode=bpi_em_20211104_postva_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjU0MDk2Yi03YjNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KZftURZiTr4k_shIgUHgyYtyM2GpKTJ5qkuC9xq2B34=)********

Tom Perez for Maryland

TAKOMA PARK, MD 20913-5389

Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/f2d11a4e-2a3c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/df54096b-7b3d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjU0MDk2Yi03YjNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KZftURZiTr4k_shIgUHgyYtyM2GpKTJ5qkuC9xq2B34=&id=116402624).

name: BLUE SENATE 2022 (via MaggieHassan.com)
subject: 2022 is going to be difficult
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hi there, In 2016, Maggie Hassan won by 1,017 votes, and this week's election results made it clear that 2022 will be just as difficult. Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump, and their cronies are prepared to do whatever it takes to flip the Senate red, and **Maggie Hassan is their number one target.** So far, the GOP has spent _OVER $4 million_ attacking Maggie, and they're raising _hundreds of millions more_ as part of their plan to take back the Senate in 2022. This is a decisive moment for our campaign – with Mitch McConnell’s handpicked opponent expected to jump into this race any moment, an avalanche of outside dark money will inevitably follow. If we don't have the resources to match the GOP's war chest, it could tip the scales against us. That's why we need your help, team, to build a strong campaign foundation that will allow us to stay competitive and stand up to Republican attacks. **[Can Maggie count on you to chip in today? Just $5 from everyone who reads this will help us protect this vulnerable seat and keep our Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38287297/314789096/-1803038125?refcode=e20211104_bsu-2022&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjlkYTBhZi03YzNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rO9h-kSsBDKWhJflIqSiX6kdB-lMS3tG04C-PW1-Fbk=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38287298/314789097/-1803038125?refcode=e20211104_bsu-2022&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjlkYTBhZi03YzNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rO9h-kSsBDKWhJflIqSiX6kdB-lMS3tG04C-PW1-Fbk=)

name: Adam Laxalt
subject: BREAKING: Nevada Senate race moves to "Toss-up" as momentum shifts toward us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAXALT FOR SENATE
body:
Republicans are ready to FLIP the Senate!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58690965:Jtp-Ln2jN:m:1:3253819041:40A08B65B20706F5DA8D8462751024B3:r)
Peter,

In the wake of historic victories in formerly deep-blue Virginia Tuesday, Nevada Republicans are ready to flip the Senate as momentum shifts toward our movement.

Wednesday morning, the University of Virginia's Center for Politics - one of the most well-known political analysis organizations in the nation - has moved Nevada's Senate race from "Leans Democrat" to "Toss-up." Because I represent the biggest threat to their majority, Democrats are already focusing their false attacks on me.

This is a major sign of momentum and a clear recognition by the national media that Catherine Cortez Masto is on the ropes. [**Whatever you can give -- even just $1 -- we need your help to keep this huge momentum going.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58690965:Jtp-Ln2jN:m:1:3253819041:40A08B65B20706F5DA8D8462751024B3:r) [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58690965:Jtp-Ln2jN:m:1:3253819041:40A08B65B20706F5DA8D8462751024B3:r)
---

Virginia showed what we've known for a long time - especially here in Nevada - that parents are stepping up to fight for their children's education. They won't stand for critical race theory indoctrinations or efforts by radical liberals to get between them and their kids.

The results Tuesday are no surprise to those of us but if we want change, we must continue the fight and make sure our voices are heard loud and clear next November, just as Virginians made their voices heard Tuesday.

I am thankful for your continued support as we fight to protect Nevada. With your help - along with leaders like President Trump and Governor DeSantis who have endorsed my candidacy - we will be victorious.

Best,
Adam Laxalt

\----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58690966:Jtp-Ln2jN:m:1:3253819041:40A08B65B20706F5DA8D8462751024B3:r) A note for Peter, from Adam Laxalt:

Peter, thank you for your support as I take on the Democrat establishment to FLIP Nevada and the U.S. Senate. Our movement is off to a great start, but the battle has just begun.

Even CNN has rated my race one of the MOST LIKELY blue to red flips for 2022. It's clear, the road to the Senate majority runs through Nevada, but I need your immediate help to fight back against the Democrats' fundraising machine.

[**Help restore a Republican majority**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58690966:Jtp-Ln2jN:m:1:3253819041:40A08B65B20706F5DA8D8462751024B3:r)
Thank you for all your support,
Adam Laxalt
Candidate for U.S. Senate

[**DONATE NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58690967:Jtp-Ln2jN:m:1:3253819041:40A08B65B20706F5DA8D8462751024B3:r)
---

name: Patrick Clark, Keystone Progress
subject: It’s the end of the world for progressives.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

It would be easy for progressives to look around the country and spend the day cowered, sulking, and eating comfort foods while Beltway pundits claim we're toast in 2022.

We don’t have time for that.

Our biggest takeaway is that we must simply work harder, get more organized, pick up the progressive flag and charge forward towards the elections 12 months from now.

Help us restart the fight for progressive values for 2022 by becoming a monthly donor here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progressive-monthly?refcode=110421]

Don’t forget: There were some big victories - and some extremely close races that, historically, would not have been contests if it were not for our shared work.

As an example, Ed Gainey won election to become the first Black Mayor of Pittsburgh - an historic win and one built on a progressive message.

Tyler Titus only narrowly lost the Erie County executive race by less than 3000 votes, despite being the first openly Transgendered candidate to run there. The narrowness of that vote speaks to the progress we are making in organizing in Erie, as well in promoting inclusivity, openness, and inspirational new leadership.

Will you join us in pushing the progressive voice each month in 2022? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progressive-monthly?refcode=110421]

The bottom line is this: Every day we hesitate is a day lost. We have things to do including promoting our Progressive Summit sometime in the early part of 2022—an event that will go a long way to pulling everyone together and carving out a solid plan of action.

Is it the end of the world? No. We're Pennsylvania — we're used to working hard in tough elections under a national spotlight, and we know that we prevail when we fight harder and better in every election. We have to build that rocket, get up into space like Bruce Willis, and divert the damn asteroid before the next election.

Let’s go.

Make a monthly donation to Keystone Progress here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progressive-monthly?refcode=110421]

Patrick Clark
Keystone Progress

clean_body: Dear Friend, It would be easy for progressives to look around the country and spend the day cowered, sulking, and eating comfort foods while Beltway pundits claim we're toast in 2022. We don’t have time for that. Our biggest takeaway is that we must simply work harder, get more organized, pick up the progressive flag and charge forward towards the elections 12 months from now. Help us restart the fight for progressive values for 2022 by becoming a monthly donor here. [] Don’t forget: There were some big victories - and some extremely close races that, historically, would not have been contests if it were not for our shared work. As an example, Ed Gainey won election to become the first Black Mayor of Pittsburgh - an historic win and one built on a progressive message. Tyler Titus only narrowly lost the Erie County executive race by less than 3000 votes, despite being the first openly Transgendered candidate to run there. The narrowness of that vote speaks to the progress we are making in organizing in Erie, as well in promoting inclusivity, openness, and inspirational new leadership. Will you join us in pushing the progressive voice each month in 2022? [] The bottom line is this: Every day we hesitate is a day lost. We have things to do including promoting our Progressive Summit sometime in the early part of 2022—an event that will go a long way to pulling everyone together and carving out a solid plan of action. Is it the end of the world? No. We're Pennsylvania — we're used to working hard in tough elections under a national spotlight, and we know that we prevail when we fight harder and better in every election. We have to build that rocket, get up into space like Bruce Willis, and divert the damn asteroid before the next election. Let’s go. Make a monthly donation to Keystone Progress here. [] Patrick Clark Keystone Progress [] [] Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees. name: Bo Snerdley
subject: Winsome Sears: The Black Conservative LT. Gov the Left HATES>>
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEW JOURNEY PAC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58691705:66uprn2eN:m:1:3298722022:87822446326409AF1B6B6336ABACE793:r "Headline") Peter: [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58691705:66uprn2eN:m:1:3298722022:87822446326409AF1B6B6336ABACE793:r "Winsome Sears")**The next for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia, Winsome Sears, is:**
* A Woman
* Black
* Marine
* Conservative

**_If the Democrats were smart, this would terrify them._** They have spent generations telling black people and women that they can never get ahead unless the old white men in the Democrat Party allowed them to, but I think you know that they refuse to learn from their mistakes. Winsome is one of the thousands of Black Americans who have seen the truth and are ready to fight through their lies. **[2022 will be a massive Red Wave for Republicans like Winsome, but we need to start preparing NOW so Democrats can't stop great Black Conservatives from winning, like they did to our friend Larry Elder in California or Laverne Gore in Ohio.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58691705:66uprn2eN:m:1:3298722022:87822446326409AF1B6B6336ABACE793:r "2022 will be a massive Red Wave
for Republicans like Winsome, but we need to start preparing NOW so Democrats can’t stop great Black Conservatives from winning, like they did
to our friend Larry Elder in California or Laverne Gore in Ohio.")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58691705:66uprn2eN:m:1:3298722022:87822446326409AF1B6B6336ABACE793:r "Rush")You may not recognize my name, James Golden, but you probably know me as Bo Snerdley, the one-time producer and call screener for Rush Limbaugh. **Working with Rush for nearly two decades has confirmed the truth about liberals:_they HATE it when Black people in America dare to think for themselves._** I started the New Journey PAC to support candidates like Winsome - Black Conservatives who understand that the modern Democrat Party doesn't care about Black America and does nothing to help us. The New Journey PAC was all in on Winsome Sears, but our work in Virginia was only the beginning - **[the New Journey PAC is planning to give the same level of support to every Black Republican running for office, but we can't do anything if we don't have your support.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58691705:66uprn2eN:m:1:3298722022:87822446326409AF1B6B6336ABACE793:r "the New Journey PAC is planning to give the same level of
support to every Black Republican running for office, but we can’t do anything if we don’t have your support.")** Rep. Bryon Donalds, Rep. Tim Scott, and Joe Collins- these are just some of the Black Republicans we are supporting in 2022. We saw what the Democrats did to Winsome Sears - what do you think they will do to these patriots when they get desperate? [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58691705:66uprn2eN:m:1:3298722022:87822446326409AF1B6B6336ABACE793:r "Black Republicans") We have to be ready to FIGHT BACK. **[The New Journey PAC is leading the charge, and we need your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, even just $50 could make a massive difference in one of these races.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58691706:66uprn2eN:m:1:3298722022:87822446326409AF1B6B6336ABACE793:r "The New
Journey PAC is leading the charge, and we need your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, even just $50 could make a massive difference in one of
these races.")** **We can change the future of our nation by Making Black America Republican Again in 2022, but we need your help to make it a reality.** **[Please join us today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58691705:66uprn2eN:m:1:3298722022:87822446326409AF1B6B6336ABACE793:r "Please join us today.")** For a New Journey, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58691705:66uprn2eN:m:1:3298722022:87822446326409AF1B6B6336ABACE793:r "James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley")
James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley
Founder, New Journey PAC

body:
Hey there --
My name is Sarah. I'm reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.
According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump's brand new social media site? Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... _But I just checked our re cords -- why haven't you responded? Would you join Trump's site?_
**Please choose one of the following options in the next 25 minutes:**

**[Yes. I Stand With Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58691701:Jq7yrn2DN:m:1:3299561967:2C9A412E5D2657808923EF5A86F39CCA:r)**

\-- NO blacklists

**This site is built BY freedom-loving Patriots FOR freedom-loving Patriots.**

subject: 🚨 Sound the alarm
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Lynn for Congress
body:
Republicans are beating us in voter registration https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-flgroundgame [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-flgroundgame]Dear friends,
It’s time to sound the alarm. Republicans in Florida have outpaced Democrats in voter registration, and this is absolutely the top threat to our success across the state.
I’m proud to support Florida Ground Game, an organization exclusively dedicated to registering more Democrats in Florida.
Their expert team has selected targeted regions that will have the biggest impact in Congressional and state legislative races, not to mention our statewide efforts to elect a Democratic governor and cabinet. Pinellas County is one of their top targets, and I hope you’ll join me in supporting their efforts.
Please, my friend, will you donate today to help register Democratic voters? Your contribution will be split evenly between Florida Ground Game and our campaign.
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. This contribution will be split evenly between Eric Lynn for Congress and Florida Ground Game.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-flgroundgame?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10] Express Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-flgroundgame?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-flgroundgame?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-flgroundgame?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-flgroundgame?express_lane=true&amoount=250&refcode=express_lane_250] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-flgroundgame]In 2012, Florida had 500,000 more Democrats than Republicans, but right now, we only have a 24,000 voter advantage.
Republicans closed that gap through consistent work over the course of a decade, and if we don’t act now, they WILL overtake our registration numbers. We cannot let that happen, and that’s why we need to make strong investments in voter registration efforts right now.
Please, click here to support Florida Ground Game through a split donation. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-flgroundgame]
Thank you,
Eric Lynn

name: Tom Malinowski
subject: Can I tell you about my race?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress
body:
Tom Malinowski served as a diplomat in the Obama administration, standing up to dictators overseas. Now he's standing up for our democracy as a Congressman representing New Jersey's 7th district. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/7202eb1c-a59b-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef/d9ea3b29-803d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWVhM2IyOS04MDNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CjgSyjtBP-8f4nTz717_Kg_TSGzfi3RBVmVdim9RDGQ=&id=122888701)

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38289473/314793833/-911644977?amount=10&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWVhM2IyOS04MDNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CjgSyjtBP-8f4nTz717_Kg_TSGzfi3RBVmVdim9RDGQ=)

| | Friend,

I am honored to welcome you to our team! Thank you for joining in the fight and allowing me to stay in touch in the coming weeks and months.

In 2020, I won reelection in the narrowest margin of any sitting Democratic member of Congress — just 1.2%! So I’m proud you’re getting onboard at this pivotal moment to defend the House and the future of our country.

This cycle, our former opponent, Tom Kean Jr., announced that he's running against us again — with the endorsements of the leading pro-Trump Republicans in the country, Kevin McCarthy, Elise Stefanik, and Steve Scalise. We cannot afford to let the election-denying, vaccine-disparaging wing of the GOP win this seat and take back the House majority that enables us to deliver for our country, in the middle of President Biden’s first term. There’s too much at stake this election cycle and it’s important all of us are making our voices heard on the critical issues for the 7th District, New Jersey, and the United States.

We’re making progress in Congress, but we have a lot of work to do: restore the SALT deduction and fight for a fair tax system, protect affordable health care, invest in our infrastructure and build the Gateway Tunnel Project, preserve our environment and fight climate change, advance women’s rights, advocate for lifesaving gun laws, defend our democracy at home and restore our moral leadership abroad. I am committed to relentlessly fighting for the people of my district and to listening to them – in town halls, the grocery store, and on Main Street. As we continue to fight to win the battle for American values, I need you standing with me.

**Team, I can’t do it alone. That’s why I’m so grateful for your support.**
