name: Adam Schiff
subject: We can’t get discouraged
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek, The election results in Virginia were a deep disappointment. I cannot and will not sugar coat that. And thank goodness we pulled out the win in New Jersey. The party of every President since George H.W. Bush has lost both states’ governors races during their first term and we were fortunate to avoid that result in the Garden State. It’s clear that we’ve got a tall task ahead. Bucking the historical midterm trend and keeping our Democratic majorities in Congress won’t be easy, but it can be done. And we must get it done. Part of what makes it so challenging is that we are up against a right-wing media complex that functions as a kind of state-run media for the GOP. 82% of Fox News viewers believe the 2020 election was stolen from Donald Trump according to a poll out this week. And 97% of One America News Network and Newsmax viewers feel the same way. That's over two-thirds of all Republicans. That’s crazy. And that’s dangerous. **But we must not lose hope. We do not have the luxury of despair.** We must heed Virginia as a warning. If we don’t step up right now, and get our work done — passing both the Build Back Better bill and infrastructure — we risk losing our Democratic majorities in the House and the Senate. Period. End of story. Mitch McConnell becomes Senate Majority Leader and Kevin McCarthy, the Speaker of the House. Meaning, we can say goodbye to any and all attempts by Democrats to pass any meaningful help for families, progress, or change. _We can’t let that happen._ I refuse to back down. I am committed to doing everything I can to protect our majority and our democracy. **We have a steep battle against a right-wing media spreading disinformation and lies, and we need the resources to be able to break through. It’s not going to be easy.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38295901/314807980/-751938712?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211104_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODU1ZTQxMS04ODNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0NU-bFo-48m7BUZaNF2TM4rvCQJTyyk1pJ6NUf0vRv0=)

Tuesday’s loss was a setback but it doesn’t mean our work is over. Rather, it means the fight to win the midterm elections is only beginning. And it is going to be the fight of our lives.
Our democracy remains fragile. But working together, I know that better days are ahead.
Thank you for your support.
— Adam

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Those Who Never Give An Inch
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
|
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58692154:Jy2Pmn2NC:m:1:3299561967:E6D0F97A4BEA644FB52E61061E21604F:r)
---
I recently started an organization committed to electing more principled, America First conservatives in races all across the country.

So what type of candidates are we looking to support? _People who never give an inch to the radical Left._
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58692154:Jy2Pmn2NC:m:1:3299561967:E6D0F97A4BEA644FB52E61061E21604F:r)
---
_**We need more leaders committed to defeating "woke" cancel culture and who are willing to put it all on the line to prevent America from ever becoming a socialist nation.**_

Even though I'm no longer Secretary of State, I'm still working every day to champion our American values and helping real Republicans take back majorities in the House of Representatives and the Senate. We are also focused on building conservative state legislatures and governorships. This is a worthy mission.

_**If we all stand tall, no one can cancel the America First movement. This is the fight to save America! **_

Our foundational ideas are under attack more than ever before, and I intend to stay in the fight. The focus, the fight and the desire to win is at the center of my work leading CAVPAC. **We will support leaders of character and integrity who are wholly committed to these same values and will work without fear to build our future.**

If you agree with this mission, I'm extending an exclusive invitation for you to become a part of our Conservative Cavalry!

---

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Will you add your name to stand in solidarity with striking Kellogg workers?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Friend —
There is nothing more powerful than when working people get together and stand up for dignity and each other.
That’s why I’m honored to have stood in the picket line with Kellogg workers right here in Lancaster, Pennsylvania, who are striking for better benefits and time off for vacations and holidays.
Kellogg’s latest move to slight their workers is only part of a larger issue — greedy corporate giants across the country have been making out like bandits for too long while their workers suffer.
That’s why it’s critical for us to protect the right to organize.
Ensuring workers' rights to advocate for better wages and safe working conditions is the only way to build a robust economic recovery in these still uncertain times.
**So it’s time for the Senate to step up. That’s why I’m speaking out today to demand that the Senate pass the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act to protect workers’ rights.**
[Will you join me? Add your name today to stand in solidarity with striking Kellogg workers and demand that the Senate pass the PRO Act now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38297029/314814339/581551981?refcode2=6ea24375-8c3d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211104-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWEyNDM3NS04YzNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TfWWOtvaPg5ihrzda0ZG21XWn74Jsb-q2YIQU_x4cq4=&emci=3966e04a-863d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=6ea24375-8c3d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=18034979)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38297030/314814340/581551981?refcode2=6ea24375-8c3d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211104-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWEyNDM3NS04YzNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TfWWOtvaPg5ihrzda0ZG21XWn74Jsb-q2YIQU_x4cq4=&emci=3966e04a-863d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=6ea24375-8c3d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=18034979)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38297031/314814341/581551981?refcode2=6ea24375-8c3d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211104-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWEyNDM3NS04YzNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TfWWOtvaPg5ihrzda0ZG21XWn74Jsb-q2YIQU_x4cq4=&emci=3966e04a-863d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=6ea24375-8c3d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=18034979)
The PRO Act will help protect workers’ rights by updating outdated national labor laws to strengthen collective bargaining efforts and expand protections for more workers.
It passed with bipartisan support in the House, and it's time for the Senate to send it to President Biden's desk.
So I hope you’ll take action today by signing our petition. If enough of us speak up, I know we can make real progress for working families like yours and mine.
Thanks,
Malcolm
**PS:** The workers on the picket line need our support! [Click here to learn five ways you can support the #KelloggStrike.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38297032/314814342/935209370?refcode=em211104-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWEyNDM3NS04YzNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TfWWOtvaPg5ihrzda0ZG21XWn74Jsb-q2YIQU_x4cq4=&emci=3966e04a-863d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=6ea24375-8c3d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=18034979)

**Then** ... they censored Conservative allies.
**NOW** ... they're censoring our right to say "Let's Go Brandon!" ** To FIGHT BACK against the Radical Left and Big Tech, we are offering you a chance to claim our brand-new "Let's Go Brandon!" shirt. It's FREE you just need to chip in for shipping!**

name: Eddie Geller
subject: The cold hard facts
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38297419/314816057/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211104SFvotes_EG_main_NOtop_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWQ3M2U2OS04ZTNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GqjRKVIFNbx3rt3ryZ-Vhucz4EXjhMqZPiAbSC5pxiw=)
---
There's no way around it, friend: The results of this past Tuesday night — in Virginia and elsewhere across the country — are proof that this is an all-hands-on-deck moment. So, no clever words or funny bits from me today, just the cold hard facts of why this campaign is so important.
My opponent, Rep. Scott Franklin, voted:
_**NO**_ on impeaching the man who incited the Capitol insurrection.
_**NO**_ on protecting voting rights for all Americans.
_**NO**_ on climate reform while the planet burns and oceans rise higher every day.
_**NO**_ on funding to help our country recover from the COVID-19 pandemic.
_**YES**_ to decertifying the 2020 election, disenfranchising 80+ million voters, and validating conspiracy theories birthed on the darkest parts of the internet.
Would I like to lighten this up a bit with a well-timed riposte? You bet I would. But the fact is, we’re in deep, deep trouble if we let a politician like Scott Franklin win another term to Congress.
[Will you make a donation to help us flip this seat, replace conspiracy theories with real leadership, and do our part so that Democrats can hold the House?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38297420/314816060/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211104SFvotes_EG_main_NOtop_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWQ3M2U2OS04ZTNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GqjRKVIFNbx3rt3ryZ-Vhucz4EXjhMqZPiAbSC5pxiw=)

clean_body: | | = There's no way around it, friend: The results of this past Tuesday night — in Virginia and elsewhere across the country — are proof that this is an all-hands-on-deck moment. So, no clever words or funny bits from me today, just the cold hard facts of why this campaign is so important. My opponent, Rep. Scott Franklin, voted: NO on impeaching the man who incited the Capitol insurrection. NO on protecting voting rights for all Americans. NO on climate reform while the planet burns and oceans rise higher every day. NO on funding to help our country recover from the COVID-19 pandemic. YES to decertifying the 2020 election, disenfranchising 80+ million voters, and validating conspiracy theories birthed on the darkest parts of the internet. Would I like to lighten this up a bit with a well-timed riposte? You bet I would. # **Friend — Joe Biden’s tyrannical regime is still trying to use the full power of the federal government to mandate vaccines for servicemembers, federal contractors, and private businesses.**

---
Making Americans choose between their job and a vaccine is counterproductive, authoritarian, and un-American. It will make inflation worse. It will make unemployment worse. And it will cripple entire industries. I’ve been the loudest voice against this insanity. I’ve introduced bills to stop veterans from being treated like felons for refusing a vaccine and to bar federal funding of the mandate. **Taking back the U.S. Senate is essential if we’re going to stop this tyranny from ruining our economy and ending individual liberty.[Chip in $22 now to help us get this done.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/16bf8f70b2d3b175/1f8b9887430a50f4c3d6b838967d376c/37973)**

subject: Tuesday's election.
body:
We can hold the House in 2022 and win races up and down the ballot. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38297562/314816949/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWE5ODZkZS04ZjNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gj1AQ-6Y-Xtn3PSguOzmYVebHyvIoh2mOxZzBwhyj3U=)
Friend,

I wanted to let the dust settle a bit before commenting on Tuesday's elections in Virginia and New Jersey. Here are my thoughts:

**If we focus on economic issues, and deliver investments in education, childcare, and healthcare for working families, voters will turn out enthusiastically and we will not only hold the House in 2022, but we’ll win up and down the ballot!** We must also point out the GOP’s failure to join us and help working Americans, and that we need to build consensus and deliver results that focus on solving economic challenges.

Even though it's slim, Democrats have a trifecta in Washington DC and need to use it to pass the Build Back Better Act. The American people are seeing the ultra-wealthy get richer and richer while working families continue to struggle. Passing this legislation will be a clear signal that Democrats are committed to working families and solving problems.

Here in Austin, Texas we have work to do and our race is just three months away. We must take our popular economic message and meet voters at their doors. We're even more dedicated and energized after Tuesday to move things forward, and I know we can do that with your help. That's why we're asking:

[**Your support means we can turn out more Democrats and undecided voters with our strong economic message. With our campaign ramping up, I'm hoping you'll consider donating $3 to help us double down today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38297563/314816950/1898666321?refcode=em-11421-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWE5ODZkZS04ZjNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gj1AQ-6Y-Xtn3PSguOzmYVebHyvIoh2mOxZzBwhyj3U=)

Thanks in advance,

clean_body: We can hold the House in 2022 and win races up and down the ballot. | = Friend, I wanted to let the dust settle a bit before commenting on Tuesday's elections in Virginia and New Jersey. Here are my thoughts: If we focus on economic issues, and deliver investments in education, childcare, and healthcare for working families, voters will turn out enthusiastically and we will not only hold the House in 2022, but we’ll win up and down the ballot! We must also point out the GOP’s failure to join us and help working Americans, and that we need to build consensus and deliver results that focus on solving economic challenges. Even though it's slim, Democrats have a trifecta in Washington DC and need to use it to pass the Build Back Better Act. The American people are seeing the ultra-wealthy get richer and richer while working families continue to struggle. Passing this legislation will be a clear signal that Democrats are committed to working families and solving problems. Here in Austin, Texas we have work to do and our race is just three months away. We must take our popular economic message and meet voters at their doors. We're even more dedicated and energized after Tuesday to move things forward, and I know we can do that with your help. That's why we're asking: = Thanks in advance, Donna If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = | = Donna Imam is a computer engineer and Democrat running for US Congress in Austin, Texas. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38297849/314818831/956498204?refcode=EM_FR_211104newmaps_FD_CC_5_NG_TESTB_Logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTEwMWRhYi05MDNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bceaaIoGV5MN_v0Ko1cXGfs_iSeP20ZPKnEj2uPezL0=)

Ohio Republicans have done it again, folks.

Yesterday, the Ohio GOP introduced their long-awaited congressional district maps. At this point, I'm sure you're not surprised that the majority of the districts fall squarely in Republican control.

Splintering counties and cities between three different districts all across the state is textbook gerrymandering. This goes against the will of Ohio voters, and we need to fight like hell to demand fair districts.

**I'm ready to take this battle all the way to the Secretary of State's office to not only demand an end to gerrymandering but also to ensure every Ohioan has equal access to the ballot box and keep our election safe and secure.** But I can't do that if I don't have a massive grassroots effort supporting me in this fight.

**[So join me in this fight to protect our democracy and chip in $25 or whatever you can do right now. We have to demand better than the district maps we've been given. name: Hendrell Remus
subject: I Want To Say Thank You
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

Hi Peter,

I wanted to reach out to say thank you. We had a blast this weekend at the Three Star Dinner and felt the love and support from Tennesseans across the state, near and far. I was blown away by the show of support from our attendees, both in person and virtual. We completely sold out of tickets, which will help propel us into a successful 2022.

Another highlight of the evening was a Democratic gubernatorial straw poll. Each of the current Democratic candidates for governor (Dr. Jason Martin, Councilman JB Smiley Jr, and Dr. Carnita Atwater) were included in the straw poll, and all attendees were given a chance to cast one vote. Dr. Martin pulled through as the winner of the first straw poll in this race.

Whether you were able to make it to our Three Star Dinner or not, thank you. All of our supporters keep us going — whether you are able to donate your money, your time, or your vote, you are a valuable member of our team.

I also wanted to let you know the results of our Issues Survey . So far, the most important issues to Tennessee Democrats are:

1. Voting Rights
2. Climate Change
3. Healthcare

If you haven't taken the survey yet yourself, not to worry. Click the link below to let us know what issues are most important to you!

SURVEY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/9oCL0geEckKpnMpvZ7QsFQ2]Thanks for being part of our team,

Hendrell Remus
he/him
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]
https://www.facebook.com/tndem [https://www.facebook.com/tndem]
https://twitter.com/tndp [https://twitter.com/tndp]
https://www.instagram.com/tndems [https://www.instagram.com/tndems]

CAROL V. ABNEY, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.

name: Nick De Gregorio
subject: Thank you for joining our team!
body:
Dear Peter,

Thank you for joining our team. Our mission to bring unity and selfless service back to Washington will not be easy, but things worth fighting for rarely are. We are glad to have you on board.

Please be on the lookout for periodic email updates.

Semper Fidelis,

Nick De Gregorio

subject: Something you might not know about me.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38299541/314826723/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODJiYzhiNC05NzNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hT1HeYGoKFiIapVtqybKqiWseSCiqULmv1_BDLJeTPs=)

**[This is a long, but important email about how I was inspired to run for Congress. Please take a moment to read it, then consider chipping in $3 to my campaign to unseat Kevin McCarthy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38299542/314826724/-787496292?refcode=em-11421-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODJiYzhiNC05NzNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hT1HeYGoKFiIapVtqybKqiWseSCiqULmv1_BDLJeTPs=)**
| **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38299543/314826725/-787496292?refcode=em-11421-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODJiYzhiNC05NzNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hT1HeYGoKFiIapVtqybKqiWseSCiqULmv1_BDLJeTPs=)**
---

I grew up in a small working class town here in California where everyone knew each other. My dad was a teacher, and my mom was a secretary. They worked hard, but always made time for family.

At first, my parents couldn't afford to send me to a university -- so I started at community college instead. Like many students at the time, I paid my way through school by working part time.

For me, hard work paid off. But after 20 years of teaching students, it's clear that opportunities to get ahead for many others are being cut short by politicians like Kevin McCarthy.

Kevin has represented us for nearly 15 years with absolutely NOTHING to show for it except being a lapdog to Trump and his wealthy donors.

**I hear stories every day from my kiddos and their parents about the challenges they face -- while they work harder than ever, wages have stagnated and the ultra-wealthy are getting richer and richer.**

Heck, my family has had our fair share of struggles too, but like many families here in the Central Valley, you just learn to deal.

It's unacceptable that our current representative is doing so much to hurt our community. Despite the odds, we must do something about it -- that's why I'm stepping up to run for Congress and why I'm asking:

**[We're coming up $11,301 short of our weekly goal to DEFEAT Kevin McCarthy. That means we need to see A TON of supporters chipping in a grassroots donation before tonight. Can you kick in $3 today to help us meet the mark?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38299544/314826726/-787496292?refcode=em-11421-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODJiYzhiNC05NzNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hT1HeYGoKFiIapVtqybKqiWseSCiqULmv1_BDLJeTPs=)**

name: Senate Republican Update
subject: A rare opportunity
body:
Our end of month deadline was extended until tomorrow at 11:59 PM. This is a rare opportunity for you to support President Trump
_Sponsored message_
Fellow conservative, Our end of month deadline was extended until **tomorrow** at **11:59 PM. **

**This is a rare opportunity for you to support President Trump and Conservatives’ vision for America.**

We can do our part to elect a MAGA majority in the Senate that will put citizens like you FIRST, but not without your support.

name: Giffords.org
subject: (Did you miss this?) We’re suing the NRA
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
They broke campaign finance law and illegally supported candidates who support their agenda.
#

We wanted you to be among the first to know:
**We are suing the NRA.**
Today, we filed a groundbreaking lawsuit for violations of campaign finance laws dating back to 2014. We know the NRA engaged in a broad pattern of illegal activity involving violations of the federal election laws’ contribution limits, ban on corporate contributions, and disclosure requirements.
[**Want to support us in this legal fight? Make a $3 contribution today to help us fight back against the NRA’s illegal tactics and hold the gun lobby accountable:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?refcode=em211104-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1177_3935704_W-67b1&akid=1177%2E3935704%2EW-67b1)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em211104-1-15&t=20&refcode2=1177_3935704_W-67b1&akid=1177%2E3935704%2EW-67b1)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em211104-1-15&t=21&refcode2=1177_3935704_W-67b1&akid=1177%2E3935704%2EW-67b1)**

****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em211104-1-15&t=22&refcode2=1177_3935704_W-67b1&akid=1177%2E3935704%2EW-67b1)**

| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em211104-1-15&t=23&refcode2=1177_3935704_W-67b1&akid=1177%2E3935704%2EW-67b1)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em211104-1-15&t=24&refcode2=1177_3935704_W-67b1&akid=1177%2E3935704%2EW-67b1)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?express_lane=true&refcode=em211104-1-15&t=25&refcode2=1177_3935704_W-67b1&akid=1177%2E3935704%2EW-67b1)**
---
****
The NRA made as much as _$35 million_ in unlawful campaign contributions to Senate candidates and to Donald Trump’s 2016 presidential campaign. They exceeded federal limits and evaded restrictions on corporate contributions, and then falsely reported this spending in filings with the FEC.
**They did all this in order to elect extreme right-wing candidates who would never put reasonable checks on their pro-gun agenda.**
It’s time to hold the NRA accountable for illegal actions that corrupted politicians who were supposed to protect Americans from gun violence.
But remember, while the NRA illegally funnels money into campaigns, we’re doing the honest work to hold them accountable, and to elect gun safety candidates up and down the ballot.
[**Donate to help us do it.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-nov21?refcode=em211104-1-15&t=26&refcode2=1177_3935704_W-67b1&akid=1177%2E3935704%2EW-67b1)
Thank you for helping to save lives.
The team at Giffords

name: Ed Rollins
subject: It’s just the beginning…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great America PAC**
body:
Tuesday was a huge day for the future of our country. | | [](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=df8a1bb789ec4d8488c4cb2e1603f23f&_e=FQuHytvXsCUmDKm-YicYJ1ZStl5Y2n47hOoA0dk9fn1nQ02vNaWhx3SbrvcSMAmet8RSeOwtSTIzi66hjH6T2l25ES04-dWEG6kReV-c9eyhz97vH7IeONF794rj8ayIb2tlfVScAHe290RJ2AwtX59mOYmm3XSsfBpVZFCZpp6cOTcOmiEJ8cmpA1oRmLnikhMhg4K255T48VjfdZq1u5DFMGNw2pC220ChYiypbyJ4rGlRX9cLTQSZp8X5nttn7Q3nVjRa_9XO_hKJZGmOyoKn5goSrZSb8_E438sira9byKthYJvv0aNdX9ffi3f4KDFUm3K90isMggmnU8GZRXPW-z8H2ztcKaeLD_uAumF4IxvtAgJWW3DsdPDJi-qJ4XGNVE6HnRYDawYE0su6wA%3D%3D) | Peter,

Tuesday was a huge day for the future of our country - and it was just the beginning, with a rousing set of Republican wins in the Commonwealth of Virginia - a state the Biden Democrats thought was firmly in their hands, Peter.

GOP candidates swept the state-wide races for Governor, Lieutenant Governor, and Attorney General - and picking up seven seats in the House of Delegates, which they’ll now also control.

But this wasn’t just a normal state election, Peter - it had national implications from the start.

The leftist Biden Democrats brought back old Clinton power player and former Governor Terry McAuliffe to solidify their hold so close to Washington, D.C. - and Joe Biden himself came across the Potomac to campaign for him! But they spent more on over 7,500 commercials attacking President Donald Trump, who had endorsed Republican winner Glenn Youngkin, instead of addressing the concerns of the voters.

They still don’t get it, Peter - this was a gigantic repudiation of the globalist, open borders, tax-and-spend, skyrocketing prices and inflation, government overreach, and chaotic foreign policy of the Biden Democrats - but here at Great America PAC we understand it was the opening salvo of an historic reversal in the rapidly approaching 2022 Midterm Elections, now less than a year away.

That’s why we’re immediately bringing all of our tremendous influence to bear on keeping the momentum of this win growing into even bigger victories nationwide for Trump Republicans - and capture both the U.S. House and Senate.

[**But you know that all of our award-winning media efforts, America First candidate support and boots-on-the-ground activism, depends on the continuing support of motivated grassroots patriots like you.**](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=df8a1bb789ec4d8488c4cb2e1603f23f&_e=FQuHytvXsCUmDKm-YicYJ1ZStl5Y2n47hOoA0dk9fn1nQ02vNaWhx3SbrvcSMAmet8RSeOwtSTIzi66hjH6T2l25ES04-dWEG6kReV-c9eyhz97vH7IeONF794rj8ayIb2tlfVScAHe290RJ2AwtX59mOYmm3XSsfBpVZFCZpp6cOTcOmiEJ8cmpA1oRmLniZqsQ3_l0Iyoljskqf_1MwzFxLImxem2igEhgbOu70hzmc78AUh_5L-Sv9dJfEKt4OUKLgRdjiHAjz-tbfNjZcSqPVQ7qnK8fl4Q42y2dl2aUXm9iH_xoATQtLUTTm2mDhlqEgOFWZkM6J_yKwVUoc63I0G8D8EMmPB60QaGbuH-LyNQzme5ojzmyzxNN6hEYF289m2ghxlQaIe2CA-gIsg%3D%3D)

We may not be able to do anything about Joe Biden until 2024, Peter, but we can help deny him control of Congress, inform the American people about the lies coming out of his administration - and bring his disastrous socialist agenda to a screeching halt.

[**So please help us take this growing movement against Joe Biden and the radical leftist Democrats on Capitol Hill to the next level -- make a generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100 or even more to Great America PAC today!**](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=df8a1bb789ec4d8488c4cb2e1603f23f&_e=FQuHytvXsCUmDKm-YicYJ1ZStl5Y2n47hOoA0dk9fn1nQ02vNaWhx3SbrvcSMAmet8RSeOwtSTIzi66hjH6T2l25ES04-dWEG6kReV-c9eyhz97vH7IeONF794rj8ayIb2tlfVScAHe290RJ2AwtX59mOYmm3XSsfBpVZFCZpp6cOTcOmiEJ8cmpA1oRmLni0J6X-p3qFHEbvAjBNqVH_HsSw82lzHJT6oPVkhqGkQmz5aF9IkDk_Nei4XmpJNlPPxF7tGtmr5l5KOoCr_Bkm1WB_bQH5onTQHcIpDR6do-X7A4EYEDKlLB3HrWuUIxjjBL47w0aCZD8ovbV2AEA4uvgS59_mSR0ELRxY-iY8Q75ChTqzd1CVZTXRFNf5dKk64VMpvFfBEkv0ZvTIgVRRQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: Tuesday was a huge day for the future of our country. | | | Peter, Tuesday was a huge day for the future of our country - and it was just the beginning, with a rousing set of Republican wins in the Commonwealth of Virginia - a state the Biden Democrats thought was firmly in their hands, Peter. GOP candidates swept the state-wide races for Governor, Lieutenant Governor, and Attorney General - and picking up seven seats in the House of Delegates, which they’ll now also control. But this wasn’t just a normal state election, Peter - it had national implications from the start. The leftist Biden Democrats brought back old Clinton power player and former Governor Terry McAuliffe to solidify their hold so close to Washington, D.C. - and Joe Biden himself came across the Potomac to campaign for him! But they spent more on over 7,500 commercials attacking President Donald Trump, who had endorsed Republican winner Glenn Youngkin, instead of addressing the concerns of the voters. They still don’t get it, Peter - this was a gigantic repudiation of the globalist, open borders, tax-and-spend, skyrocketing prices and inflation, government overreach, and chaotic foreign policy of the Biden Democrats - but here at Great America PAC we understand it was the opening salvo of an historic reversal in the rapidly approaching 2022 Midterm Elections, now less than a year away. That’s why we’re immediately bringing all of our tremendous influence to bear on keeping the momentum of this win growing into even bigger victories nationwide for Trump Republicans - and capture both the U.S. House and Senate. We may not be able to do anything about Joe Biden until 2024, Peter, but we can help deny him control of Congress, inform the American people about the lies coming out of his administration - and bring his disastrous socialist agenda to a screeching halt. Are you ready? Let’s make it happen! Sincerely, Ed Rollins, Chairman, Great America PAC | | | Paid for by Great America PAC 107 S. name: Holly
subject: Let's take a look at what went wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38300863/314832968/1254848285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2YxZjI3OC05YzNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AACRPOR-qHqNX9_UagPqK7DcTlF3X8KvewsNVxtHm9U=&emci=fab36577-973d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=fcf1f278-9c3d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=23594672) | |
---
Hey Peter, I wanted to send a quick note about Tuesday’s election results.

If there’s one lesson to learn, **it’s that it is well past time we focus on rural communities.** When I talk to folks here in GA-14, so many of them talk about feeling forgotten by the Democratic Party. And Tuesday showed that.

We need to fight for something, not just amplify what we’re against. We need to unify our nation and that includes talking about kitchen table issues that are often left out of the discussion.

Our campaign is investing in our rural communities, and I sincerely hope the Democratic Party follows suit. We can’t just show up in an election year and forget about our rural voters the rest of the time. That just won’t cut it.

**People in rural America deserve good paying jobs, quality healthcare, and high speed broadband.** We deserve someone who thinks about us all of the time, not just when it works for them. That’s why our campaign is dedicated to listening to our rural voters, and amplifying their voices. Too often have they been forgotten.

Marjorie Taylor Greene doesn’t care about rural communities, but it’s going to take a lot of work to show that the Democratic Party does. **Let’s not make the same mistakes in 2022. **

Rural voices matter,
Holly.
|
---

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Holding the Corrupt Washington Establishment Accountable
body:
Judicial Watch continues to exert a powerful and positive impact against public corruption and unlawful government secrecy

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Throughout 2021, Judicial Watch has been building on the momentum gained on several critical policy fronts...and now our work is exploding.
Simply said, we're carrying our most significant caseload _ever_ , and we need to respond to increasing attacks on the rule of law by the Left. That is why **_[I hope you will make your best donation to Judicial Watch today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57061&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTExMDQxNDQwMjM=)_**.
Let me remind you briefly of just some of the things Judicial Watch has accomplished so far this year:
* **_We continue to lead the fight for protecting the integrity of our elections_**.
Our latest "clean election" lawsuits against **Colorado** , **North Carolina** and **Pennsylvania** over their failure to clean their voter rolls continue...and we recently scored two federal court victories in **Maryland** and **Illinois** that ensure public access to secret voter list maintenance information. We are also in the middle of our review of 2020 voter registration and Census data _that will likely lead to investigations and lawsuits in additional states_.

* **_We are breaking new ground in exposing the use of taxpayer dollars to indoctrinate our children in Marxist "Critical Race Theory_" studies**. Using state open-records laws we are informing parents and taxpayers how the Left is spreading this hate-filled doctrine into American classrooms...and how they are using our tax dollars to do so!

* **_We continue to lead the fight to overturn illegal sanctuary laws in court_**. Our multi-year litigation in San Francisco helped lead to important policy changes there...and are now pursuing a similar lawsuit in California's Santa Clara County

Clearly, we don't just _complain_ about voter fraud, or the evils of "**Critical Race Theory,** " or illegal immigration. _Our investigators and attorneys use federal and state laws to stop lawless government corruption by exposing the truth about what our local, state and federal governments are up to_.
This kind of thorough and persistent work is what Judicial Watch has been doing since 1994. **_Because while others in Washington, DC talk (especially Congress), we act_!**
That's why **_[I am asking you to make your best gift today to Judicial Watch](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57061&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTExMDQxNDQwMjM=)_** because we face chronic stonewalling and foot-dragging by Biden government bureaucrats who _hate_ government transparency.
And we regularly find ourselves in court facing open-borders and other far left-wing groups funded by radical billionaire **George Soros**.
After 27 years, we continue to be the one organization in America doing the important work of holding the corrupt Washington Establishment - _both Democrats and Republicans_ - accountable under the law.
**_[Your support contributes directly to our continued success](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57061&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTExMDQxNDQwMjM=), and it is your commitment that makes it possible for us to lead and fight so effectively_... _and on so many fronts_. _Thank you_!**
Sincerely,
Tom Fitton President
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57061&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTExMDQxNDQwMjM=)

subject: Celebrating National Native American Heritage Month
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZwWbMSc-epDWaQFNQI-E06hUVJPn5Z99nM1V0iqrteayj3HKdkJGQd1aVC7-MzMWbYwB9MI0EIPHx_ietKjwO7DrtfvWGV43NwxUPZZsrs9tTWV658Mb0hKOlfyBnBo27FlNF2VrUjS9gW8wls9iJwsxWoNnpyQx&c=WOj9AzCpaJGYNwVszf6uFqnGmpxeufLjoXApVL8cra2MEYX-h4q8pQ==&ch=JvM0KNjA59gvXBmgUqnPFPpVwcEzbPOxKoViWbJRCHTsoIZpCBk6ng==)

| [Donate Now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZwWbMSc-epDWaQFNQI-E06hUVJPn5Z99nM1V0iqrteayj3HKdkJGQXUK5FzR1rN9w0NBo41txOELfHKNPwiLkeLWRvTtEDnYpmB82FyC9lfLJDaLVMQrgHkijZCiObdvWYx_8gC6NXk6391dI-VakiJuN_nPe1IcGbQbDSkAXPKkc0Bb9OhmYF8Z1Gu7bI1AzV3lR90yZM0RnrY5CP6YZi8Va7BlQXpEw5eA_lEPRJqUaZGFVnmun8Kqi_ir56Ui&c=WOj9AzCpaJGYNwVszf6uFqnGmpxeufLjoXApVL8cra2MEYX-h4q8pQ==&ch=JvM0KNjA59gvXBmgUqnPFPpVwcEzbPOxKoViWbJRCHTsoIZpCBk6ng==)
---
|
# Courage, Strength and Valor
---
There is something special about the American continent which was embodied in the indigenous peoples who lived here before us. The American Spirit was alive in the freedom-loving Native Americans, and with courage, strength and valor they fought to preserve their freedom and way of life against British, French and Spanish colonists. Over time, the American Spirit took root in the settlers themselves when they fought against overwhelming odds to defeat the British Empire in the American Revolution. The breath of this Spirit inspired the US Constitution and a government "of the people, by the people, for the people" and nothing has matched the freedom of this continent in history. Native Americans exemplified the will to freedom, and many gave everything to resist encroachment upon their way of life. In their own way, they resisted the will of Empire, recognizing that dying Free was greater than living enchained. Now, the threat of Empire is once again encroaching upon the citizens of this great land. Regardless of race, color or creed, the threat of tyranny looms, embodied in a government that has embraced a Radical Left Socialist future, seeking to destroy the founding principles of this country and to remake it in a wholly different vision than that of the First Nations or our Founders. Now is the time to embrace the courage, strength, dignity and resilience of our Native American predecessors by resisting the tyrannical dictates of Empire. This is the new Civil Rights movement. It is no longer about skin color or gender. It is about our unalienable rights as human beings. I will stand with you against unconstitutional mandates and government destruction of your civil liberties. Together we will restore our government to one "of the people, by the people, for the people."
---
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
|

clean_body: We’ve got the Democrats on the defensive. | Peter, I’m guessing you’ve already seen the news... Conservatives just FLIPPED Virginia -- a state that voted for Joe Biden by 10 points in 2020. Pelosi knows her majority is on its last leg, which is why she’s going to step up her attacks against me and spend even more to try and FLIP my bellwether Florida seat. That’s why I’m counting on every conservative to help us follow up this victory with a surge of grassroots contributions so we can fight back and WIN BIG next year. No matter how they try to spin it, Tuesday’s results are a MASSIVE blow to the radical Left. The American people have made it clear that they want nothing to do with Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi’s disastrous agenda. But we can’t get complacent, Peter. We need to press our advantage and make sure we defend my MUST-WIN seat. Let’s make 2022 a red wave just like 2010. Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar Florida's 27th Congressional District Paid for by Salazar for Congress P.O. Box 431332, Miami, FL 33243

name: Mike Schmuhl
subject: Our work is paying off
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
Democrats are accomplishing this goal by showing voters how we're delivering on issues like expanding broadband, solving Indiana's childcare crisis, creating livable wage jobs, and fully-funding our schools for the first time in over a decade. We are sharing this news with Hoosier families and listening to folks everywhere we go -- regardless of Zip code or how their county voted in the past. Solutions matter more than partisan politics, and Indiana Democrats are getting this done for you. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38302018/314838481/624230061?express_lane_other=true&refcode=indystarrelease.fr.11.04.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTg3MGI5YS1hMTNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BlU21wAxQCovhpjsWZTEzF8QO-WzC9W8lFrJJnfNJMI=) In fact, some folks believe this strategy "could pay off" for us in the 2022 midterm and state elections. But here's the deal: we have to do more work and dedicate more time to make this goal a reality. I don't know if you saw some of the elections around the country earlier this week, but the results made it clear that Democrats can't just focus on particular areas or steer clear of others. We need an all of the above approach and that's what we are doing right now in Indiana. Democrats are up against a Republican machine where their only agenda rests on culture wars that spread lies and misinformation across Indiana. This agenda includes issues like Critical Race Theory (CRT). The subject is not taught in Indiana's K-12 schools, but they'll lie about it anyway. It also means they won't denounce dangerous extremism that's swept across the state. Peter, we're up against a group of Republicans that put winning elections ahead of your future...and ahead of your family's future. Those aren't Hoosier values, and Democrats will continue to be on offense until we're able to bring balance back to our state government. Hoosiers like you know Democrats are about delivering solutions to your problems, not creating new ones. The Democrats' 92-county strategy is indeed "the right move", and until every Hoosier has the opportunity at a better future, we will not stop travelling around the state we love to call home. Join us in the this fight. Chip in whatever you can to help us gear up for the battle that's ahead of us. And most importantly, support our candidates at the ballot box next year. This is a generational moment for Indiana and our country, and we need you now more than ever. Sincerely, Mike Schmuhl Chairman P.S. Some of you may have received an older email or two in error earlier this week. One of our major goals this year is improving technology to make our party more efficient with the dollars you invest. We just migrated to some new software, and during that process, some previously automated emails went out by accident. We apologize -- and should be good to go moving forward. To chip in to help up with even more technology enhancements, [click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38302020/314838483/624230061?refcode=indystarelease.fr.11.04.21&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTg3MGI5YS1hMTNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BlU21wAxQCovhpjsWZTEzF8QO-WzC9W8lFrJJnfNJMI=)! name: Mayor John Cranley
subject: The Public Utilities Commissioners MUST be held accountable.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
It’s time to fire the PUCO. | | _In the biggest bribery scandal in Ohio’s history, the Ohio Public Utilities Commission defrauded the people of our state to prop up a failing corporation. It’s time to fire the PUCO._

**[Add your name right now to support our plan to clean house and fire the PUCO commissioners so we can start fixing this mess and restoring faith in Ohio’s leaders>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38302281/314839695/-919743863?refcode=ea.2ed23b8b-a23d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ms=ea.2ed23b8b-a23d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWQyM2I4Yi1hMjNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QwkV_LTGc3jEL8CqfpYNB9ujs3ZP4FJ1oD3nRMmTtk8=&emci=db89f8bc-963d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2ed23b8b-a23d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=22604289)**
---
Folks —
For too long Ohio has been known as a haven for public corruption without consequence — and we won’t stand for it any longer.
Today, I announced that as governor, I will _immediately_ fire the five Public Utilities Commissioners who oversaw one of the worst corruption and bribery scandals in our state’s history and appoint a more balanced and transparent panel.
**_[If you’re with me, add your name right now to say you SUPPORT firing the corrupt PUCO commissioners>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38302282/314839696/-919743863?refcode=ea.2ed23b8b-a23d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ms=ea.2ed23b8b-a23d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWQyM2I4Yi1hMjNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QwkV_LTGc3jEL8CqfpYNB9ujs3ZP4FJ1oD3nRMmTtk8=&emci=db89f8bc-963d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2ed23b8b-a23d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=22604289)_**
Here’s the gist: FirstEnergy lined the pockets of members of the Public Utilities Commission, Republican legislators, and allies of Mike DeWine’s administration — who then tried to con hardworking Ohio taxpayers into paying hidden fees to bail out the company.
When you look at the facts, it’s hard to ignore just how rampant the corruption truly is.
Only weeks before being appointed as a regulator for Ohio’s utility companies, the former PUCO chairman received a $4 million payment from one of those same companies: FirstEnergy. That payment was a bribe for future favors.
Later, the former chairman delivered those favors — but he could only do so with the votes of the other four commissioners. PUCO shielded FirstEnergy from a mandatory review that could have hurt its profit margins, and FirstEnergy spent _millions_ lobbying for the passage of HB6, which propped up its failing power plants at Ohioans’ expense.
PUCO commissioners said nothing and did nothing as FirstEnergy kept reaching into taxpayers’ pockets to help pay their bribes.
**There’s no way that our current commission can redress the harm done to Ohioans. We need to take big, sweeping action to ensure that the PUCO is once again committed to serving the interests _of the people_ of our great state — not powerful politicians or corporations.**
Firing the current commissioners is just the first step. We’ll reform the system of nominating PUCO members to assure the appointment of competent, ethical commissioners, restore state budget cuts to the ratepayer watchdog that helps keep regulated utilities in check, and demand that the PUCO adopt strict policies to promote transparency and accountability.
Together, we’ll make sure that nothing like this ever happens again.
**_[Join with me right now and say that it’s time to fire the PUCO>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38302283/314839697/-919743863?refcode=ea.2ed23b8b-a23d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ms=ea.2ed23b8b-a23d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWQyM2I4Yi1hMjNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QwkV_LTGc3jEL8CqfpYNB9ujs3ZP4FJ1oD3nRMmTtk8=&emci=db89f8bc-963d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2ed23b8b-a23d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=22604289)_**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Breaking: Arizona AG Launches Investigation!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
It's happening! |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7e4cc5c179&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
Big news on the Election Integrity Front:

**Arizona Attorney General Mark Brnovich just launched a formal investigation into what transpired in the fraud of the 2020 election!**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3cef2a4fc5&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _Roger Geisler, a special agent, interrogated Adrian Fontes._

**Adrian Fontes, who is now running for Secretary of State to permanently secure Democrat control of our elections, served as the County Recorder for Maricopa in the 2020 election.**

The County Recorder’s principal responsibilities include keeping public records and overseeing voter registration and early voting. In other words, if you are wondering where the buck stops when it comes to election integrity in Maricopa, look no further.

_And I am glad to write to you today that our Attorney General is taking the evidence seriously, opening criminal investigations. Clearly, the allegations are not baseless as the Marxist media would have you believe._

**[And that is why I am writing you today.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=135a1b7a8c&e=44b8c466b0) We cannot let AG Brnovich think this is enough. If he stops here, then it will be a case of _too little, too late_.**

We must pressure Brnovich to continue to do his job and prosecute those responsible for the fraud in 2020. And we cannot stop until every one of these perpetrators is brought to justice.

_[Donate today to help us keep up the pressure on AG Brnovich’s office to make sure that the perpetrators of election fraud are brought to justice and Adrian Fontes is held responsible for the fraud perpetrated under his purview!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=04677ec515&e=44b8c466b0)_

**_“I will take all necessary actions that are supported by the evidence and where I have legal authority. Arizonans deserve to have their votes accurately counted and protected.” – Mark Brnovich_**
And we must hold AG Brnovich to his promise! He MUST press forward until every wrongdoer has been brought to justice. Anything less is a _disgrace to democracy._
**The fight for Election Integrity is long, hard, and essential. Every day we are fighting against media, political, and legal attacks.**

_The radical Left and the thieves behind the steal of the 2020 election have been doing everything they can to hide their misdeeds. [And if we don’t make sure they don’t do it again, who will?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4dc0829ffd&e=44b8c466b0)_

**[This is why I need your help. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=feceffaf38&e=44b8c466b0)**

After we audited Maricopa, we saw that there was obscene levels of fraud – more than enough to overturn the election, and those involved needed to be brought to justice. **And now AG Mark Brnovich is beginning the investigation.**

_We are pushing for nationwide audits to uncover the severity of the fraud while also pushing forward to Pima._

**Our approach has been and continues to be systematic, aggressive, and thorough. And we won’t stop until all the perpetrators of fraud are in prison and our Democracy is secure once again. [And I must ask you for help.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c47d1ab22a&e=44b8c466b0)**

**I desperately need your help in my campaign for Secretary of State of Arizona. The constant political, legal, and media attacks are draining my campaign. [To keep up the good fight, I need a rush donation of $25, $50, or $100 tonight. Can you help?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d728ff19c0&e=44b8c466b0)**
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a878dd9bcd&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=082d55023e&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, [please contribute whatever you can by the end of this month](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3d258683d1&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE

You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=3f456ca77a) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=3f456ca77a).

He MUST press forward until every wrongdoer has been brought to justice. Anything less is a disgrace to democracy. The fight for Election Integrity is long, hard, and essential. Every day we are fighting against media, political, and legal attacks. The radical Left and the thieves behind the steal of the 2020 election have been doing everything they can to hide their misdeeds. After we audited Maricopa, we saw that there was obscene levels of fraud – more than enough to overturn the election, and those involved needed to be brought to justice. And now AG Mark Brnovich is beginning the investigation. We are pushing for nationwide audits to uncover the severity of the fraud while also pushing forward to Pima. Our approach has been and continues to be systematic, aggressive, and thorough. And we won’t stop until all the perpetrators of fraud are in prison and our Democracy is secure once again. I desperately need your help in my campaign for Secretary of State of Arizona. The constant political, legal, and media attacks are draining my campaign. | God Bless You, | | Mark Finchem Arizona House of Representatives – District 11 Republican for Arizona Secretary of State Conservative Election Integrity Patriot P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, . PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE | | | Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Quick Update from Patrick Murphy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy Democrats
body:
| |
---
| Finishing 2021 Strong
As we barrel towards the end of 2021, I wanted to share our quick update on how our group is finishing out the year strong. If you have any questions or would like to be engaged in any way, please don't hesitate to let me know. Thanks for being a part of our team! - Patrick, patrick@patrickjmurphy.com Johnstown Veterans' Appreciation Breakfast This morning, Patrick J. Murphy attended a Veterans' appreciation breakfast in Johnstown, PA, representing the Association of the US Army. He joined local elected officials in celebrating the bravery and the sacrifice of the men and women who have done so much for our nation. Headstrong Foundation Gala For decades, Patrick championed mental health. This year he served as emcee of the Headstrong Gala in Washington yesterday, November 3rd, joining Marine Generals Jim Mattis and John Kelly in support of the group. Headstrong provides free mental health counseling in every community across America for military, veterans, and their families. Modern Military Association of America Patrick was honored to deliver the keynote address at the annual gala of MMAA, the nation's largest organization fighting fr the rights of LGBTQ servicemembers, Veterans, and their families. Although we recently celebrated the ten year anniversary of the repeal of Don't Ask, Don't Tell that Patrick authored in Congress, there are still many things we need to do on behalf of LGBTQ individuals in uniform. Troops who were discharged for who they love still don't have access to the pensions they earned serving honorably in the military, and neither the Department of Defense, the Department of Veterans' Affairs, or the Department of Homeland Security have ever conducted research into the specific needs of the LGBTQ Veteran population. KD "Flying into 2022" Join the Kennedy Democrats at the November 30th Philadelphia Flyers home game as our team faces of against the New York Islanders and KD gears up for the 2022 midterm elections. Right now, Republicans control both houses of the Pennsylvania General Assembly despite the Commonwealth having over half a million more registered Democrats than Republicans. We need to push for a Pennsylvania state government that reflects what our citizens actually believe. **[Can you help us raise money for our candidates?](https://act.myngp.com/el/mbTWIpwt6Vjk1On-K6DCTyMBtbyEDPdM1SjAUbssv0M=/8nxAO9sYqvqK9IyeAAJOZpfzlrSfNlGYgAYct6hUTWM=)** Palo Alto Networks Palo Alto Network's chief business officer, Amit Singh, recently interviewed Patrick for a discussion sponsored by their employee diversity networks. He talked about his experiences as Congressman, Acting Secretary of the Army, vetrepreneur, and cyber security expert. HFOT Day of Giving In the fall of 2017, Patrick joined the board of Homes for Our Troops, a private non-profit organization dedicated to giving back to disabled veterans after 9/11. Since its establishment in 2004, HFOT has built more than 300 free specially remodeled houses nationwide and gave them to veterans without a mortgage. Patrick had the opportunity to attend the Homes for Our Troops Golf Outing with this great organization and was able to spend time with many of our nation's veterans. The Murph To further remember those who served us and gave the ultimate sacrifice to their beloved nation, Patrick completed "The Murph" workout alongside US Army Reserve Captain Danny Ceisler to honor LT Mike Murphy. LT Murphy was a Pennsylvania State University graduate who became a Navy SEAL. Ultimately, he received the Medal of Honor for his actions and became the first member of the United States Navy to receive this award since the Vietnam War. Let us know if you want to do it with us next year - workout vests are optional. Hill Vets Patrick continues to help veterans who need it the most. He cares about those who offered their lives to their country, and for the good of our beloved nation. Patrick worked with the Hill Vets LEAD Cohort to share his story about how he spent his time within the government working as a Congressman. Patrick strictly carries out the idea of serving those who served for us and will continue to carry out this mission throughout his everyday life. Unfortunately, we have the least amount of Veterans serving in the US Congress since before WWII. He helps veterans and military family members get elected for **[Taking the Hill PAC](https://act.myngp.com/el/mbTWIpwt6Vjk1On-K6DCTyMBtbyEDPdM1SjAUbssv0M=/Fl-V-N61M8P0zDLcPZCfX3tDD0QnHX-6JRXwCn1yr5Q=) **(federal) and **[Kennedy Democrats](https://act.myngp.com/el/mbTWIpwt6Vjk1On-K6DCTyMBtbyEDPdM1SjAUbssv0M=/Ih_oA94crTaRYJl8cuDoj93YfsZWOflF8bEUaGqoJ1Q=)** (state). NACVSO Patrick was given the opportunity to deliver a keynote at the National Association of County Veteran Service Officers' 2021 Training Conference. His remarks focused on the value of the National Association of County Veteran Service Officers and how they use their resources to help veterans to the best of their abilities, resulting in veterans living a happier and healthier lifestyle Gathering of Heroes Day The Marine Corps LEF hosts an event called the Gathering of Heroes Day. Patrick was honored to speak at this event in support of veterans who served in wars both present and past; he took the time to thank those who guarded the great freedom of our nation. We'll certainly be celebrating with some of his favorite Marines at the Flyers game November 10th - the Marine Corps' birthday Flag Day Patrick celebrated Flag Day, June 14th, by joining the National Park Service in Philadelphia to conduct a ceremony for the flag and the veterans of our nation. Patrick also had the privilege to celebrate the birth of our nation's Army with members of the Army who served in WWII. here with General (Ret.) Carter and Mrs. Ham - former president of AUSA. Hiring Our Heroes Patrick had the opportunity to stand with Hiring Our Heroes, a nationwide initiative with the U.S. Chamber of Commerce Foundation that helps veterans find meaningful employment, at the Philadelphia Flyers and 76ers game on military appreciation night. 'Big Al', one of the great Army Veterans from the Greatest Generation of WWII, was granted a 76ers jersey in honor of his service and Patrick had the honor to gift the jersey to him. The Hiring Our Heroes Foundation has been providing services for veterans that have been extremely beneficial to those who served and continues to offer wonderful employment and professional growth opportunities to those who once protected the freedom of our nation. We'll honor his fellow veterans again November 7th at the (Eagles game), November 10th (Flyers game), and November 11th (76ers game). York Law Day Patrick delivered a keynote at YORKPABAR's Law Day event. The York County Bar Association (YCBA) hosts a Law Day event that celebrates the ways lawyers defend those who fight for justice. The YCBA has a purpose to serve the legal profession of lawyers along with the well-being of the York community. This Wednesday, November 9th Patrick will speak at The Legal Services Cooperation where they help give free legal services to fellow Americans who need help. KD Evening on the Delaware Event Kennedy Democrats hosted an Evening on the Delaware event, taking place at Patrick's home and featuring former Congressman Joe Kennedy. He delivered powerful remarks on the future of our politics and national discourse. Make sure to get **[your tickets](https://act.myngp.com/el/mbTWIpwt6Vjk1On-K6DCTyMBtbyEDPdM1SjAUbssv0M=/bHzftuS6ZRT_eQLTvZh3fxym6V5BVIlNJwakUEAfijs=)** to our upcoming Philadelphia Flyers event! TTH Women + Allies Event Taking The Hill hosted an event in Washington, DC, featuring and benefiting Congressional Reps. Mikie Sherrill, Elaine Luria, Chrissy Houlahan, and Julia Brownly. Helpful Links If you want to keep updated on all the happenings with Team Murphy, please follow my [Facebook](https://act.myngp.com/el/mbTWIpwt6Vjk1On-K6DCTyMBtbyEDPdM1SjAUbssv0M=/3J-bc9CQ3kYrCBQlRH3tz_kt5YdReJBaKb5wikQih2o=), [Twitter](https://act.myngp.com/el/mbTWIpwt6Vjk1On-K6DCTyMBtbyEDPdM1SjAUbssv0M=/MXb5-iI3BGbFn7FAPP3qA1DUf_JxiMuU49Uf6G1hYu8=), and [Instagram](https://act.myngp.com/el/mbTWIpwt6Vjk1On-K6DCTyMBtbyEDPdM1SjAUbssv0M=/IaWcHuDqu1uDMrUeZ20JRwir8OLzWUGCI1dyB4eQqgQ=) pages. For more information, check out my [website](https://act.myngp.com/el/mbTWIpwt6Vjk1On-K6DCTyMBtbyEDPdM1SjAUbssv0M=/zookG5a1iU4t86pEz4ImDoSBGlZH9gafZnBoC6lRpTo=). Thanks for being a part of the team!
---|---
Copyright (C) 2021 Patrick J. Murphy. All rights reserved.

Paid for by Kennedy Democrats
---
Kennedy Democrats
PO Box 2134
Bristol PA 19007 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/mbTWIpwt6Vjk1On-K6DCTyMBtbyEDPdM1SjAUbssv0M=/mwvYtX9DUtaDf4h2AqiLOHvE6zF4GLbnJZ4fqftWX4o=).

I know this isn't what you want to hear right now: _**but Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left have BUCKETS of money at the ready. Falling short of our goal simply isn't an option - falling short means we lose the House Majority for good.**_

name: Gary Black
subject: What do you think about this?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b95c4939899795ab/4633ed540b76df16c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
# **Friend — Unlike our opponents, we don’t take our cues from the Swamp. We’re listening to YOU, and we depend on your input.**

---
And I want to know what you think about Joe Biden’s latest scheme. He wants to use your tax dollars to give $450,000 checks to illegal immigrants. **I think this is insane and it must be stopped. How about you?[Take our poll here.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b95c4939899795ab/a32e7ea02e086fe1c3d6b838967d376c/37793)**
---
[**TAX DOLLARS TO ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b95c4939899795ab/eb6246f482462ec2c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Georgians and Americans are struggling with higher gas prices, skyrocketing grocery bills, and a supply chain crisis — all of which are a direct result of Biden / Warnock policies. Instead of changing course, Biden wants to spend trillions more. And he wants to cut $450,000 checks to illegal immigrants who broke the law. When I’m in the U.S. Senate, I’ll stand in the gap to stop this nonsense and to get back to President Trump’s border policies that worked. That means securing the border, enforcing the law, and finishing the wall. **It does not mean amnesty or citizenship. And it doesn’t mean incentivizing even more illegal immigration by handing out $450,000 checks. ** That’s where I stand. Will you let me know where you stand? [**Take the poll now.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b95c4939899795ab/e1ae8e15010379a7c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b95c4939899795ab/53714b7ba5581e2ac3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**TAX DOLLARS TO ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b95c4939899795ab/0b8c231eb4d2eb5bc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | _**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $10 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/b95c4939899795ab/d588fb4a0ab54850c3d6b838967d376c/37793)

We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. clean_body: | | | Friend — Unlike our opponents, we don’t take our cues from the Swamp. We’re listening to YOU, and we depend on your input. And I want to know what you think about Joe Biden’s latest scheme. He wants to use your tax dollars to give $450,000 checks to illegal immigrants. I think this is insane and it must be stopped. How about you? Georgians and Americans are struggling with higher gas prices, skyrocketing grocery bills, and a supply chain crisis — all of which are a direct result of Biden / Warnock policies. Instead of changing course, Biden wants to spend trillions more. And he wants to cut $450,000 checks to illegal immigrants who broke the law. When I’m in the U.S. Senate, I’ll stand in the gap to stop this nonsense and to get back to President Trump’s border policies that worked. That means securing the border, enforcing the law, and finishing the wall. It does not mean amnesty or citizenship. And it doesn’t mean incentivizing even more illegal immigration by handing out $450,000 checks. That’s where I stand. Will you let me know where you stand? Gary Black | | Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary: I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why. Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $10 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts. With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below. We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. name: Eden at Barrier to Entry PAC
subject: Paid family leave should be a right
body:
We’re tired of old men making huge decisions

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38303083/314843052/1300596418?refcode=211104_FR_paidfamilyleave
_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE4YzBkYWRmLWE2M2QtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=s0hYURVGJOt-3z9iTcs6ST2WvFefQIZoiSDbCTkQ-k0=)
---
Peter,

We’re outraged to say the least. The Senate voted against paid family leave. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38303084/314843053/1300596418?refcode=211104_FR_paidfamilyleave
_IMG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE4YzBkYWRmLWE2M2QtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=s0hYURVGJOt-3z9iTcs6ST2WvFefQIZoiSDbCTkQ-k0=) Why are we still letting 65+ year old men make decisions on what is best for women? And why is this a recurring theme in American history and politics? We cannot be such a big tent party that we allow this kind of crap. We are here to hold our own party accountable when that is what the moment calls for.

Stand with us in supporting diverse working moms who run for office— not wealthy, out of touch white women (like ones with purple hair *cough cough*) or old men who have no idea the hardships of being a new mother. We need people - and more specifically WOMEN - in office who recognize that the norms of our society have changed and new parents should be able to enjoy the weeks after birth without the stress of no-income.

We are one of the richest countries in the world and it’s an utter lie to say we cannot afford to pay working parents for time with their newborns. However, we can pour trillions into our defense budgets. We argue that this is not an issue of money but an issue of old men holding onto out-dated social norms.

**Let’s work together to ensure that families do not have to sacrifice their jobs to keep their families together.** **[I urge you to channel this outrage by continuing to fight back and help elect candidates who fit the ballot on these issues. Will you join our movement to get more young, progressive candidates in office who can change the standard of paid family leave in America?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38303085/314843055/-2038882143?refcode=211104_FR_paidfamilyleave

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38303190/314843441/21723500?refcode=em_fr_2021.11.04_b1_lm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2Y0ZGNkOS1hNzNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hk7vehPeLBx3bq0jD4YtdZ4egRMhWLCE1shsNMYHlxQ=) Hi Peter,

First and foremost, I want to say thank you for all the support over the past month. October has been a big month on the campaign trail, and it has all been possible because of supporters like you. Here’s what I’ve been up to:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38303191/314843442/21723500?refcode=em_fr_2021.11.04_b1_lm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2Y0ZGNkOS1hNzNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hk7vehPeLBx3bq0jD4YtdZ4egRMhWLCE1shsNMYHlxQ=)
_Joined the courageous workers of the United Auto Workers on the picket line in Waterloo._
_[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38303192/314843443/21723500?refcode=em_fr_2021.11.04_b1_lm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2Y0ZGNkOS1hNzNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hk7vehPeLBx3bq0jD4YtdZ4egRMhWLCE1shsNMYHlxQ=)
Toured Etzel Sugar Grove Farm in Marion with leaders from the Iowa Organics Association and Rodale Institute to learn more about new and improved opportunities for small farmers._
_[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38303193/314843451/21723500?refcode=em_fr_2021.11.04_b1_lm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2Y0ZGNkOS1hNzNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hk7vehPeLBx3bq0jD4YtdZ4egRMhWLCE1shsNMYHlxQ=)
Walked in the Especially for You Race Against Breast Cancer with my colleagues and team._
But most importantly, our district lines were finalized (we’re now Iowa’s Second District), so this race is going to be kicking into high gear. **Now that we know the ins and outs of our new district, it’s clear: This race is going to be one of the most competitive in the country.**

**[Peter, we’ve got new ground to cover and new voters to speak with, so we need all hands on deck. Will you chip in whatever you can to my campaign right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38303194/314843458/21723500?refcode=em_fr_2021.11.04_b1_lm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2Y0ZGNkOS1hNzNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hk7vehPeLBx3bq0jD4YtdZ4egRMhWLCE1shsNMYHlxQ=)** | [**Chip in Now »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38303195/314843465/1246233592?refcode=em_fr_2021.11.04_b1_lm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2Y0ZGNkOS1hNzNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hk7vehPeLBx3bq0jD4YtdZ4egRMhWLCE1shsNMYHlxQ=)

name: BREAKING NEWS (via JasmineForCongress.com)
subject: Our district just got more Democratic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress

| | | | | **BREAKING: North Carolina's General Assembly just passed a new extreme partisan gerrymander of our state's congressional districts -- making the stakes against Madison Cawthorn even higher!**

**[Will you chip in $14 today to flip our new district NC-14 blue? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38303211/314843518/1055886451?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211104_FR_Redistricting_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjU3OGViNi1hNzNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uj-85vvVnqrLj_xKUd2zBE7eZ0faXIxLFqoXT9IG6oE= "https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38303211/314843518/1055886451?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211104_FR_Redistricting_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjU3OGViNi1hNzNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uj-85vvVnqrLj_xKUd2zBE7eZ0faXIxLFqoXT9IG6oE=")** | | | [Donate ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38303212/314843519/1055886451?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211104_FR_Redistricting_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjU3OGViNi1hNzNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uj-85vvVnqrLj_xKUd2zBE7eZ0faXIxLFqoXT9IG6oE=)
