Peter \-- We just got some grim news. The NC General Assembly just passed new redistricting maps. It’s an extreme gerrymander meant to shore up GOP power. NC voters deserve fair, balanced districts that actually represent who we are. These maps are yet another partisan attempt to undermine our democracy.
This also means that the stakes in our race against Madison Cawthorn just got even higher. Under these maps, the new NC-14 district is now one of the ONLY competitive Congressional races in NC.
While the NC GOP drew up lines that drastically favor them statewide, our new district has been made _**significantly more Democratic**_ with the addition of Watauga County. This is a major swing and we’re ready to hit the ground running in organizing in every corner of the new district to deliver the leadership WNC deserves.
We can make Cawthorn a one-term congressman. But this also means that national right-wing special interests are going to pour in money to support Cawthorn. We’re ready and we have a plan:
**Organize everywhere.**
**Focus on our core values and what we stand for.**__
**Provide a clear contrast to Cawthorn’s divisiveness and extremism.**
Jasmine is committed to organizing everywhere, listening to voters, and demonstrating that our team has what it takes to bring leadership into our new district guided by the principles of love, hope, and empathy.
We couldn’t have gotten this far without your grassroots support and we need to double down as we move forward.
[**The resources we need to compete in this race are now more important than ever. Will you chip in $14 today for our new district, NC-14?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38303213/314843520/1055886451?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211104_FR_Redistricting_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjU3OGViNi1hNzNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uj-85vvVnqrLj_xKUd2zBE7eZ0faXIxLFqoXT9IG6oE=)

clean_body: | | | | | BREAKING: North Carolina's General Assembly just passed a new extreme partisan gerrymander of our state's congressional districts -- making the stakes against Madison Cawthorn even higher! = "=" | | | = Peter \-- We just got some grim news. The NC General Assembly just passed new redistricting maps. It’s an extreme gerrymander meant to shore up GOP power. NC voters deserve fair, balanced districts that actually represent who we are. These maps are yet another partisan attempt to undermine our democracy. This also means that the stakes in our race against Madison Cawthorn just got even higher. Under these maps, the new NC-14 district is now one of the ONLY competitive Congressional races in NC. While the NC GOP drew up lines that drastically favor them statewide, our new district has been made significantly more Democratic with the addition of Watauga County. This is a major swing and we’re ready to hit the ground running in organizing in every corner of the new district to deliver the leadership WNC deserves. We can make Cawthorn a one-term congressman. But this also means that national right-wing special interests are going to pour in money to support Cawthorn. We’re ready and we have a plan: Organize everywhere. Focus on our core values and what we stand for. Provide a clear contrast to Cawthorn’s divisiveness and extremism. Jasmine is committed to organizing everywhere, listening to voters, and demonstrating that our team has what it takes to bring leadership into our new district guided by the principles of love, hope, and empathy. We couldn’t have gotten this far without your grassroots support and we need to double down as we move forward. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Team Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. On Monday, he added more conditions for his vote on the Democratic agenda - refusing to vote on the bill unless his demands were met. **Joe Manchin is holding us hostage.** We already made a colossal compromise by cutting this spending bill in half to $1.75 trillion. **Now, one Senator is holding the lives of working class families, people of color, young people, and our elders hostage. Last week, Joe Manchin said he’s considering switching parties to become a Republican, and this week he’s working overtime to ensure Democrats have nothing to run on in 2022. **[Can you chip in to send a working-class champion that won’t let corporations control the Democratic agenda? [Donate now](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xx70stB4rOWn3H33v0OtzfC3VEF89Jc2z-ZJD--MhsxwcMiR0bidsuE5w2apavFKSnBXFY4xZX0JJtm4V2xmqwjbkWEQ8XQf-US5kUofXCDA4mct30euWIH_4t_bhylWxKRTw6A_FuNP5GOnsBG9oeDeYR2EvV8cGwypLAQ_ihk6ndGyb50-y0ScvBhWDUfb6skwaZe9xGJuAHtAe6_yvYSqsihmMHBPLyW3sTtVxn_KX63ZsfS6ReG_wQG25zH_y6x-LknA0QXxt2o3xOPFBjEaQQ1JybJv2n_S2DEXB_C3AL--_xOlskYQ2yoRsyXsE/3gq/v0kNzUBrQ-SNdkoUlAng7w/h3/s_DkGSj1XBH8TreAS_Zzvu9o5MtkSvGcgoaSvg4OCu4)
Senator Manchin’s political games are just the latest example of why we have a corporate Democrat problem in Congress. We deserve representatives that serve the people, not the highest corporate bidder. Democrats like Joe Manchin are standing in the way of paid family leave, Medicare expansion, lowering the cost of prescription drugs, child tax credits, free community college, fighting against climate change, child care, affordable housing and a pathway to citizenship for immigrants. We don’t just need more Democrats, we need better Democrats. Thank you, Kina Collins | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Team Kilmer
subject: What happened earlier this week at the Supreme Court of the United States
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Oral arguments on Texas' extreme abortion ban were heard at the highest court of the land earlier this week. The question before the Court is whether SB8, one of the most restrictive infringement on reproductive freedom in the country, is constitutional or not.

SB8 bans abortion after just six weeks, before many people even know they are pregnant. It turns neighbor against neighbor and creates a "bounty system." It directly contradicts _Roe v. Wade_ and is blatantly unconstitutional. The Supreme Court must strike down this dangerous law.

But here's the reality: we can't rely on the Courts to protect reproductive freedom in America. Action is required NOW to stop state legislators across the country from continuing their attacks on reproductive health care.

**Derek was an original cosponsor of the Women 's Health Protection Act earlier this year** to enshrine the right to reproductive freedom under the law. It will prohibit bans, mandatory waiting periods, and other restrictions on a person's right to reproductive freedom that stop people from seeking care.

**[The House passed the Women's Health Protection Act, and it's clear that time is of the essence when it comes to getting this bill over the finish line. Derek is calling on the Senate to swiftly pass the Women's Health Protection Act without delay. Will you join him? Add your name next to Derek's.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Z1RBqTtSK1YFNzSvne09ivk5d-6ijI_F1BucQ68ACsw=/KVbKwFiSEvQNPJ09aa1uernIYrfIjWRO5ft7aN4e8SY=?ms=em21_211104_SB8_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em21_211104_SB8_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em21_211104_SB8_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211104_SB8_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

Abortion access for hundreds of millions of Americans could be on the line. Please add your voice in this effort.

Thanks,

Team Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/Z1RBqTtSK1YFNzSvne09ivk5d-6ijI_F1BucQ68ACsw=/Z2SYPrWRYmM2ZLtRHB9z-nezvXlPSEiq8_5eNz3fFAo=?refcode=em21_211104_SB8_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211104_SB8_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign. = | = ---|--- Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. Our digital program helps us reach folks with the latest updates. But, if you'd rather not hear from our team, please =.

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: Only in America
body:
Let’s live up to what it has always meant to be American - no matter where you come from, your future can be as bright as your dreams.

| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email_3&n=1)
---
Friend, To move our nation forward, we have to live up to what it has always meant to be American - that no matter who you are or where you come from, your future in America can be as bright as your dreams and hard work will take you. Welcome to Country First.

What began at our founding and that has sustained us in the darkest times still holds true - America is the land of opportunity and when we stay true to the values we share, we can overcome any obstacle. I’m proud to have you join us as we build something extraordinary and powerful, and it means a lot to have you with me. Support our fight to uphold our values and keep Country First. | [](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=OPXMP9Gjm96HPN5OSJWJsIRUPZ4XpNHIFdYvIZ6w_hABaEcPsYY0DIz4siHb-jL5&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email_3&n=2 "Take Action") [Take Action](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=OPXMP9Gjm96HPN5OSJWJsIRUPZ4XpNHIFdYvIZ6w_hABaEcPsYY0DIz4siHb-jL5&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email_3&n=2)
---
Thank you again for your time and thank you for putting Country First.
Yours in service,
Adam
Country First · PO Box 2385, Ottawa, IL 61350, United States

name: Alisha Shelton
subject: I’m so glad you joined our campaign, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHELTON FOR CONGRESS
body:
I am ready to be the Representative that Nebraskans deserve.

| _Thank you for signing up to receive email updates from Alisha’s campaign! This is a grassroots campaign where we value every supporter, so feel free to introduce yourself by replying to this message._
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38303487/314847310/1120240658?refcode=blu-asc-wel-end-web&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWE5NjFjYy1hOTNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lCZM6BYXBsdaQylOuMuMSBXAU8lu8pL0fKiT0KvzL4k=)
Peter,

My home congressional district, Nebraska’s Second District, is currently represented by a Republican, but we also voted for Joe Biden in the 2020 election — which means that we’re home to a uniquely flippable Congressional seat. **That’s why I am running to flip this district blue and be Nebraska’s first African American Congresswoman.**

Friend, **I have spent much of my career fighting for the people of Wyoming.** When President Clinton attempted to block access to 1/3 of our National Forest Lands, I fought back. I stopped the EPA when it tried to take control of our irrigation delivery systems. I blocked the USDA’s efforts to force our livestock producers to use RFID eartags on all of our cattle, and register our ranches with the federal government.**Putting Wyoming First has always been my top priority.** Now, I am going to Congress to fight for you in Washington. For far too long, Wyomingites have not had a voice in the House of Representatives. That stops right here and right now. When I am elected, I will put your interests above petty politics, DC elites, and personal vendettas. We deserve a Congresswoman that is Wyoming Tough and that fights for our values, not someone who pursues their own agenda and the agenda of the power brokers in DC and Northern Virginia. clean_body: | | | | We’re putting Wyoming > Everything. Friend, I have spent much of my career fighting for the people of Wyoming. When President Clinton attempted to block access to 1/3 of our National Forest Lands, I fought back. I stopped the EPA when it tried to take control of our irrigation delivery systems. I blocked the USDA’s efforts to force our livestock producers to use RFID eartags on all of our cattle, and register our ranches with the federal government.Putting Wyoming First has always been my top priority. Now, I am going to Congress to fight for you in Washington. For far too long, Wyomingites have not had a voice in the House of Representatives. That stops right here and right now. When I am elected, I will put your interests above petty politics, DC elites, and personal vendettas. We deserve a Congresswoman that is Wyoming Tough and that fights for our values, not someone who pursues their own agenda and the agenda of the power brokers in DC and Northern Virginia. I will put a stop to the radical Biden agenda that is crushing Wyoming’s economy. Instead of doing the bidding of Nancy Pelosi’s, I will always put Wyoming's first. For Wyoming, Harriet Hageman | | | |

In the wake of the Republican upset in Virginia and near upset in New Jersey, _Politico_ is reporting today that Republican leaders are redoubling their efforts to recruit three sitting GOP Governors to challenge Democratic Senators in their states in 2022. One of those Governors is Larry Hogan here in Maryland who is being urged by Senator Mitch McConnell to run against Chris for this Maryland Senate seat to try to regain Republican control of the Senate.
**Tuesday's election results have emboldened Republicans — and we must be ready to respond.**
In a 50-50 Senate Republicans just need to win one more seat. And they think Hogan gives them their best shot to pick up a GOP seat in Maryland. This would be a disastrous outcome for both our state and country — and a game changer for McConnell's crusade to flip the Senate and come back as Senate Majority Leader.
[If Hogan gets into this race, he’s likely to have access to nearly unlimited money from McConnell's PACs and special interests desperate to replace Chris with someone who will do their bidding instead of fighting for working people in Maryland. Can you pitch in now to help us tell Mitch to 'STAY OUT OF MARYLAND' and make sure we are ready to defend this Senate seat and fight back?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38304731/314852837/-1808413249?amount=10&refcode=CVH_EM_FR_3MO_211104_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTlhZWY3NS1hYzNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ahLiZjznWfS_iwMdvhFA9GEqVyogbFAcfPiHJa4sS4I=)

Hogan is co-chairman of a group that’s been pouring resources into lobbying to weaken or outright kill President Biden’s Build Back Better plan.
This group opposes 'radical' ideas like lowering prescription drug prices for everyday Americans, expanding access to health care, child and elder care, and more. Big-money individuals and corporations are already funding ad campaigns against these pieces of the Build Back Better plan — and they would be thrilled to finance a candidate here in Maryland that would do their work for them; instead of fighting tooth and nail to get these critical measures passed.

clean_body: | = | = In the wake of the Republican upset in Virginia and near upset in New Jersey, Politico is reporting today that Republican leaders are redoubling their efforts to recruit three sitting GOP Governors to challenge Democratic Senators in their states in 2022. One of those Governors is Larry Hogan here in Maryland who is being urged by Senator Mitch McConnell to run against Chris for this Maryland Senate seat to try to regain Republican control of the Senate. Tuesday's election results have emboldened Republicans — and we must be ready to respond. In a 50-50 Senate Republicans just need to win one more seat. And they think Hogan gives them their best shot to pick up a GOP seat in Maryland. This would be a disastrous outcome for both our state and country — and a game changer for McConnell's crusade to flip the Senate and come back as Senate Majority Leader. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Hogan is co-chairman of a group that’s been pouring resources into lobbying to weaken or outright kill President Biden’s Build Back Better plan. This group opposes 'radical' ideas like lowering prescription drug prices for everyday Americans, expanding access to health care, child and elder care, and more. **Mark is a champion for the people, and we need his voice in the U.S. Senate.**
He’s fighting hard alongside Martin to act on climate change, lower the price of prescription drugs, and protect and expand voting rights.
But Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans are threatened by all Mark, Martin, and other Senate Democrats are doing to make the lives of everyday people better. That’s why they are running their fundraising operations on all cylinders,**raking in more than $76.2 million this year.**
**Republicans are already pouring money into bad-faith attack ads and will stop at nothing to flip Arizona red and take back the Senate majority.** So Mark and Martin are counting on this grassroots team to step up and help us make the early investments necessary to win.
**So, please split a contribution between Mark and Martin’s campaigns to defend Mark’s Senate seat, our majority, and our progress:**

clean_body: Folks, after Republicans’ upset in Virginia, Larry Sabato’s Crystal Ball just downgraded Senator Mark Kelly’s race in Arizona from “Leans Democratic” to “Toss-up.” That’s concerning news when only one seat stands in the way of Mitch McConnell and the Senate majority. Mark is counting on grassroots supporters like you to stop Republicans from taking back this critical seat and reversing the progress we’re hard at work on right now. Can you split a donation of $10 or any amount right now between Mark and Martin to power our campaigns as we defend the Senate majority? If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Mark Kelly and Martin Heinrich: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Mark is a champion for the people, and we need his voice in the U.S. Senate. He’s fighting hard alongside Martin to act on climate change, lower the price of prescription drugs, and protect and expand voting rights. But Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans are threatened by all Mark, Martin, and other Senate Democrats are doing to make the lives of everyday people better. That’s why they are running their fundraising operations on all cylinders,raking in more than $76.2 million this year. Republicans are already pouring money into bad-faith attack ads and will stop at nothing to flip Arizona red and take back the Senate majority. So Mark and Martin are counting on this grassroots team to step up and help us make the early investments necessary to win. So, please split a contribution between Mark and Martin’s campaigns to defend Mark’s Senate seat, our majority, and our progress: If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Mark Kelly and Martin Heinrich: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for chipping in what you can. It’s not just about how much we raise – how many folks give is just as important in powering a grassroots movement. — Team Heinrich | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. But our mission doesn’t stop here. In a few days, we will be exactly one year out from the 2022 midterm elections, and we’ll need as many hands as possible to help kick out Rep. Perry and his team of far-right, Washington insiders. After that, we’ll finally have a real leader who cares about families, small business owners, and our students representing us. name: =?utf-8?Q?Deja=20Alvarez?=
subject: Breaking News on Breaking the Mold
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DEJA FOR PA _
body:
Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. | | | | [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=09ed763135&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | | It’s my absolute honor to be featured on [the cover of Al Día news](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=73027b987b&e=3f8e2ea1e3) for my historic run to be the first trans Latina state representative in the nation. It is important for me to share my story openly and inspire others who may not think they can run for office because they don’t “fit the mold.”

We do not have to let our pasts define our future. I grew to learn that any space requiring an authentic leader with lived experiences of issues facing Philadelphians was a space where I belonged. And it’s in those spaces that I thrived for the past 20 years helping Philadelphians battling hunger, addiction, housing insecurity, and healthcare access.

It’s been through cultivating and growing my relationships with elected officials, police departments, governmental agencies, community leaders, and neighborhood stakeholders that I've been able to get the work done.

And that is the skillset and experience I will take to Harrisburg representing you.

**[Can you help me amplify community voices from Philadelphia to Harrisburg?](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=77a9d0e1d8&e=3f8e2ea1e3)**
---
|
---
| **From Al Día:**

_Alvarez likes to identify herself as more of an advocate rather than an activist because she chooses to work closely with government officials and the police rather than fighting against them. _

_“The system affects different marginalized communities, no matter how hard we’re fighting from the outside. Who is on the inside making sure that the ones who are currently dealing with these systems while we’re trying to fight them from the outside...who’s in there making sure that they’re okay?” Alvarez said. _

_She feels that there’s enough people doing all the “screaming and yelling” and activism from the outside, and feels blessed to have the “gift of gab” and emotional intelligence that allows her to amplify community voices in a way that gets heard in spaces where important decisions are being made._

---
|

clean_body: Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. | | | | | | | It’s my absolute honor to be featured on for my historic run to be the first trans Latina state representative in the nation. It is important for me to share my story openly and inspire others who may not think they can run for office because they don’t “fit the mold.” We do not have to let our pasts define our future. I grew to learn that any space requiring an authentic leader with lived experiences of issues facing Philadelphians was a space where I belonged. And it’s in those spaces that I thrived for the past 20 years helping Philadelphians battling hunger, addiction, housing insecurity, and healthcare access. It’s been through cultivating and growing my relationships with elected officials, police departments, governmental agencies, community leaders, and neighborhood stakeholders that I've been able to get the work done. And that is the skillset and experience I will take to Harrisburg representing you. | | From Al Día: Alvarez likes to identify herself as more of an advocate rather than an activist because she chooses to work closely with government officials and the police rather than fighting against them. “The system affects different marginalized communities, no matter how hard we’re fighting from the outside. Who is on the inside making sure that the ones who are currently dealing with these systems while we’re trying to fight them from the outside...who’s in there making sure that they’re okay?” Alvarez said. She feels that there’s enough people doing all the “screaming and yelling” and activism from the outside, and feels blessed to have the “gift of gab” and emotional intelligence that allows her to amplify community voices in a way that gets heard in spaces where important decisions are being made. | Can You Chip in $10 to Help Ensure a House that Represents You? | | | Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives in the 182nd District. With more than a decade of experience in the nonprofit and public health field, Deja is committed to building on progressive values, economic recovery, and historic LGBTQ representation in Harrisburg. In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | © 2021 Paid for by DEJA FOR PA Our mailing address is: DEJA FOR PA PO BOX 63953 PHILADELPHIA, PA 19147 Want to change how you receive these emails? He knows that I will continue to FIGHT the Radical Left by being Pro-2nd Amendment, Pro-Energy, Pro-Border Security, Pro-Life, and will ALWAYS support our Military and Veterans! Now that I have Congressman Jackson’s support on Team Kelly, I need strong American First Conservatives like YOU** to keep fighting with me and keep our grassroots campaign strong. We know what Murkowski and the Radical Left can do when given power, and we must stop them before they force more of their Socialist agenda on our country. Together, we can STAND UP against their extreme policies that are hurting the American people. It’s time to RETIRE Murkowski and fight for America First values. For Alaska, Kelly | | | | =

name: Mark Meuser
subject: Congrats Glenn Youngkin!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Meuser for U
body:
|
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cdabc88bc0ba46dcba2614caa68a7d66&_e=juxkXItgerTOZ-KVj6AUIqwZ432uW5nlnvQ2P-l5zN9kN9scwoNRrn2rL7cSwsBki0XAJZyClsIb40UIblbP0nIwz1AGL1s6VkEmLxTr2xJPFmKGHq8pE4l5KYPYruLBJ30z7z0v0XmxEVkY0hU0JV92i67wm6ovJVjLExwYrVojE6Ymja0qwgqYY2l5gwSybp8pTq-ucmlgOSj7G5u_e3sQyEbiqWNhgzHUEI38TcFB7zXqu0x4RKGessQ5CpxgVl6tKm9w4HOf67wOcW_WwxZPPg1cDE0KEShhralx9nGW4Yr1YOBMl0oIwDtfLIEsmhgthjbD2FeSs1YWF25Vyw%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

A red wave is about to hit our Nation!

After watching the election results in Virginia and New Jersey, it hit me... we've seen this before.

**Let's talk about some American History;**

**In 1993,** Bill and Hillary Clinton pushed socialized medicine on America. That year Virginia and New Jersey flipped from a Democrat to a Republican Governor.

Then in the 1994 midterm election, we saw a MASSIVE red wave across the Nation.

**In 2009,** Barrack Obama and the Democrats forced Obamacare down our throats. That year, Virginia and New Jersey flipped from a Democrat to a Republican Governor.

Then in the 2010 midterm election, we saw a MASSIVE red wave across the Nation.

**In 2021,** Joe Biden and the Democrats are forcing their socialist agenda on America. **On Tuesday, Virginia flipped from a Democrat to a Republican Governor, and New Jersey is still too close to call.**

And while we don't yet know what will happen in the 2022 midterm election, history and the dramatic results of these races show us that a red wave is starting. **It hit Virginia this week, and it will hit California next November.**

**We saw it in 1994, we saw it in 2010, and now it's starting in 2021!**

**Let's make it happen.**

I need your help of I'm going to jump on this wave. Running for office isn't an easy task and will require a lot of resources in a state as large as California.

[**Can you make a celebratory contribution of $5, $10, $25, or more today to help our campaign ride the red wave to victory in 2021?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cdabc88bc0ba46dcba2614caa68a7d66&_e=juxkXItgerTOZ-KVj6AUIqwZ432uW5nlnvQ2P-l5zN9kN9scwoNRrn2rL7cSwsBki0XAJZyClsIb40UIblbP0nIwz1AGL1s6VkEmLxTr2xJPFmKGHq8pE4l5KYPYruLBFPM-UeATg5VuuLobruBeWUblAXLw6Z7EchgAICSIuPZRDUZzGvr9wjqKzkISIO0_jrbcJRFSVTKsFyZ7Jm2bXq9aGtTOmKPESsAMTJhfkRJJtf6m8ayWVzhM02i8qO6ntJ3I-T1B4Kg63R_9Ljzyb8-JHCo_yRHPQXM6KDHQ_ZR4EjsLHCeFkRR0bnk5XaFq-s8qiiVZ4uf4B83nFS54jA%3D%3D)

Catch you on the wave!

Mark Meuser
Republican for U.S. Senate, California

[** Donate Now >> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=cdabc88bc0ba46dcba2614caa68a7d66&_e=juxkXItgerTOZ-KVj6AUIqwZ432uW5nlnvQ2P-l5zN9kN9scwoNRrn2rL7cSwsBki0XAJZyClsIb40UIblbP0nIwz1AGL1s6VkEmLxTr2xJPFmKGHq8pE4l5KYPYruLBcjiyUgqcvHojq4el4A4s1VcSLSh8iQIxCpVdga4OWjxcc82dMAkoSopOubp39msgR4io6RPxZ8oEwFkYqOKr_08z_BnG_MbzzdCxlBJH2zvs1KqAZW8pAj6Wm3sm6BHYEa1FgeglrjDb8My7bkCHYymUUmQQ9HxtF_l0mHqYwbx8fvbr8UFNyXMiddj9T4UMxGCieU007Vu5uMrK_pBYEQ%3D%3D)

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: We won paid leave in the Build Back Better Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Despite all of the corporate lobbying and opposition from conservatives, we won paid family and medical leave in the Build Back Better Act.
#
Peter,
Right now, the United States is one of only six countries — and certainly the only wealthy country — in the whole world without any form of national paid leave. Since coming to Congress in 2017, the fight for paid family and medical leave has been an important priority of mine because it means winning some real, life changing relief for people across this country.
That’s why I’ve been organizing alongside other progressives and women in Congress to lead the charge for guaranteed paid family and medical leave for every worker in America as part of the Build Back Better Act. Despite all of the corporate lobbying and opposition from conservatives, **we have just won paid family and medical leave in the House’s Build Back Better Act.** It’s a huge achievement that will make a real difference for families throughout America.
[**But our work is far from over. Can you step up and contribute $3 or more right now to ensure that we pass a Build Back Better Act that includes this historic paid family and medical leave provision? We can’t let paid leave get left out.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8518?refcode=em20211104-776&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=776%2E420207%2E61WP16)
**[Contribute »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8518?refcode=em20211104-776&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=776%2E420207%2E61WP16)**
Whether it’s welcoming a new child into your family or experiencing an unexpected illness, no person in this country should ever have to make a choice between keeping their job and taking care of a loved one. The wealthiest Americans and big corporations must finally pay their fair share in taxes so we can invest in working families. That includes paid family and medical leave.
I know it feels like this fight has gone on for far too long — we have corporate lobbyists and their unchecked influence over our political system to thank for that. But we can’t stop now. **Paid family and medical leave policies are incredibly popular, and we have to see them through. I know we can do it — we can join the rest of the world in finally guaranteeing paid leave.**
[**Contribute $3 now to help me pass paid family and medical leave — and so many other important investments — in President Biden’s FULL Build Back Better Act.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8518?refcode=em20211104-776&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=776%2E420207%2E61WP16)
**[Contribute »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8518?refcode=em20211104-776&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=776%2E420207%2E61WP16)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211104-776-footer&t=23&refcode2=776_420207_61WP16&akid=776%2E420207%2E61WP16)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

Peter, Right now, the United States is one of only six countries — and certainly the only wealthy country — in the whole world without any form of national paid leave. Since coming to Congress in 2017, the fight for paid family and medical leave has been an important priority of mine because it means winning some real, life changing relief for people across this country. That’s why I’ve been organizing alongside other progressives and women in Congress to lead the charge for guaranteed paid family and medical leave for every worker in America as part of the Build Back Better Act. Despite all of the corporate lobbying and opposition from conservatives, we have just won paid family and medical leave in the House’s Build Back Better Act. It’s a huge achievement that will make a real difference for families throughout America. Whether it’s welcoming a new child into your family or experiencing an unexpected illness, no person in this country should ever have to make a choice between keeping their job and taking care of a loved one. The wealthiest Americans and big corporations must finally pay their fair share in taxes so we can invest in working families. That includes paid family and medical leave. I know it feels like this fight has gone on for far too long — we have corporate lobbyists and their unchecked influence over our political system to thank for that. But we can’t stop now. Paid family and medical leave policies are incredibly popular, and we have to see them through. I know we can do it — we can join the rest of the world in finally guaranteeing paid leave. In solidarity, Pramila | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

clean_body: | = | | Team, We had some pretty tough losses on Tuesday night that could mean bad news for Democrats everywhere. But, don’t take it from us, look at what Dave Wasserman from the Cook Political Report had to say about it: = 200 DONORS NEEDED: = | | | = There’s no sugar coating this one, folks. But, the good news is that there’s still a little time left to heed Dave Wasserman’s warning. A year may seem like quite a bit of time to reflect and strategize but, in reality, we need to get to work as soon as possible. Let’s take a moment to realize what’s at stake here for us in 2022 if we don’t re-elect Susie Lee and other battleground Democrats to hold our majorities in Congress. Protecting voting rights Combating climate change Safeguarding women’s right to choose Expanding health care access And so much more. We have the power to correct our course if we work together. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for your support, folks. name: Great America Update
subject: Citizenship requires vigilance
body:
Are you proud to be an American citizen? [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6553%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=FVBNiFooi89Xgpp7id9dgA&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67743%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TUDopmgUijoKavWV0Z2stQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Are you proud to be an American citizen? If you’re like me, you give thanks to God every day that you live in a country that is free, peaceful, and where citizens have inalienable rights. Most people in history can’t say the same thing--in fact, most people in the world can’t say the same thing even today. You don’t have to be a historian to see that the long practice of citizenship in America is unprecedented. It’s one of our nation’s great achievements. But there’s a catch--citizenship requires vigilance and knowledge to maintain. Especially now, when it faces threats from the far-Left and progressive economic policies, illegal immigration, and more. Everyone who wishes to defend freedom in America requires an understanding of the nature and scope of these challenges. And as a college, we know that a proper education is the best defense of liberty. That’s why today I hope you’ll support our **[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67744%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9nyBp%2fm6vxQf7gXQM6iMAQ&sysid=1)** This ambitious and extensive project has three main goals.
* **The first important goal **of this campaign is to inform debates about the critical issues of our time through We must add hundreds of thousands more subscribers in 2022!
* **The second vital goal **is to teach millions of citizens about the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics through free online courses.
* **The third critical goal **is restoring excellence to K-12 education in America through our expanded Hillsdale K-12 Education Office and new Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum.

And unlike the vast majority of colleges and universities, we must **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about liberty. And we have to do it without taking ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain proudly independent. This means that _ your_ support is critical to our success. With your help, we’ll engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education. With your help, we will defend liberty against dangerous ideologies. And with your help, we will preserve freedom for future generations of American citizens. We urgently need your support, because, to implement the **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** fully, we need to raise $1.5 million in the next few months. **You can give safely and securely at this link:** _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-citizenship-and-defend-liberty**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67855%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BKtz69tP8HeAjd4JafNW5w&sysid=1)_
---
| | And for a gift of $100 or more, you’ll receive a special hardcover edition of Victor Davis Hanson’s latest book, _The Dying Citizen: How Progressive Elites, Tribalism, and Globalization Are Destroying the Idea of America. _Victor Davis Hanson is a frequent commentator on Fox News and online. He’s also a historian and distinguished fellow here at Hillsdale.
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67856%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NczUWiXe2P3A9ZaDe1d1qA&sysid=1)
---
| | Regarding the book, my boss and teacher, Hillsdale President Larry P. Arnn, has written, “In this book, Hanson demonstrates yet again his command across time and for our time. **This book and he are a treasure.” ** Thank you so much for your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans--that is essential to preserving citizenship and free government. Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach **[Hillsdale College](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67857%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PCiZKhoQ7Rsf3x0I%2fWYcYQ&sysid=1)**
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6553%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=FVBNiFooi89Xgpp7id9dgA&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6553%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=FVBNiFooi89Xgpp7id9dgA&sysid=1)

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: We have work to do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
We have to build a campaign that can overcome waves of Republican attacks and dark money ads. Tuesday's election results showed that we cannot take anything for granted.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38307083/314862665/-381930006?refcode=EM_FR_211104E_N_CD_FULL_8_G_N_Logo&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Njk0NGQxNC1iNzNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x-6xrl6jBPPT7D8RYFsQgiCgXNHzfz1JV1svbc3HUg0=)
---
Derek, the election results across the country this week were a clear sign that Democrats have a lot of work to do.

We need to fully deliver on the change we promised the American people, and we need to message back aggressively against the right-wing lies and efforts to divide us.

Our campaign is centered on the kinds of bold _and popular_ policies that will help Democrats gain back ground ahead of 2022: expanding childcare and family leave, helping workers organize for better pay, and making corporations pay their fair share as we rebuild our infrastructure and our economy. **We can win this race — but we have to move fast to build a campaign that can overcome waves of Republican attacks and dark money ads.**

[**We need to raise $15,000 over the next week, so we can begin organizing early and making sure our message reaches voters all across the 17th District. Please give what you can today >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38307084/314862666/-381930006?refcode=EM_FR_211104E_N_CD_FULL_8_G_N_L1&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Njk0NGQxNC1iNzNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x-6xrl6jBPPT7D8RYFsQgiCgXNHzfz1JV1svbc3HUg0=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38307085/314862667/-381930006?express_lane=true&refcode=EM_FR_211104E_N_CD_FULL_8_G_N_EB10&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Njk0NGQxNC1iNzNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x-6xrl6jBPPT7D8RYFsQgiCgXNHzfz1JV1svbc3HUg0=)**

| | **[Other »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38307090/314862672/-381930006?refcode=EM_FR_211104E_N_CD_FULL_8_G_N_EBother&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Njk0NGQxNC1iNzNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x-6xrl6jBPPT7D8RYFsQgiCgXNHzfz1JV1svbc3HUg0=)**
---
The GOP strategy is to make Americans hate each other, and divide us so it's easier for their corporate bosses to call the shots. Unfortunately, that strategy paid major dividends for them in 2021 in too many places — and if we don't step things up, their strategy could succeed again in 2022.

This campaign is for people who know we’re stronger when we stand together and fight for our common good. My goal is to hit as many communities as possible in western Pennsylvania before the end of the year, because every conversation we have could be another vote gained.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38307091/314862673/-381930006?refcode=EM_FR_211104E_N_CD_FULL_8_G_N_P1&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Njk0NGQxNC1iNzNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x-6xrl6jBPPT7D8RYFsQgiCgXNHzfz1JV1svbc3HUg0=)
We're going to be tested a lot in the year ahead, but I'm more determined than ever to stand up for the ideas and values that drove me into this race. **The progress that we can achieve for our country is worth fighting for.**

[**But I can't win this fight alone. Because I'm not taking corporate PAC money, your support is more important than ever. Please chip in any amount to help us move this campaign forward and face the GOP head-on.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38307092/314862674/-381930006?refcode=EM_FR_211104E_N_CD_FULL_8_G_N_L2&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Njk0NGQxNC1iNzNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x-6xrl6jBPPT7D8RYFsQgiCgXNHzfz1JV1svbc3HUg0=)

Thank you,

Chris

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: We need to win this battle on the campuses
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal gove
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zbe2q8ub092r5ulcr6nursn5felktmubkh3g3p78_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c1hm8ob4c5h2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z6jsshsc5cgc3638q7t4sioe5mch2rs71fei5jh8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c1hm8ob4c5h2bs) [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zeed82apidjdgfp5bis7ckjlateee0gb2stvtm28_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c1hm8ob4c5h2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zrcamal2dc9mqoqgchs6pj2lsa8ng4lv2ap0tscg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c1hm8ob4c5h2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z22qeo4um5r6cm28qpgat7vtvf2agf63nspsh4n8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c1hm8ob4c5h2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z5pe1plp9hoj2cni0kj8ktp6htte5su9emagkklg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c1hm8ob4c5h2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

I am inspired that so many of you were willing to contribute to my campaign -- folks like you chipping in $3, $10, even $25. With your support and energy, **we will win**! And when we do, I will serve CA-25 with the grit and compassion it deserves. Together, we have shown the strength of our movement and the power of our grassroots community. I’m blessed to have earned your confidence, and I’m looking forward to continuing to do great work this November. Team, we have the right momentum to keep us going, and I am grateful for all that you have done to help defeat Mike Garcia and hold him accountable. | | Dear ,
I am writing you today to show you the results of an important poll that we conducted that validates not only everything we are doing in America’s audit, but also President Trump’s push to elect America First, Election Integrity Conservatives to Secretary of State!

**Just last month, President Trump endorsed my campaign, saying:**

**_“Arizona State Representative Mark Finchem has my Complete and Total Endorsement to run for Secretary of State of the Great State of Arizona! He has been a warrior in his pursuit of the truth about the 2020 Presidential Election scam in Arizona. Mark will clean up the fraud that Democrat Katie Hobbs created, and that RINO Doug Ducey and the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors have covered up every step of the way. Let’s get those routers, Mark!”_**

_I am proud to continue the fight with you, President Trump!_

[_And recently, President Trump has made a push to endorse like-minded Secretaries of States to protect our elections and ensure the Democrats are incapable of making another steal._](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b0c68d9f1f&e=44b8c466b0)

**And the media has caught on. Suffice it to say, the Fake News Media does not like it!**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9b3de560f6&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| This _Guardian_ article reports:

_Donald Trump and allies are seeding one of their most dangerous efforts to undermine US elections to date, seeking to elevate candidates who refuse to accept Joe Biden’s victory in 2020 to crucial offices where they could do significant damage in overturning the 2024 elections._

_The former president has endorsed several Republican candidates running to be the secretary of state, the chief election official, in their respective states. If elected, these candidates would wield enormous power over elections, and could both implement policies that would make it harder for Americans to cast a ballot and block the official certification of election results afterwards. Ten of the 15 candidates running for secretary of state in the battleground states of Arizona, Georgia, Wisconsin, Michigan and Nevada have either said the 2020 results were stolen or that they need to be further investigated, Reuters reported earlier this month._

_The endorsements from the former president underscore the enormous power that secretaries of state have over election rules and procedures, both before and after the election. One of the main reasons Trump’s efforts to overturn the 2020 election failed in many places were election officials, including Republican and Democratic secretaries of state, who refused to go along with his effort. If those officials are voted out of office next year, it would be a serious blow to the guardrails of US democracy._

_“It is really troubling that Trump’s grip on the base of the Republican party may lead to the election of people who say that they believe the 2020 election was stolen from Trump,” Richard Hasen, an election law expert at the University of California, Irvine, wrote in an email. “That’s demonstrably false, but it does undermine the integrity of any elections that these people would be involved in running should they be elected.”_
**This shows two very important things:**
1. **The media is already preparing Americans for the possibility of a Democrat steal in 2024, and that any attempt to protect America’s elections is actually Republicans of all people stealing the election.**
2. **The absolutely worst thing in the world for the Democrats is that there would be Secretaries of States who believe the Truth, that Trump’s victory was stolen by the Democrats!**

_If this doesn’t give us motivation to push for victory for Secretary of State, then I don’t know what would!_

**The absolute worse thing for the Democrats is that President Trump gets what he wants: Election Integrity first Secretaries of State!**

_Well, I got really bad news for the Democrats:_

**_[The plan is working!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4fafe7bd87&e=44b8c466b0)_**

clean_body: Big time | | | | | Dear , I am writing you today to show you the results of an important poll that we conducted that validates not only everything we are doing in America’s audit, but also President Trump’s push to elect America First, Election Integrity Conservatives to Secretary of State! Just last month, President Trump endorsed my campaign, saying: “Arizona State Representative Mark Finchem has my Complete and Total Endorsement to run for Secretary of State of the Great State of Arizona! He has been a warrior in his pursuit of the truth about the 2020 Presidential Election scam in Arizona. Mark will clean up the fraud that Democrat Katie Hobbs created, and that RINO Doug Ducey and the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors have covered up every step of the way. Let’s get those routers, Mark!” I am proud to continue the fight with you, President Trump! And the media has caught on. Suffice it to say, the Fake News Media does not like it! | | This Guardian article reports: Donald Trump and allies are seeding one of their most dangerous efforts to undermine US elections to date, seeking to elevate candidates who refuse to accept Joe Biden’s victory in 2020 to crucial offices where they could do significant damage in overturning the 2024 elections. The former president has endorsed several Republican candidates running to be the secretary of state, the chief election official, in their respective states. If elected, these candidates would wield enormous power over elections, and could both implement policies that would make it harder for Americans to cast a ballot and block the official certification of election results afterwards. Ten of the 15 candidates running for secretary of state in the battleground states of Arizona, Georgia, Wisconsin, Michigan and Nevada have either said the 2020 results were stolen or that they need to be further investigated, Reuters reported earlier this month. The endorsements from the former president underscore the enormous power that secretaries of state have over election rules and procedures, both before and after the election. One of the main reasons Trump’s efforts to overturn the 2020 election failed in many places were election officials, including Republican and Democratic secretaries of state, who refused to go along with his effort. If those officials are voted out of office next year, it would be a serious blow to the guardrails of US democracy. “It is really troubling that Trump’s grip on the base of the Republican party may lead to the election of people who say that they believe the 2020 election was stolen from Trump,” Richard Hasen, an election law expert at the University of California, Irvine, wrote in an email. “That’s demonstrably false, but it does undermine the integrity of any elections that these people would be involved in running should they be elected.” This shows two very important things: 1. The media is already preparing Americans for the possibility of a Democrat steal in 2024, and that any attempt to protect America’s elections is actually Republicans of all people stealing the election. 2. The absolutely worst thing in the world for the Democrats is that there would be Secretaries of States who believe the Truth, that Trump’s victory was stolen by the Democrats! If this doesn’t give us motivation to push for victory for Secretary of State, then I don’t know what would! The absolute worse thing for the Democrats is that President Trump gets what he wants: Election Integrity first Secretaries of State! | | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a5ae9b06c8&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t
---
| Hoosier Republican,

We hope you've heard the exciting news!

Earlier this week, Tera Klutz announced that she is running for her second full term as Auditor of State! Auditor Klutz’s record of success includes Indiana earning national recognition for improved government transparency, managing Indiana’s financial systems throughout the pandemic, and improving efficiencies and cost saving measures in the state’s bill paying process. The State of Indiana has maintained a Triple A credit rating from all rating agencies throughout Klutz’s term.

We wanted to share what some of your fellow Hoosier Republicans are saying about Tera’s leadership. Read those quotes below and also make sure to follow Tera on [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fc8507382e&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5a14ebc843&e=1acd9bb3d6) and visit her [campaign website](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=af4d4947d8&e=1acd9bb3d6) for the latest news and to find out ways to get involved in her campaign.
---
|
---
| **_“Hoosiers throughout Indiana should be as happy as I am that Tera is running to serve another four years as auditor. She’s exactly the kind of thoughtful, meticulous, and steady leader we need in the auditor’s office. I’ve been glad to serve alongside her in the statehouse and look forward to continuing to do so for the next few years.”_ __ -Governor Eric Holcomb**
---
|
---
| _**“I’m thrilled my friend Tera Klutz is seeking a new term as state auditor. As a former auditor, I understand first hand the important role this office plays in stewarding taxpayer money. No one does it better than Tera and I’m glad Hoosiers will benefit from her service for four more years.“ -Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch**_
---
|
---
| _**“Hoosiers have seen the difference the first ever CPA to hold the auditor’s office has made. Tera Klutz has been a great auditor for the State of Indiana and I’m thrilled she’s gearing up to run for another term. The Indiana Republican Party looks forward to supporting her efforts and helping her win another four years.”**_ _**\- Chairman Kyle Hupfer**_
---
|
---
| _**“I’m proud to support my friend Tera Klutz as she seeks re-election as Indiana State Auditor. In her first term, Tera has compiled an impressive record of conservative accomplishment —benefitting all Hoosiers. As Indiana's first CPA State Auditor, Tera has increased Indiana's financial stability and transparency, putting Indiana as a national leader in these categories. Tera is overseeing the largest tax rebate in Indiana history allowing Hoosiers to keep more of their hard earned money. Hoosiers are in good hands with Tera's trusted, fiscally conservative leadership. I hope Hoosiers will join me in supporting her.” - Senator Todd Young**_
---
|
---
| _**“Tera Klutz is doing a great job making sure Hoosiers are getting the service and transparency they deserve from their government. I’m proud to support her re-election as Auditor.”- Senator Mike Braun**_
---
|
---
| _**"State Auditor Tera Klutz is a great partner who has a strong financial acumen and equally strong commitment to protecting taxpayer dollars. Indiana's incredible ability to weather the pandemic's financial impacts proves that conservative leadership matters, and Tera plays an important role on the team. We recently experienced unprecedented state revenue growth, which triggered an automatic taxpayer refund for the second time in our state's history. Tera has been critical to ensuring Hoosiers see that benefit and I look forward to continuing to work together." -Speaker Todd Huston**_
---
|
---
| Thank you,
Indiana Republican Party
---
|
---
---
---

---

name: Mike Ortega
subject: Why I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ortega For Congress
body:
To fight the big fights. To fight for this district. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38308140/314867888/-550609136?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211104intro_MO_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTcwZDA3Mi1iYjNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=877iiON-jdah_oRu5PnYZd8lQtWnkmOOTmhOCf5ab-Q=)
---
**When I got in this race a few months ago,****friends, a lot of people asked me, “why this race?”** I’m in this race for my father — an immigrant from Ecuador. Like any migrant laborer, he went where the work was. We moved from Chicago to Newark to Cleveland as a kid. I was raised by a lot of people; aunts and uncles, mom and dad. I’m in this race for my mother. She became a mother for the first time at 14 years old and would go on to raise five children. When I was a kid, I watched her, like millions of Americans, ration her insulin because she couldn’t afford the prescription she needed. I’m in this race for my newborn son: Michael Maximiliano Ortega. He was born just a few weeks ago and being a dad is one of the best things that’s ever happened to me. But I’m concerned about the air he’ll breathe and the water he’ll drink. I’m concerned about what we’re leaving behind for him — for his future. I’m in this race for the people of Anaheim, Santa Ana, and **The City of Orange.** There’s a history here of the American working class struggle that’s intertwined with workers rights and immigrant rights. This district deserves someone who knows their struggle — who’s lived their struggle — and won’t just show up when it’s time to shake hands at an event with cameras.
## I'm not in this race to get big checks from pharmaceutical companies or big oil and gas. I'm in this race to fight for you.
[So, if you can, please chip in $5, $10, or $25 to our campaign. We’re building a movement of everyday people ready to send a real representative to Washington to fight the big fights.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38308141/314867889/-550609136?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211104intro_MO_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTcwZDA3Mi1iYjNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=877iiON-jdah_oRu5PnYZd8lQtWnkmOOTmhOCf5ab-Q=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Mark Meuser
subject: What do 1993, 2010, and 2021 have in common?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Meuser for U
body:
|
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=dcb51d2a390b4e3b9014728cbeb212ea&_e=y6iBoo6GaWbXAqW3hlUfNuv6LWvMHo-eApaDBIddx8_XISGRs9s0AHYFcmSyGIUmkThpGaArhK-0GvDB5cRMbocgDLKOyvGcZSL7psdx7rMICCwsIy94TAucHDpY5U79E3h5IkAWWQi-a5pTcfvSYs_Nmj_avaWeyc8uH9nm4Lnbj3KXBo8Ff90kgLfxViKUBU7p6oTB0L9yUEeiW10RUX9SY0evC4NrkwesJAsuV5Buq3ZbF69WdFrDYtTxWiqs6OLHJgD2h7WJ4QMofuCTiFACsZOdkUGGUW-V-R2SRZJL5nhWPWWt2YWQTXp7AzMrozF4dqov6UijQL0r93Fzow%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

A red wave is about to hit our Nation!

After watching the election results in Virginia and New Jersey, it hit me... we've seen this before.

**Let's talk about some American History;**

**In 1993,** Bill and Hillary Clinton pushed socialized medicine on America. That year Virginia and New Jersey flipped from a Democrat to a Republican Governor.

Then in the 1994 midterm election, we saw a MASSIVE red wave across the Nation.

**In 2009,** Barrack Obama and the Democrats forced Obamacare down our throats. That year, Virginia and New Jersey flipped from a Democrat to a Republican Governor.

Then in the 2010 midterm election, we saw a MASSIVE red wave across the Nation.

**In 2021,** Joe Biden and the Democrats are forcing their socialist agenda on America. **On Tuesday, Virginia flipped from a Democrat to a Republican Governor, and New Jersey is still too close to call.**

And while we don't yet know what will happen in the 2022 midterm election, history and the dramatic results of these races show us that a red wave is starting. **It hit Virginia this week, and it will hit California next November.**

**We saw it in 1994, we saw it in 2010, and now it's starting in 2021!**

**Let's make it happen.**

I need your help of I'm going to jump on this wave. Running for office isn't an easy task and will require a lot of resources in a state as large as California.

[**Can you make a celebratory contribution of $5, $10, $25, or more today to help our campaign ride the red wave to victory in 2021?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=dcb51d2a390b4e3b9014728cbeb212ea&_e=y6iBoo6GaWbXAqW3hlUfNuv6LWvMHo-eApaDBIddx8_XISGRs9s0AHYFcmSyGIUmkThpGaArhK-0GvDB5cRMbocgDLKOyvGcZSL7psdx7rMICCwsIy94TAucHDpY5U79-kJddqf6jZ91Uhw10whjHGoqqhgQP8HLanH9T-ayOknkozpLStylCqbsCTA_r6n74IxNug5PVtzxPMAd_Z4DzuEFI2BjMgjN1EtWnYqId3D9Gnl86BHR9rYsQzclDRizh8CCR5_R2KSobWeQSjCesdbfrXApPam9M35_FENArYEmAcn9zjtqh6RfaurntcIdNpCSdtjMnOWKL4vGMnIHPg%3D%3D)

Catch you on the wave!

Mark Meuser
Republican for U.S. Senate, California

[** Donate Now >> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=dcb51d2a390b4e3b9014728cbeb212ea&_e=y6iBoo6GaWbXAqW3hlUfNuv6LWvMHo-eApaDBIddx8_XISGRs9s0AHYFcmSyGIUmkThpGaArhK-0GvDB5cRMbocgDLKOyvGcZSL7psdx7rMICCwsIy94TAucHDpY5U79bQ_g6gT0YQuL3n5MikXgi9GKYOgSUyaNqGN9c4158K9FOuPstMe6Hw-QfHnhuOdDxJZWRGbxQPOGlQHXDNPHB259Snqy8OSGOsBMpvBJeqQF4GEwDA6NoCNFqraF2e9FPV4c-uFkGV1IjGE_TQP-FQXtrVz8XY2dy-nxFGVJ26Insiqk3yKlp9VPJzLE1AnDgG_SLY693jm7hZmQm8i4Tg%3D%3D)

| | Paid for by Mark Meuser for U.S. Senate

body:
Hey there --
My name is Sarah. I'm reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.
According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump's brand new social media site? Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... _But I just checked our re cords -- why haven't you responded? Would you join Trump's site?_
**Please choose one of the following options in the next 25 minutes:**
__
**[Yes. I Stand With Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58694248:JYAyin2bN:m:1:3299561967:B21AB02E5FF015AAFFFE1145AC65CCBD:r)**
**[No. I Don 't Support Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58694248:JYAyin2bN:m:1:3299561967:B21AB02E5FF015AAFFFE1145AC65CCBD:r)**
President Trump promised some incredible things for his new site:
\-- NO blacklists
\-- NO shadow-banning
\-- NO Conservative censorship
**This site is built BY freedom-loving Patriots FOR freedom-loving Patriots.**
But taking on the Silicon Valley Liberals is a MONUMENTAL task. President Trump needs to know who really has his back, and who no longer supports him...
[**So would you join? I would really appreciate it if you answered right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58694248:JYAyin2bN:m:1:3299561967:B21AB02E5FF015AAFFFE1145AC65CCBD:r)
Thanks in advance for your response.
\-- Sarah

name: Matt Jacobs for Congress
subject: Help us today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress
body:
Peter, Matt Jacobs here writing you again. By now, you’ve heard my story and my background. You’ve heard how I’ve spent my career prosecuting some of America’s worst enemies and most dangerous criminals, including al-Qaeda terrorists child sex traffickers. You’ve also heard about my family’s background. About how my grandparents survived the Holocaust and came to America as refugees. About how this country welcomed them in and gave a second shot at life. And about how they achieved their American Dream. RIGHT NOW, I have a quick request of you: Will you step up and donate to my campaign so that I can afford to deliver this message to more voters in this district. [**SUPPORT**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=3faf3ac5d83149c28a92e160414f400e&_e=Y3Chxm4tK0kBSRSz59AZ3P6wMgM7uv3Hs3qYfypIV0zNYMjsmfDZSEFOfMIL6AF-71Ye8dsBxqUSqWGJCoWGkMA4vo3UCcAbzf7OUIFF-e9gH-k1FOuyr9Qysy1z9xIprk1lUzD8ERVGFrTkRlwpj6g3NLXaW2FVqbyD-41wQbsPXN8_Fo7ZlRHN3IObNhBPisT_6gXw0ItvMWnaLyG3HaraW_ftD84HaKfAFyZrPXYky15d4T9rZiH5QvIZXY1tXbwu1xoREx2MrOxSxH1EWGMaR3TA72lAtlNfvigHgtB8pklhlno94QHiUmj9jT47EMxM5PuGQYHlEB9VymCLvPRnsJ7UQ8kksP_HuFoD6jR8tAqKqvUpnKcMhlHyxYzMGnUuH3GJkL1wcuKAZMukVq0EN_YngzNdLmxsfd219UCazNeFQKxeW4bX-3nQZa3lolsxZP_LTS114y_gTxqkwsDV1_RxXbxWUaQmr5WtStc%3D) The reality is that campaigns are expensive. We have the winning message, but it takes resources to deliver that message to voters. And I need as much help as possible to spread the word. I’d be extremely grateful if you would join our team and make a contribution today. [**CONTRIBUTE**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=3faf3ac5d83149c28a92e160414f400e&_e=Y3Chxm4tK0kBSRSz59AZ3P6wMgM7uv3Hs3qYfypIV0zNYMjsmfDZSEFOfMIL6AF-71Ye8dsBxqUSqWGJCoWGkMA4vo3UCcAbzf7OUIFF-e9gH-k1FOuyr9Qysy1z9xIprk1lUzD8ERVGFrTkRlwpj6g3NLXaW2FVqbyD-41wQbsPXN8_Fo7ZlRHN3IObNhBPisT_6gXw0ItvMWnaLyG3HaraW_ftD84HaKfAFyZrPXYky15d4T9rZiH5QvIZXY1tXbwu1xoREx2MrOxSxH1EWFYIexZsO0iP0af4cMoxsNlMONkivPVQK7pi6vdbj5jQRWDzgvDH8uMSsdXSEyAMSuSp37b1x5qt-YK9BZmoA0fGRCI-Mn9humeEEF5YnfGDll0nTe2McXKY67a5okeB58z8kK9_LZTYz-vSwit9wNJPxuErq8AD1e9HK5slacpKhexz1U__ADsBuxnez0LoszCJ1nnppfKI6Yj87hMQTh4%3D) There’s so much on the line right now. In fact, the stakes have never been higher. Radical politicians are promoting socialism, pushing to defund our police, and leaving our borders unprotected. They’re colluding with Big Tech to shut down free speech, and they’re using Critical Race Theory (including in our kids’ schools) to divide us into separate racial groups instead of celebrating the American melting pot. They’re drawing false comparisons between Taliban and Hamas terrorists and free democracies like our country and Israel. Now is the time for all of us to step up and elect the right people to lead our community and country—common sense leaders who believe in the fundamental goodness of our nation and the greatness of our people. Will you join me and step up right now to help our campaign in CA-26? I fought tirelessly for this country in court. I’m fighting for this country every day on the campaign trial. And I’m ready to fight just as hard for America in Congress. Our future depends on it. And I need your help TODAY! [**HELP US**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=3faf3ac5d83149c28a92e160414f400e&_e=Y3Chxm4tK0kBSRSz59AZ3P6wMgM7uv3Hs3qYfypIV0zNYMjsmfDZSEFOfMIL6AF-71Ye8dsBxqUSqWGJCoWGkMA4vo3UCcAbzf7OUIFF-e9gH-k1FOuyr9Qysy1z9xIprk1lUzD8ERVGFrTkRlwpj6g3NLXaW2FVqbyD-41wQbsPXN8_Fo7ZlRHN3IObNhBPisT_6gXw0ItvMWnaLyG3HaraW_ftD84HaKfAFyZrPXYky15d4T9rZiH5QvIZXY1tXbwu1xoREx2MrOxSxH1EWH_EOksmnivc3BxntJ5v-TLGW7DF9ht2KAavbYmF7tPSjQULD_z6yA4oxk5sRTrDn7KMBhJ1JnWyZ5ZkImey-QOh7aQjhP_w3Nd7Jm9kSrZgX9QAxRJYRe_Sdc1cD6JTj-MTcYkb6ulM4WgsG0dA93NV3f5PhzLTYJzMI-Fs_0zDpjnyngzcstZBMOiIYwNuJSi-zVEZzzH0GvPwaeochJ8%3D) I’m deeply grateful for the support you’ve already provided. We’re on the path to victory, with your help, we’ll be able to deliver our message—a winning, pro-America message—to every voter in this district. [**DONATE**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=3faf3ac5d83149c28a92e160414f400e&_e=Y3Chxm4tK0kBSRSz59AZ3P6wMgM7uv3Hs3qYfypIV0zNYMjsmfDZSEFOfMIL6AF-71Ye8dsBxqUSqWGJCoWGkMA4vo3UCcAbzf7OUIFF-e9gH-k1FOuyr9Qysy1z9xIprk1lUzD8ERVGFrTkRlwpj6g3NLXaW2FVqbyD-41wQbsPXN8_Fo7ZlRHN3IObNhBPisT_6gXw0ItvMWnaLyG3HaraW_ftD84HaKfAFyZrPXYky15d4T9rZiH5QvIZXY1tXbwu1xoREx2MrOxSxH1EWAP00CGJP8gYT3JMnGE4YCTtXQeHQIL88rEgpzrlSNW0dPDiyGuLz3fE6AQgswShKaSVpIn-eHjTDNxqqfdIVarNGQI9i7vjSe--npIbOlH5flkZ8BKQFnRN3ANV1O4s8Pk2eZ1Og3_mLnYNXQYUM_zh2zpYYosH7wlexrwuO5Udz9hJur2iuFTMJqHkwdt0V_ZdLLRvPrrXK7sriIvhW3Y%3D) Thank you so much for your continued support. Sincerely, Matt Jacobs Candidate for U.S. Congress California’s 26th District | | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=3faf3ac5d83149c28a92e160414f400e&_e=Y3Chxm4tK0kBSRSz59AZ3HeS9a7VdmMjHWUR9nsZRO9YsFQkPUuzmghkZl8cIGzvME5PaPqei3ChkUjoT0e5DfPgoHN_vtZ7RYhnN3DtwWwXLi7VSXFHymho32LnTuVPVlcEyb44Rjm0kKwHGx-5ly6xkMPG03zj9zzMZopHOUyF97Ty8H6Kux_C-cfjryxNAxPte0k888Qun-KolKi0M-UcUXHC6W2F_wx4f0iACX4oViKiTYNPL9kRxMcXtJ-NRhpIIK7M5HiuWbF7oqKV8A%3D%3D) | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=3faf3ac5d83149c28a92e160414f400e&_e=Y3Chxm4tK0kBSRSz59AZ3ImwJx2f1ph6rYu4-R-5a4_RJi1Eym_SOxDfzHYFQ4QizqacNFLwQ8ldkuUiEMGsyGFS6ppbR7g316Ll05RJ9MlXPgQBYmQS73aUwKCGKJKgwBZVBUDa3tslqe7XGJbVbJQcsqX8a224pI0MYBcchEVOydeNjb6BjRUUZmvMDZPf_yojgUXFwRg6uR56HiVSq2Xh_NuIkJr08XFYj5n1GVFy6OD8eJNSd02cL82Ny_9B0NscwxksIaXsFz6M7vOFnw%3D%3D) | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=3faf3ac5d83149c28a92e160414f400e&_e=Y3Chxm4tK0kBSRSz59AZ3NqCzIxhmek6r0xzcORsXnZ9968nKm8SXZTYUTcXVY61xDmAXPj4xHVHcbCcCGB1DBd7nyNKYXNd8MEFcWd46kUCslZ8AtcIro4xoTuKQgG_1T-7T_2nRx9Nr82obSWckml-YRu20nITCRJWqKzBmBRgpXKCX0rK492Urzrjqz8HcNPwzX_87fpascUjYdhbpbZ8X5y03IAK2Mbrpzjw4ct76Ac615v3Y_-BIAa9agzJvopFt1X-H5EleEX-HseZGBL4z5PUC8g0m5-mbDNnKl8%3D) | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=3faf3ac5d83149c28a92e160414f400e&_e=Y3Chxm4tK0kBSRSz59AZ3LsXxo1jjnF5SnZhuqlxmA_ixYXievFjquJY2qUdnz4i4ENetOgNvdo1WUAq3e4JTUzm_eVIemxeHDbjPz0VHCkeGGD1iJ7QOovIjC-w-yrD9_oo51aKVKcuFMAlDg0-YXTez6LhkLn8jLPc-JvNc0r01UxnFXA86KvRoOC-v46jxIiA0evViTHbV8UZ9Dkt1ZGg_kYQWyWEW3OW5T8VAQnrdAmyNCkxHTGkbJBX3s4eGaVaxU4Ag2iAP0XGPAMj6jTNkllLOOeKcxAufAbFd1k%3D)

name: YOUR RESPONSE REQUESTED (via DCCC)
subject: you DON'T support Democrats?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
2O,OOO RESPONSES NEEDED TO HIT MY GOAL: | | | | **YOUR URGENT RESPONSE REQUESTED:**

Republicans are riding a wave of momentum like we've never seen before.

We're at a pivotal moment: If we don't turn the tide soon, Republicans could retake the Majority and destroy everything we've worked for. _**NO!**__**!**_

We still have time to save our House Democrats -- but we need to know you're behind us.

**So let us know: Are you committed to supporting Democrats up and down the ballot?**
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/0L9VcX_Gawf~) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---

This is a make-or-break moment for Democrats nationwide.

_\-- Republicans just scored a**STUNNING** upset in Virginia.
\-- They're now targeting **70** of our House Democrats for defeat.
\-- And the latest polls show them **AHEAD** in the fight for the House Majority._

**Bottom line: Republicans are riding a wave of momentum like we 've never seen before -- and if we don't turn the tide soon, we could be forced to watch everything we've worked for crumble before our very eyes.**

At this pivotal moment, we need you to remember how hard we worked to win our House Majority.

And we need you to imagine how horrifying it would be for the Republicans to barge back into power and utterly destroy our progress.

We still have time to turn the tide and help save our Democrats nationwide -- but not without your steadfast support.
**[So as we approach the MONUMENTAL 2022 elections, are you committed to supporting Democrats up and down the ballot, all across the country?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/6dzecpm9r_)**
| [YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/0L9VcX_Gawf~) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---
Thanks,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45888929&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEyMDQ1OTE4OAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45888929&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEyMDQ1OTE4OAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.
