So let us know: Are you committed to supporting Democrats up and down the ballot? | | ---|---|--- This is a make-or-break moment for Democrats nationwide. \-- Republicans just scored aSTUNNING upset in Virginia. \-- They're now targeting 70 of our House Democrats for defeat. \-- And the latest polls show them AHEAD in the fight for the House Majority. Bottom line: Republicans are riding a wave of momentum like we 've never seen before -- and if we don't turn the tide soon, we could be forced to watch everything we've worked for crumble before our very eyes. At this pivotal moment, we need you to remember how hard we worked to win our House Majority. And we need you to imagine how horrifying it would be for the Republicans to barge back into power and utterly destroy our progress. We still have time to turn the tide and help save our Democrats nationwide -- but not without your steadfast support. | | | ---|---|--- Thanks, DCCC Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: News from the Supreme Court:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Texas was just the tip of the iceberg. Reproductive freedom is under attack everywhere. This week, the Supreme Court heard arguments on Texas' extreme abortion ban. Shortly after, anti-choice politicians in Ohio went a step further and introduced legislation to completely ban abortion in the state.

**Texas was just the tip of the iceberg. Reproductive freedom is under attack everywhere.**

Whatever the Supreme Court decides in the Texas case will impact abortion rights all over the country. But it won’t end there -- the conservative majority on the Court will hear a direct challenge to _Roe v. Wade_ next month.

Here in Wisconsin, we already have a near-total abortion ban on the books that was written 172 years ago -- before the Civil War! The only thing stopping it from being enforced is _Roe v. Wade_. That means Wisconsin’s existing abortion ban could go back into effect if _Roe_ is overturned.

For too long, reproductive freedom has been an afterthought for most politicians. That’s how we got here, and it’s why we cannot afford to elect leaders who treat abortion rights like an extra credit project. It's a fundamental freedom, and I’m running for U.S. Senate because we desperately need a senator who will fight like hell to protect it.

The stakes couldn't be higher, but we can't sit around and wait for the next election. We can’t wait for the courts to save us either. There's something Congress can -- and must -- do right now to fight back against these unconstitutional attacks on reproductive freedom.

**[The House passed the Women's Health Protection Act in September, and the U.S. Senate must now do the same. Will you add your name to demand leaders in Washington pass this critical bill to protect reproductive freedom?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38308689/314870279/231235427?ms=em21_211104_sb8whp_adv_gq_act___SG_ettx&refcode=em21_211104_sb8whp_adv_gq_act___SG_ettx&source=em21_211104_sb8whp_adv_gq_act___SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211104_sb8whp_adv_gq_act___SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=8Dw%2BAbwgw%2Bw8ur4NvfYkq%2BNwlH6BGRnF3eVGZFq%2B8gZGUaHPCdQR5cxQ0fVe4VofhVoRe7ky4w5ythdBbP9ftFxAt6OI3vaiUilg14jHPwRmIEDLNhI1fiBIL2UxoO3nfPVfx1yLQ9OLs88%2BSUaZW4S%2BToq%2Bl2vKDaSZSgT5%2Bkk%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjgwNzA1Mi1iZjNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9QyfW18qF08-8owuWRoMe0-GJI4xXZlwpj6WDhngsQ8=&emci=3f72db94-ba3d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=62807052-bf3d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=18659593)**

subject: RELEASE: Hupfer Statement on Biden Mandate Overreach
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc
body:
Kyle Hupfer, who serves as Chairman of the Indiana Republican Party and General Counsel of the Republican National Committee issued this statement.. | | |
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/chairman-hupfer-statement-on-2021-indiana-inauguration-470934?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6c760684e3&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
**Contact:** Jake Oakman, [joakman@indiana.gop](mailto:joakman@indiana.gop) **Date:** November 4, 2021 **Hupfer Statement on Biden Mandate Overreach**
**INDIANAPOLIS **- Kyle Hupfer, who serves as Chairman of the Indiana Republican Party and General Counsel of the Republican National Committee, issued this statement on the Biden Administration’s vaccine mandate orders for private businesses:

“Joe Biden talked down vaccines during the campaign, promised to shut down the virus, and said vaccine mandates were not a policy he would pursue. Fast forward to today, and now he wants to put hard working Americans out of work if they refuse to take the vaccine. Make no mistake, I firmly believe the vaccines are safe, effective, and the best way to protect you and your families from COVID-19. However, the federal government has zero authority to force private business to impose this mandate on their employees. I applaud the RNC, Governor Holcomb, and other leaders throughout the country who are fighting this unlawful overreach.”

Earlier today[, Governor Eric Holcomb directed](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d2f6f04224&e=1acd9bb3d6) the Indiana Department of Labor to work with the Attorney General on a lawsuit challenging the mandates. The Republican National Committee [is also leading a legal challenge](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=96f74368fc&e=1acd9bb3d6) to the Biden Administration.
**-30-**

name: Jay Inslee
subject: A Pacific Northwest without salmon
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Our iconic salmon are rapidly declining. We must take action.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/_a-dsD~_jmfP/SGZOelBTRHRyaVY3ekYrYWx6bkVYR3ZTd0tLenh4Y1dMbG52K2R5WTlOUEk5Mkd6eGJCOG5OeW5pTEdPTmN0TjU1WWNwZWg4cllicnVEZXhQcWQ3YUJDdEpnMGV1ckdjNmY4OGRqM0tKL2M9S0/TUlnbm4rOGlITkYxaXBWRTNNMlN1VnRDaFVxTlBFVzF0bVRrUXBRZVpFTT0S1) Friend, It's not just humans that are under unprecedented strain as the climate changes. Our iconic salmon here in the Pacific Northwest are rapidly declining. We need to act to save our salmon and protect this valuable part of our way of life. That's why I'm proud to share that Senator Patty Murray and I recently announced that we'll be undertaking a joint federal-state process that will look at options for replacing the benefits provided by the Lower Snake River Dams, including investigating the potential breaching of those dams. **To tackle the challenge of protecting our region 's salmon, I believe we must take all options into consideration. [_If you 're with me, will you add your name to mine calling for bold leadership to protect our salmon?_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/p2ejHY-mLehb/SGZOelBTRHRyaVY3ekYrYWx6bkVYR3ZTd0tLenh4Y1dMbG52K2R5WTlOUEk5Mkd6eGJCOG5OeW5pTEdPTmN0TjU1WWNwZWg4cllicnVEZXhQcWQ3YUJDdEpnMGV1ckdjNmY4OGRqM0tKL2M9S0/TUlnbm4rOGlITkYxaXBWRTNNMlN1VnRDaFVxTlBFVzF0bVRrUXBRZVpFTT0S1)** | [Save Our Salmon »](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/V4dzSdpm9qc3/SGZOelBTRHRyaVY3ekYrYWx6bkVYR3ZTd0tLenh4Y1dMbG52K2R5WTlOUEk5Mkd6eGJCOG5OeW5pTEdPTmN0TjU1WWNwZWg4cllicnVEZXhQcWQ3YUJDdEpnMGV1ckdjNmY4OGRqM0tKL2M9S0/TUlnbm4rOGlITkYxaXBWRTNNMlN1VnRDaFVxTlBFVzF0bVRrUXBRZVpFTT0S1)
---
While salmon are an important part of life for so many of us in the Pacific Northwest, they are particularly irreplaceable when it comes to the culture and heritage of Tribes in our region.
While I'm entering into this process with an open mind, I do know that this challenge is an urgent one. The recommendations that emerge from this joint federal-state process will be complete by July '22.
We cannot let our children or our grandchildren grow up in a Pacific Northwest without salmon. But without decisive action, that's a very real possibility.
[**_Let 's speak out together to save our salmon. Sign on now to join me in calling for common-sense solutions to protect our beloved Salmon, here in Washington and across our region._**](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/p2ejHY-mLehb/SGZOelBTRHRyaVY3ekYrYWx6bkVYR3ZTd0tLenh4Y1dMbG52K2R5WTlOUEk5Mkd6eGJCOG5OeW5pTEdPTmN0TjU1WWNwZWg4cllicnVEZXhQcWQ3YUJDdEpnMGV1ckdjNmY4OGRqM0tKL2M9S0/TUlnbm4rOGlITkYxaXBWRTNNMlN1VnRDaFVxTlBFVzF0bVRrUXBRZVpFTT0S1)
Thank you, as always, for working on this crucial issue alongside me.
Very truly yours,
Jay

| Peter,

There are a lot of opinions about the results of the Virginia and New Jersey election this week, and I don’t think there’s one easy answer that explains everything. But I do think what we saw Tuesday night shows really strong evidence that Democrats ignore rural voters at their own peril.

Here at BACKROADS, we are working to change that. We can’t turn the tide of 40 years of Democratic inaction in rural communities overnight — It’s going to take sustained, committed support from folks like you.

body:
I know that a safer and more secure nation is within our reach because Mike Gallagher is leading the fight to keep America safe Peter, America’s national security is crumbling. Eight months ago, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris were handed a secure border and a comprehensive exit strategy from Afghanistan. _Now what do we have?_ A resurgent Taliban armed with American military equipment and a border crisis that’s overwhelming law enforcement and endangering our entire country. This is a disaster –– but I know that a safer and more secure nation is within our reach. **I say that because Mike Gallagher is leading the fight in Congress to keep America safe.. I can’t think of anybody on Capitol Hill more committed to national security than him.** Peter, we need more people like Mike Gallagher in Congress. He’s a veteran of the Marine Corps, a fearless problem solver, and a leader who consistently stands up to communist China and other authoritarian regimes. **Mike is a fierce defender of freedom, democracy, and our American values, and I am proud to** _[**stand by clean_body: I know that a safer and more secure nation is within our reach because Mike Gallagher is leading the fight to keep America safe Peter, America’s national security is crumbling. Eight months ago, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris were handed a secure border and a comprehensive exit strategy from Afghanistan. Now what do we have? A resurgent Taliban armed with American military equipment and a border crisis that’s overwhelming law enforcement and endangering our entire country. This is a disaster –– but I know that a safer and more secure nation is within our reach. I say that because Mike Gallagher is leading the fight in Congress to keep America safe.. I can’t think of anybody on Capitol Hill more committed to national security than him. Peter, we need more people like Mike Gallagher in Congress. He’s a veteran of the Marine Corps, a fearless problem solver, and a leader who consistently stands up to communist China and other authoritarian regimes. Mike is a fierce defender of freedom, democracy, and our American values, and I am proud to his mission to safeguard our incredible country. My very best, Ambassador Nikki Haley | | | | Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin | | P.O. BOX 1027 - GREEN BAY, WI 54305 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

body:
This is our best opportunity in decades to flip Iowa blue
| | |

clean_body: | | | | Today we are proud to announce that our new Amazon Firestick app is live!!! Hi Peter Willis - Sheriff Lamb here, I just wanted to reach out with some exciting updates. Our goal for the American Sheriff Network was to tell stories from Sheriff Offices around the county. In my travels I had often heard from you all about how much you missed your ride alongs. So this summer we launched our web-based subscription network. But we have a secret... we have been working behind the scenes on a new app to make sure you have the best experience on the planet. Today we are proud to announce that our new Amazon Firestick app is live!!! That's right... you can now sit back and watch all our great content in your in your living room on your Amazon Firestick enabled TV. After you sign up at please make sure you watch all the great content on your Amazon Firestick. After you sign up at American Sheriff.com just follow these two steps: 1\. On your Amazon Firestick enabled TV search for American Sheriff Network and download the app. 2\. Login with the email and password you created to start your account at That's it! Sit back and enjoy. More apps are coming soon for all of the Apple TV, Samsung and Android fans! Stay tuned. It's not available on Netflix. It's not available on Amazon Prime. It's not available on Hulu. It's not available on any other streaming network. This is the only place you can watch exciting new episodes of real law enforcement encounters. Please take the ride with us and start watching now! Thank you, Sheriff Mark Lamb Founder | American Sheriff Network For questions please reach out to us at mailto:support@americansheriff.com?subject=American%20Sheriff%20Network%20-%20Support&body= "support@americansheriff.com") | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- American Sheriff Network 4445 Corporation Ln, Ste 264, Virginia Beach, VA 23462

name: Team Nikki
subject: Did you see this?
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Team—

We wanted to make sure you saw Nikki’s message from yesterday about what we saw in Virginia. It’s super important.

The bottom line? After more than 20 years of Republican Governors, we need to try something new if we’re going to defeat Ron DeSantis.

Nikki is running because Florida is worth fighting for, and we deserve leaders who fight for Floridians.

We’re not recycling the old playbook. Instead, we’re building a broad, winning movement for change.

If you stand with us on this, click here to chip in now and help us build the campaign we’ll need to win next year. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-
nov-2021?refcode=104postelection]

—Team Nikki

--Begin Forwarded Message--
From: Nikki Fried
Subject: This is clear: it’s time for #SomethingNew
To: Team Nikki
Time: November 3, 2021 at 5:21:06 PM

Dear Friends,

Many outstanding candidates won in Florida last night. If you were tired of hearing pundits write us off as a red state, last night’s impressive showing of Democratic power in every corner of Florida proves that we can and we will win.

Last night’s results nationwide also make clear that we can’t recycle the same people and playbook and expect to succeed.

If it wasn't clear before, it's clear now — it's time for Democrats and NPAs to try #SomethingNew — new people, ideas, and campaigns to break the system.

That’s exactly how we’re going to beat Ron DeSantis next year, and it’s why I’m asking for your help. Click here to chip in and show you’re ready to win in Florida next year. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-nov-2021?refcode=113postelection]

I ran for office for the first time in 2018. Nobody thought that a Jewish woman from Miami could become Florida’s Commissioner of Agriculture.

We proved them wrong. And we’re going to do it again next year.

I’m asking you directly, team: don’t be discouraged by last night’s results. We are going to defeat Ron DeSantis next year.

We can’t get this done with the same tactics. Instead, we need to build a massive and bold movement for change. I’m asking you to click here to make a donation so we can do just
that. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-nov-2021?refcode=113postelection]

Thanks for sticking with us in this fight. Because of you, we’re going to win.

Warmly,

Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: "No one elected him to be FDR"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, this
happened right after corporate Democrats lost the Virginia Governor’s
race: Corporate Democrats started blaming progressives for the GOP
victory.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/81820?refcode=em20211104-20331&t=1002&akid=20331%2E1203867%2Es--6Vx ]Tweet from reporter Heather Cagyle reads Dem members are already
texting me blaming progressives for debacle in Virginia

When corporate Democrats lose, they blame progressives. They did it when
the House majority shrunk after the 2020 election. They’ll do it at every
turn because they will never admit responsibility. Yet, it’s the
Democratic establishment’s failure to deliver for the people that weakens
the party in elections. Corporate Dems listen to corporate lobbyists
instead of the people. This is the problem. NOT progressives advocating
for strong transformative policies.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/81820?refcode=em20211104-20331&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=20331%2E1203867%2Es--6Vx ]We need to show that we won’t back off our calls for economic, social,
racial, and environmental justice. Can you rush a $3
donation to Justice Democrats to show our power? This is part of our
response to smears from the Democratic establishment.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/81820?refcode=em20211104-20331&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=20331%2E1203867%2Es--6Vx ]Contribute

One Virginia corporate Democrat, Rep. Abigail Spanberger, continued her
centrism after the centrist Democrat lost the Virginia Governor’s race.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/81820?refcode=em20211104-20331&t=1023&akid=20331%2E1203867%2Es--6Vx ]Tweet from reporter Kaitlan Collins reads Nobody elected him to be
F.D.R., they elected him to be normal and stop the chaos,' Rep. Abigail
Spanberger, a Virginia Democrat, said regarding the Biden agenda.

Joe Manchin followed it up by calling America a “center-right” country:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/81820?refcode=em20211104-20331&t=1024&akid=20331%2E1203867%2Es--6Vx ]Tweet from reporter Kaitlan Collins reads 'We can't go too far left,'
Sen. Manchin tells @JohnBerman. 'This is not a center-left or a left
country. We are a center — if anything, a little center-right country,
that's being shown — and we ought to be able to recognize that.'

The only way we can fight the Democratic establishment’s smears and its
commitment to Wall Street, fossil fuel executives, corporate lobbyists,
and health insurance companies is by building our progressive movement.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/81820?refcode=em20211104-20331&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&akid=20331%2E1203867%2Es--6Vx ]Can you chip in $3 to grow our movement and elect more
Justice Democrats to Congress? We must show the strength of progressives
right now, as the onslaught of smears from corporate Democrats continues.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1026&akid=20331%2E1203867%2Es--6Vx ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1027&akid=20331%2E1203867%2Es--6Vx ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211104-20331-footer&t=1028&refcode2=20331_1203867_s--6Vx&akid=20331%2E1203867%2Es--6Vx

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1029&akid=20331%2E1203867%2Es--6Vx

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Hi folks, I’m Justin and I’m Michael’s campaign manager. We’re now about a year out from the 2022 midterm elections, and this race has really ramped up. I wanted to reach out to you personally to tell you what it’s going to take to win this race. You’re a critical part of Michael’s team so I hope you’ll read through, [_**then pitch in $10 or any amount to re-elect Michael to the Senate and keep Colorado blue.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38309686/314874976/-1836949484?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211104_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmQxZjFhNi1jODNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KvMzEAE9GItWgLuPD_UriTtc9IjenHkkwjM5ZmK0gTc=) **THE STATE OF THIS RACE** Michael is running to build on the progress he’s achieved for Colorado’s families. He’s expanded the Child Tax Credit, and is working to pass it for another year to cut taxes for middle and lower income families and Michael secured a path toward historic investments for Colorado’s infrastructure. Michael is being targeted by National Republicans and people around the country are saying we “ought to not ignore [Colorado] anymore,” (Chuck Todd today on MSNBC). You see, the National GOP raised $76 million to flip seats like Michael’s and eight right-wing GOP opponents jumped into the race. The GOP primary field is stacked with candidates attacking Michael’s record — one plastered Colorado airwaves with misleading ads — and spreading conspiracy theories, so this race is anything but safe. With the fundraising strength of the National GOP, your support will help Michael fend off these attacks. **WHAT IT TAKES TO WIN** Winning an election is hard work — especially in a competitive state like Colorado. Building long-term relationships with voters, establishing digital campaign infrastructure, and hiring and training organizers is critical to re-electing Michael to the Senate. Our key priorities in the coming months are:
* Hiring key staff — from organizers, to our digital and finance teams.
* Building a rapid response program so that we can fend off GOP attacks that distort Michael’s record.
* Telling the story of Michael’s achievements for Coloradans — on climate change, health care and more — so voters head to the polls knowing the progress he has made for our state and our country.

With the GOP’s wealthy and extreme slate of opponents, we can expect them to get plenty of airtime. We can fight back by honing in on these priorities. But it’s going to take a mighty grassroots effort to get there. **WHERE YOU COME IN** Michael is running a grassroots-driven campaign. He knows that corporate PAC and federal lobbyist money fuels a corruption of inaction in Washington and he’s working to restore our democracy by fighting for campaign finance reform and delivering progress for working people. **Michael is counting on your support so he can continue fighting for Coloradans in the Senate. Please pitch in $10 — or what works for your budget — to re-elect Michael and defend our slim Senate majority.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **** | | | ****[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38309687/314874977/-1836949484?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211104_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmQxZjFhNi1jODNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KvMzEAE9GItWgLuPD_UriTtc9IjenHkkwjM5ZmK0gTc=)****

body:
The path to protecting and expanding our House Majority runs right through California.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38309707/314875109/1309164061?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmE4ZTAzZC1jOTNkLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PpTjFrW-y9ZeGp7kHoitkgC2kbjQ2fNIheKUQdxULU8=)

**Listen, I’m pulling out my hair:** | **RealClearPolitics: GOP Invests EARLY in California**
---

name: Poll Worker Update
subject: Calling all Patriots!
body:
Sign up to make the difference!

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=poll_worker_recuitment_3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Hi Friend -- Election officials need to follow the law. End of story. While Republicans in the Legislature work to resolve the issues outlined by the audit, the Republican Party of Wisconsin and our County Party's are still hard at work recruiting poll workers for every polling location ahead of our crucial elections in 2022. **Friend, we need to submit these names by the end of the month!** Thank you to all those who have stepped up and signed up to be a paid poll worker already. Peter,

Like so many Americans, I watched the scenes of Afghanistan's fall with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

**I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe**. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Peter - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $6 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7f3f50593bd7452b8900d546acbe221e&_e=kIrrAmcPDRx40M0Lc9UOkVsil-QdMTyv8M9Q1SycauYej5EaLMbCTm5TT16YgTBgUiqUumJbLfg9W2vsvR2tDq5AYdsa5xnaFmIphiqUbh3Yjy-cVT0NLvy0z9bCNanWyawfEqLVvjQfmcJHczzxAv4AL0jmXUecwQlAi3Ogz9nOSlfN8QaVO8edCPkeGevfFg7M8v4wyjjW67_cpIxoDmc2I4H2EEgbS50Peg5j6sJx-gDIOJFfzVNK1wpk9GCPHbHaQIEF6n4feZ6eGkALJqNssEGu3XBZZ9z-SX65ETCBSHHGWfZDd-laeYEqrAJtX2jHNNGIejCzPCJnYU0-RbQi9hMKpxwCGI7uzdP2H0O8OkPL4QlaEbPmZa9IgvDw0QQlVX-HzzM90xtLxMp3fX8qXrHqfL5nBUAvb0mwlEmxJP_iZeOnzygdbXK79zYod9HB1JnFSdmcFWIHxEA-5A4lFqcyn3ZOGMYm4AU8Z98%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7f3f50593bd7452b8900d546acbe221e&_e=kIrrAmcPDRx40M0Lc9UOkVsil-QdMTyv8M9Q1SycauYej5EaLMbCTm5TT16YgTBgUiqUumJbLfg9W2vsvR2tDq5AYdsa5xnaFmIphiqUbh3Yjy-cVT0NLvy0z9bCNanWyawfEqLVvjQfmcJHczzxAv4AL0jmXUecwQlAi3Ogz9nOSlfN8QaVO8edCPkeGevfFg7M8v4wyjjW67_cpIxoDmc2I4H2EEgbS50Peg5j6sJx-gDIOJFfzVNK1wpk9GCPRb1aZSKDJrs5H8_Bsbn5VbvFbiOe-mgINlVm4QWtCuKihV6n3JiFKh9qAAt8t_Y7KDd2WcdEGfuq37D6CSRxI-T_-F1v7jD82M_SutNZVThu1TXS2INMVyDHlnzLqh1HdM7dYXrBSy89AlFFNLpWsH6FoE-MmtK0Mt6HLthDwxOZRwyawzVku5aY5M8edZ3makOVhinquvjVP7KyEeHScy4EuK7upzEiwZKT79WthhA%3D)
Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Peter and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7f3f50593bd7452b8900d546acbe221e&_e=kIrrAmcPDRx40M0Lc9UOkVsil-QdMTyv8M9Q1SycauYej5EaLMbCTm5TT16YgTBgUiqUumJbLfg9W2vsvR2tDq5AYdsa5xnaFmIphiqUbh3Yjy-cVT0NLvy0z9bCNanWyawfEqLVvjQfmcJHczzxAv4AL0jmXUecwQlAi3Ogz9nOSlfN8QaVO8edCPkeGevfFg7M8v4wyjjW67_cpIxoDmc2I4H2EEgbS50Peg5j6sJx-gDIOJFfzVNK1wpk9GCPnvDXJ8hp-ZND3sEOX8gLzo6Ry8OmMxPKuG4z7nW-4Y3kqFPb1u2j93fxaIGD2X1vsZo0Q1ztu-f__xQWadUi_HGo71kJSK_8GoYDhm_hiErcp25FFa6fyMd7GsVXQwapJ5s0j8PnX621t-46EDg9NXgaHQUGqm-kdKtqj1hsRGT_blcpTJZjvU31yO3NSvcpMhKMHHF87_mNmwJBnKwu2XLEbRCQf_IquVZADzpboTg%3D)

This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. [**Can I count on you to join my team with a donation of $6 - to mark my sixth anniversary of thwarting a terrorist attack?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7f3f50593bd7452b8900d546acbe221e&_e=kIrrAmcPDRx40M0Lc9UOkVsil-QdMTyv8M9Q1SycauYej5EaLMbCTm5TT16YgTBgUiqUumJbLfg9W2vsvR2tDq5AYdsa5xnaFmIphiqUbh3Yjy-cVT0NLvy0z9bCNanWyawfEqLVvjQfmcJHczzxAv4AL0jmXUecwQlAi3Ogz9nOSlfN8QaVO8edCPkeGevfFg7M8v4wyjjW67_cpIxoDmc2I4H2EEgbS50Peg5j6sJx-gDIOJFfzVNK1wpk9GCPmHRUhBtlDYlBTBtmYLgLF4udo1Offg4OOwivAiIqiadkAAePVWc1PGihbofp2hGl9lvRLD6TLttiFbyrG7elE61_FTys5l7t80xqZerXOaPdwF3W6ofch2zi32xZJ4wX3FVEjopd9QyiTWPFwOzWsnnP0uLMlQxHjB8Etgfd2St_Kf1bADLJoGopBCjQL5GHZdufX_6QtOvp8sMuB_VgeOe39R2FuR_T7aH5-z0sAuo%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7f3f50593bd7452b8900d546acbe221e&_e=kIrrAmcPDRx40M0Lc9UOkVsil-QdMTyv8M9Q1SycauYej5EaLMbCTm5TT16YgTBgUiqUumJbLfg9W2vsvR2tDq5AYdsa5xnaFmIphiqUbh3Yjy-cVT0NLvy0z9bCNanWyawfEqLVvjQfmcJHczzxAv4AL0jmXUecwQlAi3Ogz9nOSlfN8QaVO8edCPkeGevfFg7M8v4wyjjW67_cpIxoDmc2I4H2EEgbS50Peg5j6sJx-gDIOJFfzVNK1wpk9GCP5034HBXpDeIbrFBds47rItifqFTaCGB9wj-AVOOIHiQCwJfiAZUqnSnytvNoANEUgswl_3L9Db0vd1DH_PGNxZaQlO9zXrFYiNQY-YN1nThLKcB1KcHTgMA_Ro3T-_cnCkKIjyHPmRLEyK4v6UqZkGa9aT8_QWwtv_uwvwHiOmzQ-cG7tPJ-_bQHaLkQDN9sIlzF2FFtyZXSmHuJcEKVg9LFrFemGSkJ6FsOf8kNoOE%3D)

Alek Skarlatos

name: Katie Britt
subject: Biden’s Plan: pay MILLIONS to incentivize breaking our laws
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
Peter, Right now, America is in the midst of one of the WORST inflation spikes because of Biden’s careless spending. _So what is Joe Biden planning to do about it?_ **He’s in talks to pour MILLIONS into a plan that will PAY illegal ** **immigrants reparations for blatantly IGNORING our laws. **

clean_body: First Virginia, then Wisconsin. | Friend, Last night definitively proved America is sick and tired of the radical Left and its “woke” agenda. We have FLIPPED Virginia, and next, we’re going to FLIP the battleground state of Wisconsin! The people of Virginia have rejected Joe Biden and the Democrats’ platform of skyrocketing inflation, surging crime, open borders, and critical race theory in our children’s schools. And with Biden’s net approval in Wisconsin now plummeting to a record low of -11 , radical liberal Tony Evers is the most vulnerable Democrat governor in the nation. This historic moment calls to mind the Tea Party surge of 2010, Friend. One landmark victory like flipping the blue state of Virginia can fuel the entire red wave that will soon sweep the country next year. And this is just the beginning... Battleground state by battleground state, we have the opportunity to dismantle the Democrats’ electoral path for years to come. That’s why on the heels of this great victory in Virginia, I’m counting on YOUR critical support to help me seize the momentum and TAKE THE LEAD in our fight to flip Wisconsin. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

name: John Fetterman
subject: SO deeply grateful 😭
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
All signs are pointing to the fact that ours will be the most competitive and expensive race in the country in 2022.
#
Hey — it's John. Gisele and I wanted to pass along a simple (but super important) message: **Thank you.**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36940?refcode=em20211104-3342&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3342%2E434096%2E0hvhic)
Our campaign seriously couldn't have gotten this far without YOU, Peter. Not a single part of this campaign would be possible without _you + the 11,145 incredibly generous folks_ who made it a point to chip in online during the month of October.
**Since we pledged to never accept a cent from any corporate PACs or the fossil fuel industry, we really do mean it when we say this campaign is powered by all of yinz.** And the whole family is SO deeply grateful. 😭
As we count down the months until the 2022 midterm elections, we're fighting hard to keep scaling up our statewide operations, plan grassroots events, and spread our bold + inclusive Democratic message to voters. **We need to make serious investments in those integral campaign priorities, and FAST.** So I need to ask:
**[Peter, would you be willing to chip in $5 to help build the grassroots campaign that will flip this Senate seat blue in 2022? Gisele and I would be deeply grateful for any support you can send our way today.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36940?refcode=em20211104-3342&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3342%2E434096%2E0hvhic)**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36940?refcode=em20211104-3342&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3342%2E434096%2E0hvhic)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36940?refcode=em20211104-3342&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3342%2E434096%2E0hvhic)**
Thank you for believing in our campaign, and thank you for trusting in me to flip this Senate seat blue so we can deliver for working people across Pennsylvania.
Your support means the world to me.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. If you didn't get a chance to chip in before October's big deadline, it's not too late — all signs are pointing to the fact that ours will be the most competitive and expensive race in the country in 2022. **[With that in mind, will you be among the first folks from 18326 to donate this month so we can keep our foot on the gas? Thank you so much in advance.🙏](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36940?refcode=em20211104-3342&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=3342%2E434096%2E0hvhic)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211104-3342-footer&t=24&refcode2=3342_434096_0hvhic&akid=3342%2E434096%2E0hvhic)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

Help me signify this incredible announcement with a donation to my campaign today! With the dust still settling from the Virginia and New Jersey elections, it's becoming increasingly clear that voters across the country are ready to reject Joe Biden and his socialist agenda, which only works to indoctrinate our kids to hate America through Critical Race Theory, endanger our communities by being soft on crime, and make groceries and goods more unaffordable as the cost of living rises. name: Jesse Sullivan
subject: what Virginia means to Illinois
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois |
body:
This is the start of something big in our nation, as common sense folks rise up and reject the government overreach into our homes, schools, and lives [](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=96afe14decc340eaa90462f1a46a7a40&_e=zUVT9AIYugtPloWCseBdlpPuUljXAwaAPE3xZPy8FLph8PzpudyGodXgteeolTY8mRhaKlMsTX449-I8xTtRyd35ChATbYMSNCkDICIGuVJ1YLAwCDMQCH52STUI7WaUUtGJWOIQCI80cpICPDMH0GFllNx0xqH2J97zX_PFmgQ7w2CoQFHeMZvR0HbtjlWUbO7etEktchW6T4fpKeTO1Eta2-YlmOxCv40Vn7Rbr4-Rk1WctHjNTX_Mf8wOc0FomqFBDT-NBl-5NJG881C6-OKKwykSWhfmGGjdyIHJfwQy1TyugNHUHLROeMyEY6IwB9jUZAkJfGXOc8ptnJAexZxNjq7EueU40Qb3ktWbtXd4U_EclM4M5CpzcpyNtPJUXxQIMEtv14XQliFxwxOi3-nWoWcWIj_O048t-PEM_ueXTbF53TfOKB_5kK02_gy0zfxNiOVIolw41z6Wkt0Dgcc38aQypSyy6i7WPOvw6vrwSyX8Lxh2sJl_019cBmbi) | |
---
Friend,

What do you think the victory in Virginia meant? Let me tell you what I think.

This is the start of something big in our nation, as common sense folks rise up and reject the government overreach into our homes, schools, and lives.
[**JOIN ME - RISE UP**](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=96afe14decc340eaa90462f1a46a7a40&_e=zUVT9AIYugtPloWCseBdlpPuUljXAwaAPE3xZPy8FLph8PzpudyGodXgteeolTY8mRhaKlMsTX449-I8xTtRyd35ChATbYMSNCkDICIGuVJ1YLAwCDMQCH52STUI7WaUUtGJWOIQCI80cpICPDMH0GFllNx0xqH2J97zX_PFmgQ7w2CoQFHeMZvR0HbtjlWUbO7etEktchW6T4fpKeTO1Eta2-YlmOxCv40Vn7Rbr4-Rk1WctHjNTX_Mf8wOc0FomqFBDT-NBl-5NJG881C6-My_FDB7wQHaRU3-xTMA2B0Lfpr2zmKpK_bsgOTaPRmBv4Li3gnoUGh5Z5r5ScU_pu17v1qgkLRtararqEEIxAforthKdo4hqznnfKHw6qHAOJyq30l2fQ8xgASsnJWWzXBTMfHZd63xEXgZfgfgVCSB_nQjV7I9qlISfqUZOMVCUpKrfMkFCQsGToEf8MUSOnmUDBHTDt4QznRrT469oG_iaOzea3RJtkSCJeuieF43)
The election in Virginia showed that parents' voices will not be ignored. American families are done with the government invading every aspect of our lives.

And we the people are not just saying “no” to the failed leadership and bad policies of overreaching politicians.

We’re saying yes to creating jobs. We’re saying yes to securing the safety of our neighborhoods. We’re saying yes to putting parents back into their children’s lives. And we’re saying yes to making our state strong.

Together we can move beyond the era of high taxes, high crime, and self-seeking career politicians. I think it’s about time we restore some common sense conservative values to our great state of Illinois.

Are you ready for Illinois to be the next Virginia? [**If you are, join me today.**](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=96afe14decc340eaa90462f1a46a7a40&_e=zUVT9AIYugtPloWCseBdlpPuUljXAwaAPE3xZPy8FLph8PzpudyGodXgteeolTY8mRhaKlMsTX449-I8xTtRyd35ChATbYMSNCkDICIGuVJ1YLAwCDMQCH52STUI7WaUUtGJWOIQCI80cpICPDMH0GFllNx0xqH2J97zX_PFmgQ7w2CoQFHeMZvR0HbtjlWUbO7etEktchW6T4fpKeTO1Eta2-YlmOxCv40Vn7Rbr4-Rk1WctHjNTX_Mf8wOc0FomqFBDT-NBl-5NJG881C6-MAdLGnE8eyvwsKNElVuT6yjdJjbPZSBQC9DTd_e2cHvfoyOZ37-NID0cwXuKyGXS_PTzROJ9DvvtZt1zlR4JQYBn_zE7WTsMcLgIBpnTuBsyLtwEbBdpVfb9dclPJQByl6olUaGwo1PeRxHSTBZ6Ei8OzBcbZys4xfy6Qtul7312g8eqbNhfSoFs2CN2fmYpbmEBE_kemiZHzdTwR51wdh-zO91NT6zZ2gwzHODr6fe)
Thank you,

Jesse Sullivan

clean_body: This is the start of something big in our nation, as common sense folks rise up and reject the government overreach into our homes, schools, and lives | | Friend, What do you think the victory in Virginia meant? Let me tell you what I think. This is the start of something big in our nation, as common sense folks rise up and reject the government overreach into our homes, schools, and lives. The election in Virginia showed that parents' voices will not be ignored. American families are done with the government invading every aspect of our lives. And we the people are not just saying “no” to the failed leadership and bad policies of overreaching politicians. We’re saying yes to creating jobs. We’re saying yes to securing the safety of our neighborhoods. We’re saying yes to putting parents back into their children’s lives. And we’re saying yes to making our state strong. Together we can move beyond the era of high taxes, high crime, and self-seeking career politicians. I think it’s about time we restore some common sense conservative values to our great state of Illinois. Are you ready for Illinois to be the next Virginia? Thank you, Jesse Sullivan | | | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois | | 111 E Douglas St, Petersburg, IL 62675 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

| | Hello – Senate control is on the line here in Iowa. Republican Chuck Grassley just announced he’s running for re-election, and if he wins an _eighth term_ , Democrats may very well lose our Senate majority for the next 2 years. Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs have already raised tens of millions of dollars to spend trying to defeat me, but I have something even stronger: Grassroots donors like you. **My campaign has set a goal of getting 100 new donors today to help me defeat Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and expand our Senate majority – but right now, we’re still coming up short:** [**Please, can I count on you to join my campaign to defeat Chuck Grassley by making a donation of any amount before midnight tonight? I’m not taking any corporate PAC money, so I need you in this fight if we’re going to turn Iowa blue and defend our Democratic majority in the Senate.**](https://helixcampaigns.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c572a416be67f7bfaa3f8dd8d&id=41cc663dbd&e=b8263aaeab) I’m running for Senate because after a lifetime of Chuck Grassley in the Senate, we need someone representing Iowa, leading progressive causes, taking on the special interests... and not doing the bidding of Grassley’s donors. Together, we will win this race. Thank you, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)

name: Team Booker
subject: Do you believe, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Do you believe that Kentucky deserves a brighter future? Do you believe
that justice should mean something and not just be a word? Do you believe
that we can come together from the hood to the holler to transform our
future?

We do. That’s why we’re reaching out to all 120 counties in Kentucky —
from Laurel to Livingston. From Pikeville to the Purchase. From the hood
to the holler.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12614?refcode=em20211104-1146&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=1146%2E346206%2EtF0eqY ]If you’re with us, please join us as we build out our organizing
program and chip in $5 or whatever you’re able to afford
to. Your donation will go towards fueling our volunteer organizing — and
to spread our message across Kentucky, so more people can join in our
vision for Kentucky's future.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12614?refcode=em20211104-1146&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1146%2E346206%2EtF0eqY ]Contribute $5

Peter, we’re
doing this outreach because we believe that the more Kentuckians we meet,
the stronger our movement to bring a brighter future will be. And we’re
doing this the only way we know how: from the grassroots up.

We shocked the world last year when Charles ran for Senate the first time.
And take it from us: when it comes to a grassroots campaign like ours,
early investments and preparation are key. What we are able to invest from
today through the rest of 2021 will have a huge impact on our success.

We believe that change is possible. But change starts by building
relationships with Kentuckians who’ve been left behind — and doing it
early. To do it right, we need the resources to start NOW.

It’s time to come together and fight for the future we
deserve, Peter. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/12614?refcode=em20211104-1146&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1146%2E346206%2EtF0eqY ]Please chip
in $5 or whatever you can afford for our campaign and help
us jump start our organizing program — and to help us reach all 120
counties in our Commonwealth.

Thank you,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211104-1146-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1146_346206_tF0eqY&akid=1146%2E346206%2EtF0eqY

clean_body: [1]Charles Booker Peter, Do you believe that Kentucky deserves a brighter future? Do you believe that justice should mean something and not just be a word? Do you believe that we can come together from the hood to the holler to transform our future? We do. That’s why we’re reaching out to all 120 counties in Kentucky — from Laurel to Livingston. From Pikeville to the Purchase. From the hood to the holler. [ ]If you’re with us, please join us as we build out our organizing program and chip in $5 or whatever you’re able to afford to. Your donation will go towards fueling our volunteer organizing — and to spread our message across Kentucky, so more people can join in our vision for Kentucky's future. [ ]Contribute $5 Peter, we’re doing this outreach because we believe that the more Kentuckians we meet, the stronger our movement to bring a brighter future will be. And we’re doing this the only way we know how: from the grassroots up. We shocked the world last year when Charles ran for Senate the first time. And take it from us: when it comes to a grassroots campaign like ours, early investments and preparation are key. What we are able to invest from today through the rest of 2021 will have a huge impact on our success. We believe that change is possible. But change starts by building relationships with Kentuckians who’ve been left behind — and doing it early. To do it right, we need the resources to start NOW. It’s time to come together and fight for the future we deserve, Peter. [ ]Please chip in $5 or whatever you can afford for our campaign and help us jump start our organizing program — and to help us reach all 120 counties in our Commonwealth. Thank you, Team Booker Contribute to Charles Booker:

subject: King's Chronicle Newsletter #3

body:
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_q4_em?refcode=newsletter_header]
JOIN US [https://www.mobilize.us/johnkingforgovernor/event/419617/]
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_q4_em?refcode=newsletter&refcode2=5d346244-ce3d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_q4_em?refcode=newsletter&refcode2=5d346244-ce3d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8] DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_q4_em?refcode=newsletter&refcode2=5d346244-ce3d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8]
CONTACT [info@johnkingforgovernor.com]
The King's Chronicle: November 4, 2021 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_q4_em?refcode=newsletter_title]
Happy Thursday and welcome to the 3rd edition of the King's Chronicle! Before we dive into what John and the team have been up to over the past couple of weeks, we think it's important to address the (GOP) elephant in the room.
Tuesday's election results were not what we'd hoped for, but they did make one thing clear: in 2022, we can't afford to nominate cookie cutter candidates. We need to elect leaders who represent the diversity of our party, who will progress us forward to a more equitable future, and who won't back down when it comes to fighting for transformative change. John King is that candidate, and he's Maryland's best shot at flipping the governor's mansion blue in 2022. We're not giving up, and neither should you.
Onward,
-Team King
P.S. If you don't have time to read this entire newsletter, consider chipping in what you can now to support our movement to elect John King as America's first Afro-Latino governor: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jk4gov?refcode=em_20211104_newsletter [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jk4gov?refcode=em_20211104_newsletter]
Team King Updates
TALKING BOUT TREES : Today John released his plan to make Maryland a leader in the fight to combat the climate crisis and mitigate the effects of climate change. To read more about his plans to create good green jobs, transition to renewable energy, reverse centuries long systemic environmental injustice, protect the Bay, and plant 5 million new trees in Maryland! --> text CLIMATE to 48178 .
FLU SHOTS IN ARMS : Have you gotten your flu shot yet? John and Team just got theirs! Find out where you can get for yours here: www.vaccines.gov/find-vaccines/ [%20https://www.vaccines.gov/find-vaccines/%20]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_q4_em?refcode=em_20211104_newsletter [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_q4_em?refcode=em_20211104_newsletter]TEXT US : Our new number is live! Be the first to know about everything going on at John King for Governor HQ by joining our SMS list today! Sign up now by texting KING to 48178!
By submitting your mobile number you consent to receive recurring text messages from John King for Governor. Message & Data Rates May Apply. Text HELP for Info. Text STOP to opt out. No purchase necessary.
John in the News [https://johnkingforgovernor.com/news/]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_news?refcode=20211104_newsletter [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_news?refcode=20211104_newsletter]This morning, John joined Stephanie Ruhle on MSNBC to discuss how Critical Race Theory has become a talking point for the GOP to fear-monger voters into supporting them.
WATCH [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_news?refcode=20211104_newsletter]
THE BLACK WALL STREET TIMES: Teachers saved John King's life. Now, he hopes to be America's first Afro-Latino governor.
"My life is a testament to what is possible when we make opportunity available to everyone. We, as a state, need to do more to make sure that opportunity exists for every child and family in Maryland."
READ MORE [https://theblackwallsttimes.com/2021/10/28/teachers-saved-john-kings-life-now-he-hopes-to-be-americas-first-afro-latino-governor/]
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wyY40zjLeA8 [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wyY40zjLeA8]On October 24th, John spoke at the Cedar Lane Unitarian Universalist Church and shared his vision for how Maryland can lead on the climate crisis and use it as an opportunity to repair injustice.
WATCH [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_video?refcode=em_newsletter]
On the Road with John
This past Sunday Oct. 31st, John and Melissa celebrated Halloween and her birthday with an infrastructure party! Can you guess what John dressed up as? (Hint: we recently shared a a petition about it [https://secure.ngpvan.com/_0RGX5qkNEWIM0Py9svdPA2] )
On Saturday, Oct. 30th John joined a GOTV rally in Anne Arundel in support of Mayor Gavin Buckley — who just won re-election!
On Thursday, Oct. 28th John had a great virtual Q&A session with the Baltimore County Progressive Dems club.

Wednesday, Nov 10 @ 6:00PM
Virtual on Zoom
RSVP [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Zc-NVjuDuE2RKEFEzUM2HQ2]

name: Patrick Witt for Congress
subject: Did you catch my speech?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Patrick Witt for Congress](http://links
body:
[](http://links.patrickwitt.com/u/click?_t=c6f93fbae9f248579219163f37a7b6fe&_m=088bd10e7df2456fa69f99b0e2c96684&_e=6ZgA3cTVhPKAb_Kju7ZL0Nm1eKgRNmpOce_x22T0w7-gCISc_i9afDjPphAsdMgh-2A5hPregm-vwbHu5s16EK-3WlVediSBiEdUGCsHnrY1NdQEtRVW79R_jKui0G_-sVfE8hFWeVsFtMzFWi6hFGNxKKCPoYY5CGeADFM7b9oo3GQmz6ZaAZDOyuqsgBAd3SOdNIpt_no0xZXKSd2hllEFAJc-o7YHHjg7CFN6FbRorL86Hrg3qbDcdyGNLRp2LWNOn8hi16qhIbD1lxhi5W3rMe9Y-GeMb0gWvHrKKOuxIZhSkl9yWpgoVULBslFhJFC0abxs4RTJX6i3DGUxtFwiYOV4D4c_OdKlU-ALKUpPt08gOp60J-K40-I57Wkq2wAlyWmsp2AG4-2VlQ2oireaQOPpIQDqfp9rlVZat7u_pOr5fFZL7aK4fwbN2Lqz903UgXVhG3Y242-hTNRt8Q%3D%3D) Dear Peter, The right to vote in a free and fair election is the most basic right we have as Americans. And it is actively under attack by the Left and RINOs who wish to suppress America’s voice. ** ** I was a part of Trump’s post-election team in Georgia. ** ** I saw the evidence of voter fraud firsthand. ** ** **[I had the privilege of sharing my thoughts and findings at the Audit the Vote rally yesterday and wanted to make sure you saw my speech, clean_body: Dear Peter, The right to vote in a free and fair election is the most basic right we have as Americans. And it is actively under attack by the Left and RINOs who wish to suppress America’s voice. I was a part of Trump’s post-election team in Georgia. I saw the evidence of voter fraud firsthand. As this race heats up, I am committed to making election integrity one of my biggest campaign priorities and taking action to protect our elections, not only here in Georgia, but nationwide. With your continued help, our grassroots movement has gained traction to spread the word about my campaign and the need to preserve trust in our electoral system. Let’s keep this momentum going and make sure we protect every LEGAL vote. Thank you for being in this fight with me, Patrick | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Copyright © 2021 Patrick Witt for Congress, All rights reserved.

| | | |

## GOP takes back Virginia with the most diverse ticket in it’s history...
This week Virginia elected the most diverse ticket in its history. Lt Governor Winsome Sears is a black woman, veteran, small business owner, Attorney General Jason Miyares is a first generation Cuban-American. Wonder why main stream media isn’t talking about it? Oh because they’re Republicans.
| | | |
---
Thank you to our views who tuned into _Spicer & Co_ Tuesday night for analysis and updates on the Virginia election and made us the most watched show on Newsmax.
| | | |
---
## Stories I’m reading...
[Analysis: After tough election, Biden dismisses danger signs](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=72c06bf2db&e=f6564bbe3b) — via AP NewsGreat analysis on Dem strategy to get 3-4 items passed before losing the House.
|
---
[Truck Driver Leads NJ Senate President After Spending $153 on Campaign ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=5fb5c8e708&e=f6564bbe3b)— via NBC Philadelphia
|
---
[The Biden Administration is considering paying hundreds of millions of dollars to compensate thousands of families separated at the border in 2018](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=1aa0828400&e=f6564bbe3b) — via WSJA “friend” wants to know, if you drive to Tijuana and come back can you get $100k?
|
---
[McAuliffe: “Our School Boards Were Fine.. These People Started Showing Up Creating Such a Ruckus”](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=00b9f108dc&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Meet The PressThese “people” causing a ruckus are... parents of students.
|
---
[The Federal Government Gave Billions to America’s Schools for COVID-19 Relief. Where Did the Money Go?](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=46866a4a50&e=f6564bbe3b) — via ProPublicaExhibit A in what happens when the government blows trillions of dollars quickly, and for what it’s worth this group is to the left of the federal government.
| | | |
---
#ICYMI: Joined The Rubin Report with Dave Rubin, Liz Wheeler, and Eric Metaxas. Check it out below:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=2bc5ead320&e=f6564bbe3b)

Thanks to everyone who made launch week of Radical Nation such a success. If you order a copy now, send me your receipt and I’ll send you custom bookplate.I’ve had a great time traveling and having conversations about _Radical Nation_ and the important issues at stake. Look -- Steve Sisolak is Nevada’s first Democratic governor in twenty years, and he’s wasted no time fighting for progress:
**→ He established a public health insurance option
→ He bolstered public education with hundreds of millions in funding
→ He stood with workers during the pandemic
→ He enhanced voting rights and passed vote-by-mail
→ He expanded reproductive rights**
_But now Democrats’ crushing loss to a Trump-backed opponent in Virginia is signaling that Steve’s race will be an uphill battle._
The Republican Governors Association contributed $4.6 million in October alone to defeat Democrat Terry McAuliffe. And now that Republicans won Virginia, they’re moving on to remaining toss-up states like Nevada.

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Good news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We’re here to share some big wins over the last two days.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211104-2634-header&t=1&akid=2634%2E2526796%2EYBEBI9)
In politics, it’s easy to get discouraged. Losing the Governor's race in Virginia on Tuesday was a huge bummer. But there were some **big wins** over the last two days that many thought weren’t possible and remind us why organizing matters:
**Civilian Climate Corps makes it into the Build Back Better Act**
Yesterday, we successfully won the inclusion and the establishment of the US Civilian Climate Corps in the Build Back Better Act. This program is set to create over 300,000 public service jobs for people of all ages to help mitigate climate change and environmental injustices.
Alexandria first outlined a vision for this plan in 2019 as part of the Green New Deal framework.1 While many said it was impossible, we organized with our partners from the Sunrise Movement and others to make this a reality.
**Bailout for Taxi Drivers**
Two years ago, we began working with the New York Taxi Workers Alliance to fight for our immigrant taxi workers who were trapped and targeted in a predatory medallion lending scheme by big lenders.
When we first rolled out this plan to relieve unfair debt and astronomical loan payments, we were told that it was naive, too expensive, and unreasonable. But yesterday, we won.2
This bailout will rescue thousands of cab drivers who have been crushed under paralyzing debt after years of exploitative practices in the industry.
Alexandria was one of the first politicians to come out and support this plan in 2019.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211104?refcode=em20211104-2634-P_FND_ANO_ORG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2634_2526796_YBEBI9&akid=2634%2E2526796%2EYBEBI9)
**Historic election wins**
On the election front, we also have some good news. Tiffany Cabán – a public defender who advocates for the shutdown of Rikers jail – was elected to the New York City Council. Shahana Hanif just became the first-ever Muslim woman elected to the New York City Council in history.
Michelle Wu, a progressive, became the first woman and person of color to be elected as Mayor of Boston. Richie Floyd made history as the first openly socialist candidate to win a city council race in Florida since the 1930's.
The lessons from all of these victories (and our losses) is that we need to build our movement from the bottom up. Mass mobilization – both during and outside elections – is crucial to our progress.
The only way we were able to win relief for taxi drivers was because of an outside non-electoral mass movement of organized workers.
When we pair organized mass movements with elected leaders who are willing to enact the people's will, we can accelerate the momentum needed to make change.
All of this work is powered by grassroots donations from people like you. [If you’re in a place to make your first $3 contribution today, you can do so here. It would go a long way in powering our organizing for the next batch of wins.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211104?refcode=em20211104-2634-P_FND_ANO_ORG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&refcode2=2634_2526796_YBEBI9&akid=2634%2E2526796%2EYBEBI9)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211104?refcode=em20211104-2634-P_FND_ANO_ORG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=2634_2526796_YBEBI9&akid=2634%2E2526796%2EYBEBI9)**
When we organize people, the people win.
Team AOC
1 - [The Intercept
](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10132?t=24&akid=2634%2E2526796%2EYBEBI9)2 - [The New York Times](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10133?t=25&akid=2634%2E2526796%2EYBEBI9)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211104?refcode=em20211104-2634-P_FND_ANO_ORG&t=26&refcode2=2634_2526796_YBEBI9&akid=2634%2E2526796%2EYBEBI9)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211104-2634-P_FND_ANO_ORG&t=27&akid=2634%2E2526796%2EYBEBI9)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=28&akid=2634%2E2526796%2EYBEBI9) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=29&akid=2634%2E2526796%2EYBEBI9) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=30&akid=2634%2E2526796%2EYBEBI9)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

The only way we were able to win relief for taxi drivers was because of an outside non-electoral mass movement of organized workers. When we pair organized mass movements with elected leaders who are willing to enact the people's will, we can accelerate the momentum needed to make change. All of this work is powered by grassroots donations from people like you. When we organize people, the people win. Team AOC 1 - - | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com

name: Marcus Dixon, Executive Director
subject: a question for you about the Florida Democratic Party
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FLORIDA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯⋯ |
---
The Florida Democratic Party is working to win. Join our fight and stay connected with our emails. If you only want to recieve our most urgent emails or unsubscribe, [click here.](https://go.floridadems.org/survey/less-email/?t=1&akid=942%2E507758%2ELTO8kd) Hello,

The Florida Democratic Party is conducting focus groups to inform our strategy to flip Florida Blue.

As the Executive Director of the party, I’m asking you to take our survey attached as soon as possible so we can continue to rebuild the party.

[**Can you click here to begin the Florida focus group?](https://go.floridadems.org/survey/advisory-board-INTRO?source=MS_EM_SURV_2021.10.21_X_Focus-Group_R1__F1_S1_C1__Intro&t=2&akid=942%2E507758%2ELTO8kd)** | [BEGIN IMMEDIATELY ➡︎](https://go.floridadems.org/survey/advisory-board-INTRO?source=MS_EM_SURV_2021.10.21_X_Focus-Group_R1__F1_S1_C1__Intro&t=3&akid=942%2E507758%2ELTO8kd)
---
This is a rebuilding year for the Florida Democratic Party and we need an airtight strategy or we simply won’t win in 2022. That’s why I’m reaching out to you for your input. **Here’s our plan --**

**ONE:** We’re completely rebuilding. We just announced a slate of new senior staff members. We just hired a new Senior Communications Advisor, Field and Organizing Director, Voter Registration Director, In-House Counsel, Municipal Victory Program Director, Finance Director, and Deputy Finance Director.

**TWO:** We’re using our new talent to focus on registering voters, grassroots organizing that builds and rebuilds relationships with members of the community, holding Republicans accountable, and advocating for Democratic values.

**THREE:** But it’s no secret that campaigning in Florida is expensive. We have multiple serious elections with national attention coming down the pipeline. If we’re going to take down Governor Ron DeSantis, Marco Rubio and their state-level Republicans, then we need to fundraise big time. That’s why each and every fundraising goal is serious to us.

[**If we get your opinions as soon as possible, we can form a strategy to unseat Ron DeSantis and Marco Rubio. Can you please respond and start your focus group survey?](https://go.floridadems.org/survey/advisory-board-INTRO?source=MS_EM_SURV_2021.10.21_X_Focus-Group_R1__F1_S1_C1__Intro&t=4&akid=942%2E507758%2ELTO8kd)**
[BEGIN IMMEDIATELY ➡︎](https://go.floridadems.org/survey/advisory-board-INTRO?source=MS_EM_SURV_2021.10.21_X_Focus-Group_R1__F1_S1_C1__Intro&t=5&akid=942%2E507758%2ELTO8kd)
---
[**We’re counting on Democrats to help give their honest opinion.](https://go.floridadems.org/survey/advisory-board-INTRO?source=MS_EM_SURV_2021.10.21_X_Focus-Group_R1__F1_S1_C1__Intro&t=6&akid=942%2E507758%2ELTO8kd)**

Rebuilding with you,

_-Marcus Dixon_
**Executive Director
The Florida Democratic Party**
| This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[Click here to get fewer emails.](https://go.floridadems.org/survey/less-email/?t=7&akid=942%2E507758%2ELTO8kd) | [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://go.floridadems.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=942%2E507758%2ELTO8kd)
---
|
---
| _**The Florida Democratic Party is one of the MOST important Democratic Organizations in the country -- the work we do will affect the entire nation.** _And we're working to win big this cycle. So we need you with us:

| | [DONATE TO FLORIDA DEMOCRATS ➞](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms_surv_2021_footer?refcode=MS_EM_FR_2021.05.14_X_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=5&amounts=5&t=10,25,50,100,250&refcode2=942_507758_LTO8kd&akid=942%2E507758%2ELTO8kd)

[ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms_surv_2021_footer?refcode=MS_EM_FR_2021.05.14_X_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=5&amounts=5&t=11,25,50,100,250&refcode2=942_507758_LTO8kd&akid=942%2E507758%2ELTO8kd)
We’re spending every minute and penny we have to dominate the 2022 Midterms Elections and END Ron DeSantis and Marco Rubio’s careers.
Elections are won and lost by the groundwork we put down right NOW. So staying connected to our supporters via email is critical to our strategy. If you'd like to get fewer emails, [click here.](https://go.floridadems.org/survey/less-email/?t=12&akid=942%2E507758%2ELTO8kd) If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, [click here.](https://go.floridadems.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=942%2E507758%2ELTO8kd)

| | Dear , Now that the 2021 elections are over, I wanted to let you know our campaign is in full flight at the moment:

We have been to **98 counties** on the Jaworski Tour since August 2020.
We have had **142 campaign events**.
We have sent **950,000 Text Messages**.
We have produced countless videos and they have been running online since the summer.
Our videos have been seen over **3.4 million times**.
Our social media is a dominant, every day presence.
We have raised over **$1.2 million dollars**.
We use that money on a daily basis to **WIN EVERY DAY**! And we are.

[**With 116 days until Election Day, and 99 days until early vote, can you spare a few dollars for a contribution?**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=06ce20fee0&e=5d8d80652b)

[**Donate today and help us turn Texas blue in 2022.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=28644ab4f8&e=5d8d80652b)

Joe Jaworski

name: Erika Benfield
subject: Build back better?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erika Benfield for Congress
body:
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=c6f1ea7a91804607b8ad7f752e4579af&_e=PpVa808qUdmzKU9kuQiFceCcA_v4UMXMOwoWOHRdccbvaaTEZUO4YNwjZ_cJrDpPHFSFByNpwZM7ng2ySEGXxSFEWU4hN__3Zg2PWgR1557gfOigJ8tfRxiXbWkWIdgz0T5nVoR-E7Oh4X1d3rmI0I-wcFfiy327b86Az1KboEOWGufMxWGite3iKefuHELepw1yIOjyzEL_lspa9wCdPOFQjfUqK8nZ4mV-nZgWLPecmI_qMca0k3W8U6QlaFJ402_eX-CJgN-SSe3cxRiGscG1AYW2uXtAoFhLpU6HCylyHHTjvrd7rbYvIw3qS0IV) Hi friend, Businesses in America are struggling, and Democrats are to blame. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=c6f1ea7a91804607b8ad7f752e4579af&_e=PpVa808qUdmzKU9kuQiFceCcA_v4UMXMOwoWOHRdccbvaaTEZUO4YNwjZ_cJrDpPHFSFByNpwZM7ng2ySEGXxSFEWU4hN__3Zg2PWgR15556J2TNTxw2d9_JQuQJ76u8T6AGpqtfiRF0ikEEGGZn4vH5VKbbTzUypBfVrpRB2WPDO4-7di_NeZ4gZavKQ9cko2vsj2x-72NnfEdIuWNxkaqJjmiCjSFHGnBHTeHC3vrQwjfE5z9jWUFCRPP8oSVFcYtoqMgNALrSsUQtezSts6AOUvnB8L2PFa1mozlLJkiJQOhP0NY3q2Uw_-7pTa3u) [**Help Me Fight For American Businesses!
**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=c6f1ea7a91804607b8ad7f752e4579af&_e=PpVa808qUdmzKU9kuQiFceCcA_v4UMXMOwoWOHRdccbvaaTEZUO4YNwjZ_cJrDpPHFSFByNpwZM7ng2ySEGXxSFEWU4hN__3Zg2PWgR15579FC0ERg7wnjR4B-TtL659ejNHwXuaJUQ_LDvBLKBm1OwccA1cTI7_ZZphfLX6aCY4Is6dIzv76lsIwm_aNGRaii89ZgMYuvixcSGPFJs4Bt11pLgkqFNceWh2IKx3cz-ImuNuvVzAIvc6TgIhcLwse2Mutor4IRFV5DuffQgSP6bhGVKXmVt3upjS-rADWFg_UKWcc74qW2gJ6Vez14GG) **_For_**** _months_**** _,_** Joe Biden and his Democrat allies introduced plans that paid Americans more to sit at home and collect unemployment than they would make by going to work. Now, in the midst of a labor shortage, **sweeping mandates threaten to unemploy tens of thousands who actually showed up** \-- _some of whom we called heroes not too long ago_. **I see it with my own small business.** Joe Biden's total mismanagement of our supply chain has put our customer satisfaction at risk. It’s becoming increasingly clear that the Left’s policies are hurting businesses, not helping them. Joe Biden isn’t ‘building back better,’ he’s **building back BROKEN. ** **I am running to get America back on track and back to work. ** I will fight against the Left’s disastrous policies and support businesses and their workers, not penalize them. Will you help me in my fight for a pro-business America? clean_body: Hi friend, Businesses in America are struggling, and Democrats are to blame. For months , Joe Biden and his Democrat allies introduced plans that paid Americans more to sit at home and collect unemployment than they would make by going to work. Now, in the midst of a labor shortage, sweeping mandates threaten to unemploy tens of thousands who actually showed up \-- some of whom we called heroes not too long ago. I see it with my own small business. Joe Biden's total mismanagement of our supply chain has put our customer satisfaction at risk. It’s becoming increasingly clear that the Left’s policies are hurting businesses, not helping them. Joe Biden isn’t ‘building back better,’ he’s building back BROKEN. I am running to get America back on track and back to work. I will fight against the Left’s disastrous policies and support businesses and their workers, not penalize them. Will you help me in my fight for a pro-business America? With your support we can push back on the Left’s job-killing agenda. Your support means everything to me as I fight for our nation. Thank you, Erika Benfield Candidate for Congress (FL-07) | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Erika Benfield for Congress

name: Erica Smith
subject: I want to share my story as a single mom with you today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
I almost lost everything.
#
Hi there, it’s Erica.
Today, I want to share my story about my experience as a single mother. It’s really important for me that you understand why I take the fight for paid family and medical leave so personally.
Like many single-mothers, I had to juggle working full-time to put food on the table and raising my babies. **I almost lost everything** because I couldn’t afford to take the time off I needed to, and childcare wasn’t affordable by any means.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/25349?t=1&akid=610%2E3698%2EMum-dZ)
I wanted to share my story with you today, because — _although it’s not unique_ — I think it’s critical that you know **I’ve been there**.
Too many families and too many mothers are having this experience of scrambling to make ends meet, but few of them will ever have the opportunity to be in politics.
I’m running for U.S. Senate in North Carolina because I am just plain TIRED of hearing from career-politicians who are removed from the experience of their constituents and don’t understand the urgency of passing life-changing policies like universal paid leave.
[**_If you believe we need leaders in the Senate who are ready to fight for paid family and medical leave, will you chip in $5 to our campaign today?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/25349?t=2&akid=610%2E3698%2EMum-dZ)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/25355?refcode=em20211104-610&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=610%2E3698%2EMum-dZ)**
My kids (and new grandchild) are my motivation.
Everything I do, I do to make the world just a little bit better for them. They remind me why I’m fighting for change here in North Carolina. That’s why I will fight tooth and nail to get progressive, urgent, and popular policies like universal paid family and medical leave passed in Congress.
**_[If you’re with me in this fight, please make a donation of $5 today. We’re a people-powered campaign, and we’re building this movement the right way — without a dollar from super PACs, fossil fuel companies, or Wall Street CEOs.](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/25349?t=22&akid=610%2E3698%2EMum-dZ)_**
Thank you for reading my story,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211104-610-footer&t=23&refcode2=610_3698_Mum-dZ&akid=610%2E3698%2EMum-dZ)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=610%2E3698%2EMum-dZ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=610%2E3698%2EMum-dZ)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: FW: Every county and town matters in this election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
I just wrapped up a great trip to the Upper Peninsula where I talked with numerous voters who are fed up and ready for a change. | | | |
---
| | |
#### CAMPAIGN UPDATE
# Every county and town matters in this election!
### The Energy to Win.
---
|
---
|
---
| Peter:

I just wrapped up a great trip to the Upper Peninsula where I talked with numerous voters who are fed up and ready for a change. This election is important, and it'll take support from all corners of the state.

I had an incredible time at the **Crystal Falls VFW**. My message of optimism for the future of Michigan was well received. **Thank you veterans for your service.**
---
|
---
---
| In the **Iron River** area I met with citizens, community leaders, and business owners. Fixing Michigan was the focus of our discussion as we talked about taxes, regulations, education, individual liberty, Line 5, and many other topics. **Stambaugh airport** was a great spot to have this meeting and see everyone.
---
|
---
| |
---

I also had the privilege of meeting **Dave Smith** , the gentleman who harvested the state Christmas tree 🎄 in Iron River.

He even had the antique crosscut saw he used.

**It’s great to be out in every area of Michigan meeting citizens and earning support.**
---
| The**Baraga County Republican Party** hosted me Friday night. Really appreciated the reception and great questions.
---
|
---
| Timber is an important industry in Michigan and the UP with over 20 million acres of forest land and some of the best hard maple, red pine, and red oak timber in the world. There are more than 150 registered foresters in the state and over 800 logging and trucking firms.

I spent time with Eric Shamion of **Shamco, Inc** discussing the timber industry. Educational and extremely fascinating.
---
|
---
---
| I also had a great visit to **Rapid River Knifeworks** where the craftsmanship of their knives is incredible. Their showroom is unbelievable – great products and wonderful employees. I have one of their knives in my deer hunting pack. If you are in Rapid River stop in. You will be impressed!
---
|
---
| While I was one of the last to enter this race, Peter, I want you to know I'm in it for the long haul. _I'm committed to win. That's why I'm campaigning in every corner of the state_. It'll take support from throughout Michigan to win this Primary Election, and more importantly to defeat Gretchen Whitmer in November.

I have the energy. I have the fight. _**Together we can win this!**_

If you have any questions about me, my positions, or my campaign, please reach out to me at [mike@captainmikeformichigan.com](mailto:mike@captainmikeformichigan.com).

>From the campaign trail,

Michael Brown
_Candidate for Governor_
---
|
---

body:
The radical Left in this country wants you to believe that there are no conservatives left in Nevada. | |
---
|
---
[](http://links.donatetodean.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=1b7324d612b14fba9992bb717401fa5e&_e=g9qA8lt8Md4E5ZIIorfi5yXEqCQHIFffwaPYbpkPXMuB-c7Z9o4wnk1IY3wNYL_LdnSFFkyMnENzAffUlyAyBkoqkVwSiRpx0xmJ7_JHq9Le5fUVHFY2QBRTDXYupOwK0L9K83a7M1pxMb40jfeX1PaMImn8JlnPMJWV4dFbzfb1docH70mP6ZfLpwKN8WYW81dCS28e6p1sZbgeXp0MkAmTNYuk6XNC99gPWsxfGqU8jqZ-dfkHU0yp_HwqarUVlImrAUL9O4jQ1gmwFBxqfI0bMUz2Xb564NKIt_dv9TZ3brN6YUmUVcXxQkzjPuukn2Wp4mS5ergnot5_dw_fM-L-M3dAZITnKqmVs0uG586pfIt62qHnhfkZePNjcJoYkxbrG4jLhk8m-NXEpdftcPFdh9_G5GlZF1LQTyscmCeTZfZ6ogBLIs5C1odTSQp8HIrQU_Air1INnPIPLOUbJxjWBryl0aFXk4FuEtraahZO47UsTqaEdaPYmpjtOjYu)
|
---
Peter,

You know it. I know it.

**Under Governor Sisolak, Nevada is headed in the wrong direction.**

Don’t get me started on what is happening in Washington.
