subject: My visit with President Trump and some Election Updates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Janice for Idaho, Machele Hamilton Treasurer [unsubscribe](https://janicemcgeachin
body:
As you may recall, I had a productive meeting with President Trump in NYC last June. This week, I had a second meeting with him at Mar-a-Lago. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/janicemcgeachin/campaign-update-11-04-21?e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=563253d740&e=823fa8e224)
---
| |
## Meeting with President Trump at Mar-a-Lago
---
| Dear Friends,
---
| As you may recall, I had a productive meeting with President Trump in NYC last June. This week, I had the honor of a second meeting with him at Mar-a-Lago in Florida. We spoke on the continuation of the America First agenda for our country and for the great state of Idaho. I assured him that I would not cower to Joe Biden and his destructive policies that are now directly affecting Idaho. While there are many conservative policies that fall within the scope of America First, some of the most important are election integrity, a strong and secure border, school choice, energy independence, and growing our economy by supporting American businesses and reducing taxes and regulations. Under President Trump, America was making positive strides on all of these issues, but now under the corrupt Biden administration and a complicit congress with a vocal contingent of radical leftist activists, that progress is being stymied and even reversed. Like President Trump, I am committed to finding effective solutions to counter the leftist agenda and to restore the American Greatness that Biden and his cronies seek to undermine. I love America and I love Idaho. We cannot stand idly by and allow the next generation to suffer the consequences of our inaction. President Trump understands this and I look forward to working with him in the future to bring his America First agenda to Idaho.
---
|
---
|
## 2021 Election Update
---
| One of the more exciting races this week was the Virginia Gubernatorial election, where Republican Glenn Youngkin narrowly defeated the Democrat incumbent and put an end to 12 years of leftist dominance in the state. Here in Idaho, we saw conservative victories across the state from Canyon County to Kootenai County. Conservatives won city council races in Caldwell, Nampa, and Eagle. They won school board races in Nampa, Middleton, and West Ada. All across Idaho, the conservative message is resonating with voters. It appears the radical left's "defund the police" movement is officially dead. In Minnesota, voters soundly rejected a proposal to replace the police department with a Department of Public Safety. Even in liberal enclaves like New York City, the trends are shifting. Eric Adams, the city's new Democrat mayor is a veteran police officer, and while Republicans won't find much common ground with him on most policies, he has called for an increased police presence in the city to improve public safety.
---
|
---
|
## Campaign Update
---
| This week, I visited the Teen Challenge Boise Girls Academy facility for a tour, tea, and listening to the girls. This is a great program "Putting Hope Within Reach through long-term residential Discipleship."
---
|
---
|
---
---
| Next week, I will be in North Idaho, attending numerous events and meeting with constituents in the area. Below are some of my upcoming events in North Idaho you are welcome to attend.
---

The Altar Church
901 E. Best Avenue, Coeur d'Alene, ID 83815 Monday, Nov. 8, 2021, 9:00 – 10:30 am (PST)
Community Meet and Greet
Fenton Gym, 1203 8th Ave, Lewiston, ID
(The facility has no heat so it is advised that people dress warm.) Tuesday, Nov 9, 2021, 1:10 – 2:15 pm (PST)
Bonner County Republican Women Inc. (BCRWI)
Ponderay Events Center, 401 Bonner Mall Way, Suite E, Ponderay, ID 83852 Tuesday, Nov. 9, 2021, 6:00 – 7:30 pm (PST)
Providence Bible Church
6530 Washington Street, Bonners Ferry, ID 83805 Wednesday, Nov. 10, 2021, 11:00 – 12:30 pm (PST)
History Club
JB's Restaurant, 704 W. Appleway Ave., Coeur d' Alene, ID 83814,

|
## America First!
---
| As conservatives, we believe in individual liberty, election integrity, a strong and secure border, school choice, energy independence, reducing taxes and regulations, and supporting American businesses. Sadly, not all Republicans are conservatives, and some are even willing to join with radical leftists to oppose these goals. Now, more than ever, conservatives must take a stand against politicians whose allegiance to the Constitution and conservative principles has faltered. Just electing Republicans is not enough; we must elect consistent conservatives. I'm running for Idaho Governor as a consistent, principled conservative because I want to Make Idaho Free Again! We must restore the principles of individual liberty, state sovereignty, and traditional conservative values. I strongly believe in these foundational principles and I know that you believe in them too. Will you put America First and help us to replace those politicians who have lost their way with true conservatives willing to do whatever it takes to protect your Liberty?

name: John Fetterman
subject: Looks like Sen. Joe Manchin needs *more time*
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Just hear me out:
#
On Monday, news broke that Senator Joe Manchin says he needs *more time* to consider supporting President Biden's Build Back Better plan.
You read that right, Peter. MORE time. _Seriously???_ 🤯
Serving as your Lt. Governor and hearing directly from folks across the Commonwealth has made it clear to me that *more time* is the very last thing working people + families need before receiving the real relief we've been promised.
I wholeheartedly believe that, in unprecedented times like these, Democrats need to vote like Democrats. It's time to deliver.
**So, Peter, just hear me out:** If you're sick of grinding your teeth when you hear Senators Manchin and Sinema continue to needlessly stand in the way of President Biden's agenda, _I just might be your candidate._
If you're looking for the kind of Senator who isn't afraid to vote in favor of bold, transformative legislation, _I could be your guy._
And if you're looking for that reliable, unwavering 51st Democratic vote in the U.S. Senate, _I am humbly asking for your support today._
[**_Will you kick in your first $5 today if it makes sense for your budget? We're working to scale up our statewide organizing plan in a *serious* way in the upcoming weeks, and we're still looking for more support from Cresco to get us all the way funded to reach every one of PA's 67 counties._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36358?refcode=em20211104-3330&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3330%2E434096%2EH7wwb8)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36358?refcode=em20211104-3330&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=3330%2E434096%2EH7wwb8)**
From passing President Biden's Build Back Better plan to abolishing the filibuster to passing the Women’s Health Protection Act to finally defend abortion access, my promise to you is that I’d be the 51st vote on all of that + more.
And look, I’m just saying, if we had _juuuuuust_ one more Democratic vote in the Senate, both of these urgent priorities would be on their way to President Biden’s desk, too: 👇
* Paid family leave so parents can spend time with their LITERAL newborns
* Reversing the bogus Trump tax cuts for the wealthy + corporations

I don't think any of that is too much to ask. If you trust me with your vote to flip this Senate seat, you won't have to worry whether I'll stand in the way of the policies you just read about. **I'd proudly put my career on the line to deliver the progress that working people need + deserve. 💯**
But I can't get to the U.S. Senate on my own. That's facts. So I'm relying on a lot of online donations today to help us get there:
[**_Can you make your very first donation of $5 to help flip this Senate seat? CNN has ranked our race #1 Most Likely to Flip a senate seat in 2022, so your contribution will make a huge impact on this race, especially right now._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/36358?refcode=em20211104-3330&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3330%2E434096%2EH7wwb8)
Yours,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211104-3330-footer&t=22&refcode2=3330_434096_H7wwb8&akid=3330%2E434096%2EH7wwb8)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=3330%2E434096%2EH7wwb8)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=3330%2E434096%2EH7wwb8)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Bobby Piton
subject: Updates and some events you're invited to
body:
|
---
|
---
| Friends, Have you noticed, our Senators don't talk or listen to us? Ever wonder how they keep getting elected without having to work at it? I'm working at changing this and that's why I'm running to replace Tammy Duckworth. I'm going to need your help. **What can you do? Here are a couple suggestions...** First, join me at one of my events and invite friends! They're happening all around the state and you'll be able to visit with me and special guests like Joe Oltmann, who exposed Antifa, Jovan Hutton Pulitzer, pattern recognition expert and the man who I hope will be Illinois' next Attorney General, David Shestokas. Here are some upcoming events:
* November, 13 - Moline, IL, [DETAILS AND REGISTRATION HERE](https://tan434.keap-link001.com/api/v1/click/5550296655593472/6621432667570176)
* November 14 - Quincy, IL, [DETAILS AND REGISTRATION HERE](https://tan434.keap-link001.com/api/v1/click/5963025161781248/6621432667570176)

* November 14 - Carthage, IL, For this event get tickets by emailing [hcrepublicanscc@gmail.com ](mailto:hcrepublicanscc@gmail.com)

Next, [support my campaign](https://tan434.keap-link001.com/api/v1/click/5267702101704704/6621432667570176)! Otherwise, we'll keep electing politicians who lie to us, give away our money and restrict our freedoms.
## We need more public servants.
## We need less professional politicians.
That's why I'm running. Will you help make a difference?
---

name: Tim Ryan
subject: $10,800 for dinner with Peter Thiel?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1350%2E3611125%2ESCd18S ][IMG]

Did you
see JD Vance’s tweet today?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5817?t=1007&akid=1350%2E3611125%2ESCd18S ]JD Vance tweet: Want to have dinner with me and Peter Thiel? Donate $10,800
by tomorrow and I’ll send you the details

Folks, we can’t make this stuff up. $10,800 a pop to sit down with GOP
extremist JD Vance and Silicon Valley tech billionaire Peter Thiel? I
think I’ll pass.

Look, I will never ask you to shell out $10,800 to have dinner with a
bunch of Silicon Valley hacks. But I will ask you to chip in what you can
to help us flip Ohio blue:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5817?t=1008&akid=1350%2E3611125%2ESCd18S ]Can I count on you to chip in whatever you can so out-of-touch
millionaire JD Vance never represents Ohio in the Senate?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5817?t=1009&akid=1350%2E3611125%2ESCd18S ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5818?t=1010&akid=1350%2E3611125%2ESCd18S ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5819?t=1011&akid=1350%2E3611125%2ESCd18S ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5820?t=1012&akid=1350%2E3611125%2ESCd18S ]Donate $200

In all seriousness, JD Vance, who claims to speak for the working class,
is asking donors to drop over ten thousand dollars.

Clearly, he ain’t living in reality.

Ohioans are worried about paying their bills and saving up to help send
their kids to college, but JD thinks people have thousands of dollars
laying around.

Folks, I'm fed up with millionaires and billionaires calling the
shots and buying Senate seats, while hard-working Americans get left
behind.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5817?t=1015&akid=1350%2E3611125%2ESCd18S ]We need our grassroots supporters to step up and counter these big
money donors so we can win this race. Will you chip in $25 ASAP?

name: Mckayla Wilkes
subject: Republican donors are fired up. Are you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE
body:
| | | Team, **Tuesday needed to be a wake up call for Democrats. Republicans and the establishment are _convinced_ that they have all the momentum right now.** But, we’re seeing the energy on the ground. Yes, we all can see that Republican donors are fired up and ready to contest every election — but so are we. **[_We need you - our grassroots supporters - to step up right now and make sure that we don’t let up now. Donate whatever you can to show that we’re ready to win in 2022 and fight for the progressive justice we need._](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z7BEnzEB3IORvT7VbHa0t2zZATHHWbXFHULGu97EO7EUql_P8I_RR9HD4sFamumpmXOGNedU9cdwaD4aOGT0lEXcc4FU1IeNMrShoEfNP6KcpwyGjaB1rWqadtIniXhIlgnjOIB9cVrEH2czPAcvieHLRdgH34nNvxJy5PtiGi8Fyxy2viRgiUEMBVnXeiGU_XodES5Q0dWYjgeUsGfuFEdibiKtgfqOzDQZcwPwQR3nWOqqKPjjuep3s6HGOUS0FWY5DHoYzyGKyzHbDNgs1ED98TmZQ17KfxVDl1tGYfypD6rY6EPo0XnSaPzLwD67RwczIe6cDVMGdtxCtlUFxD/3gq/9jV38dzhRh2GsU6aY0ajsA/h0/WKFgmWCbQSfqH_0_2RyPuPfnXT4_J46eRdebRLprigo)** There were some real bright spots for progressives on Tuesday night: Michelle Wu became the first woman, first person of color and first Asian American to be elected Mayor of Boston. **Right here in Maryland, Greenbelt overwhelmingly PASSED their referendum on reparations to Black and Native American residents.** That’s real, progressive change. You wouldn’t know that reading the headlines and listening to establishment Democrats right now. They want to use this as an opportunity to scale BACK the changes in the Build Back Better bill. **[_We can’t let that happen. We need to send a strong message right now that scaling back our ambition will only see us lose more elections. We need to fight for bold, transformative, ambitious change. If you agree, chip in a few dollars now._](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z7BEnzEB3IORvT7VbHa0t2zZATHHWbXFHULGu97EO7Ee4XryLF4_rI_BB9_RrZghESiIiire9GrLg-s42R8V3WWSsVPK6JhffzIOmKla1VPP_K_LLhdz4hH9IEKph3lpMsWujumRwQpQ_N8jsF73_uY4vLptUPADlpY0rlQ6LOyjo62Bj4cZLnOMVkAwxoIPoxqFIUKJ-bmBFZe1I0tN6Xg18XzkckXA8naH3Z5rKISOkWKQd2JSmrQYfzxWjoQCCY34Vk1Atd6zm9MAThrGb5upzlHA0Zr3uCeXjvJg94gGCGw_009CKntOOJbpNJHqgI885jkf8Yqrx2P7i4wNvV/3gq/9jV38dzhRh2GsU6aY0ajsA/h1/7orCVpnvKcoLZLUdRqeRlQsSM2I4DTAzXPz9j7j6P-4)** We face a moment where we need to choose: Do we sit back and give up the fight? Or do we redouble our efforts to pass Paid Family Leave, allow Medicare to negotiate drug prices, and really address climate change? Thanks for being a part of this team, Mckayla

Fellow Conservative, Liberals never saw this coming — Republican Glenn Youngkin won the governor’s race in Virginia! And in deep blue New Jersey, Republican Jack Ciattarelli came within inches of beating Democrat incumbent Phil Murphy.
Republicans also saw wins in Minneapolis, where voters overwhelming rejected a ballot measure to defund the police, and even in Seattle, where voters elected a Republican City Attorney!
**There’s BIG momentum going for Republicans across the country, and some key lessons to take note of:**
* Parents are FED UP with left-wing education and being told they don’t have a right to influence what’s being taught in their children’s classrooms.
* Inflation is REAL, and it’s hurting families and workers the hardest.
* Democrat policies are FAILING across the board!

We can’t afford to be complacent going into 2022. We need to keep this momentum going strong and build the foundation for a red tsunami in Nevada!
---

body:

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38310708/314902228/2029933579?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyMDY3NWE3LWU4M2QtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=P7IQV8vodTULGnMe1-_tGv449gzYRlzv73mqUjFrbr0=)

**BREAKING: Democrats DECIMATED in VA, _BARELY WIN_ in NJ** | Republicans are on the verge of pummeling our Senate and House Democrats in 2022.

Granting Washington D.C. Statehood could quite literally be our last line of defense against a complete Republican takeover and far-right tyranny.

And Peter, if we’re EVER going to pass D.C. statehood and expand our Senate Majority, we need to prove voters OVERWHELMINGLY support it.

So we need 7,000 of our best Democrats with us by midnight, Peter: **[Sign on to our petition supporting D.C. Statehood »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38310709/314902229/-1046562102?refcode=UD_20211104_EMPET_E1_T0_CL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyMDY3NWE3LWU4M2QtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=P7IQV8vodTULGnMe1-_tGv449gzYRlzv73mqUjFrbr0=&emci=74f7eef0-a33d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=420675a7-e83d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4584036)** | [SIGN ON NOW »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/38310710/314902230/-1046562102?refcode=UD_20211104_EMPET_E1_T0_CL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyMDY3NWE3LWU4M2QtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=P7IQV8vodTULGnMe1-_tGv449gzYRlzv73mqUjFrbr0=&emci=74f7eef0-a33d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=420675a7-e83d-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4584036)
---
Peter, granting Washington D.C. Statehood is a TOP priority for Democrats. Here’s why:
* If granted, D.C. would be one of the most diverse states in the country.

* Making D.C. a state would add 2 more seats in the Senate.

Democrats have made beating our conservative agenda their number one priority this cycle. If we want to flip this seat back for Republicans, we need folks just like you in our corner to continue building critical momentum.

We've faced adversity before, but we know with a strong team, anything is possible. **[Our campaign is building a grassroots movement to fight off the Democrats, and it's going to take Founding Members like you to help lead us to victory.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=216139e700e1458db4121d6e54d9166a&_e=GaKBdMS1Jh_1-z-fjlU1i9OXjDecqw3C75L4ZVx2yUCi479mrSVzecX2UMTB8FqqGHPHbQuKQ2xSeJgOXJuCDI-VU5MnfjOXeoOV_yu5V7MXzBFgWcEb5r0uUalUrC_j6RUxi-VhTetdka2ZPqzjPZZDu7xAnf1hGUNfG-NMMDwEL1vAD52egewnKR-i81nBE3spz4a5Z6T4ASRSHhTjGxL9FiSqUKLPPisfWN2emtohKq8Kbqw7-sJrsZrAXKbLfBEeX4fe0uVzfOcqSmPkblxcnNMTFma5ykXWWtJFveOVKcOxEJOLbTs7vUvnZnkd-qF57WqFOX_yxnGTJvIw0Jehx7bvlxEh-txVueDUA-EWt-h5bg-V_ORFuTPVb2HUGC-unICJk0q5kTUnyzdlSMf089SYM89Ul0Qn-7n-VaLgSiV7CZCPMEdbVW8EO3OMO4kkCWx8p5KbFUjCOPXT6ouj-s6hPx0SeEE3I0N3ncs%3D)**

clean_body: We’ve faced adversity before, but we know with a strong team, anything is possible. | Fellow American, Georgia will be the battleground state that will determine the Senate majority, and Democrats have already committed TENS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS to win. We are determined to flip this seat RED - but we need your help. We need an army of patriots to become Founding Members of Team Herschel so we can build this campaign on a solid foundation. Democrats have made beating our conservative agenda their number one priority this cycle. If we want to flip this seat back for Republicans, we need folks just like you in our corner to continue building critical momentum. We've faced adversity before, but we know with a strong team, anything is possible. The Democrats are incredibly well-funded - backed by activists from across the country. Fellow American, we will win this race, but we need YOU on our team to do so! Sincerely, Herschel Walker Candidate for US Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Gary Rabine
subject: What we saw in Virginia and New Jersey can happen in Illinois
body:
Help me fight the failed Democrat Policies and War on Families by the left

| [ ](http://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_nov_2021_election_results&n=1)
---
Peter, This past Tuesday, voters in Virginia, New Jersey and across the country rejected failed Democrat policies and the left's War on Families. _Watch my latest remarks on the results in the video below:_ [](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoACmWpbFVl5yir_lA0uM2EqpN0xGN0XmywkE9dE-fkAkRtEIGB_FlGuSasvjXs72Q&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_nov_2021_election_results&n=2) They sent a message nationwide that enough is enough. They made it loud in clear that:
* **Parents matter.** They have an obligation to be invested and involved in their children's education.
* **Parents know what is best for their children.** From keeping their kid in the classroom to wearing a mask to personal healthcare decisions, that is their right.
* **We must end unconstitutional mandates.**
* **America is exceptional.** we should not be teaching destructive Critical Race Theory that undermines the values that our nation was founded upon.
* **We must reverse the Democrats strangling taxation.** Inflation is a tax that hits working families the hardest. At the pump, at the grocery store or buying gifts for loved ones for the holidays, Americans are feeling the cost of reckless Democrat policies
* **We need to invest in Public Safety, not "Defund the Police"**

[**__Help me put an exclamation point on that message by rushing a__** _**$25**** _,_****$50**** _,_****$100**** _or_****$250**** _contribution to this campaign for Illinois Governor._**_](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoACmWpbFVl5yir_lA0uM2Gq9g9n79yo2HHshKvg7nExCdQZseeTdqQcxnA0-13oGA&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_nov_2021_election_results&n=3) | [](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoACmWpbFVl5yir_lA0uM2Gq9g9n79yo2HHshKvg7nExCdQZseeTdqQcxnA0-13oGA&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_nov_2021_election_results&n=4 "Donate Here") [Donate Here](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoACmWpbFVl5yir_lA0uM2Gq9g9n79yo2HHshKvg7nExCdQZseeTdqQcxnA0-13oGA&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_nov_2021_election_results&n=4)
---
Glenn Youngkin's victory in Virginia and Jack Ciattarelli's dead heat finish point to what is possible here in the great state of Illinois. Illinois is a conservative state, and its citizens are looking for a common-sense leader that can put our communities on a path to prosperity. I know that we can do this.
Thank you for your generous support of my campaign. We simply cannot do it without you.
All the best,
Gary Rabine
Republican Candidate for Illinois Governor
[www.rabineforgovernor.com](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=BbZD9kwGhy9l8fXrAK06stMTRu9WWAhwDDdog3DzAJs&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_nov_2021_election_results&n=5)
Rabine for Governor · PO Box 59183, Schaumburg, IL 60159, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_nov_2021_election_results&n=6).
You can also keep up with Rabine for Governor on [Facebook](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6uA-8DLBhIHBVvCsvLF75PkWa6PFHXYHGFtdpip_6NAs&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_nov_2021_election_results&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_nov_2021_election_results&n=8), software for leaders.
